■ After both players have deployed their armies, you can select one ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army and redeploy it. When doing so, you can set that unit up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

vanguard-assault.raw_text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

command-squad.raw_text: While a CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

company-heroes.raw_text: You must attach one CAPTAIN or CHAPTER MASTER model to this unit. If this is not possible, this unit does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

close-quarters-firepower.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

interceptor.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll.

annihilator.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a MONSTER or VEHICLE model, you can re‐roll the Damage roll.

catechism-of-fire.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability when targeting that enemy unit.

armoured-resilience.raw_text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

deadly-terror.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, increase the range of that unit’s Terror Troops ability by 3".

master-of-deceit.raw_text: After both players have deployed their armies, if your army includes one or more models with this ability, you can select up to three friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY units and redeploy all of those units. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

exhortation-of-rage.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

objective-secured.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

target-elimination.raw_text: Each time this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of bolt rifles equipped by models in this unit and you can only select one enemy unit as the target of all of this unit’s attacks.

aerial-assault.raw_text: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

thunderhawk-cluster-bombs.raw_text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

thunderhawk.raw_text: This model has a transport capacity of 30 ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models. Each CENTURION model takes up the space of 3 models. Each MOUNTED model takes up the space of 4 models.

outrider-escort.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when another friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

omni-scramblers.raw_text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this unit.

ballistus-strike.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

incendiary-terror.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, you can select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a pyreblaster. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

trifold-path-of-shadow.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 12".

echo-of-the-ravenspire.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

unorthodox-strategist.raw_text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that would increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

master-of-the-fleet.raw_text: During the Declare Battle Formations step, if your army includes this model, select one PHOBOS, GRAVIS or TACTICUS ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army. That unit gains the Deep Strike ability.

strategic-dispersal.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

fearsome-assault.raw_text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

terror-troops-aura.raw_text: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 3" of one or more units with this ability, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit.

reiver-grav-chute.raw_text: The bearer has the Deep Strike ability.

grapnel-launcher.raw_text: Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, ignore any vertical distance when determining the total distance the bearer can be moved during that move.

spiritual-leader.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle shocked.

vanguard-support.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES PHOBOS INFANTRY unit within 6" of this model is selected as the target of an attack, this model can use this ability. If it does, after that enemy model’s unit has finished making its attacks, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

deeds-of-heroism.raw_text: Once per battle, when this model is selected to fight, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this model’s unit.

isolate-and-destroy.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fire-and-redeploy.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

deathstorm-assault.raw_text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but it is not counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

mortis-strike.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fervour-of-the-ancients-aura.raw_text: While a friendly SPACE WOLVES unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

blizzard-shield.raw_text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

even-in-death-i-serve.raw_text: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

sentry-programming.raw_text: You can target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

inviolable-transport.raw_text: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

termite-assault.raw_text: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

armoured-spearhead.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

deredeo-strike.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

death-hold.raw_text: When making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

ferocious-assault.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

overwhelming-short-range-firepower.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

specialised-weapon-system.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit you selected for the Oath of Moment ability that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability and can ignore the penalty to their Hit rolls when making attacks with Indirect Fire weapons against targets that are not visible to them.

rotating-death.raw_text: This model’s Punisher rotary cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability when targeting Infantry units.

into-the-foe.raw_text: If a unit disembarks from this Transport before it moves, until the end of the turn, that unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

explorator-augury-web.raw_text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this bearer, but the bearer must halve its Transport Capacity.

sunderer-of-fortresses.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Vehicle, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1. If that attack targets a Fortification, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead.

atomantic-arc-reactor.raw_text: Each time this unit shoots its Cerberus neutron pulse array in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, that weapon has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

line-breaker.raw_text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher battle cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

aerial-deployment.raw_text: If this model starts the game in Strategic Reserves, it can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

rolling-fortress.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to an Orks model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Deff Rolla Battle Fortress model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

titan-killer.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

swift-assault.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

martial-superiority.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

powerful-volley.raw_text: While this unit is being affected by an Order, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, Heavy weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

command-squad-bodyguard.raw_text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Bike Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

honour-guard.raw_text: While a Captain or Chapter Master model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

honour-guard-of-macragge.raw_text: Marneus Calgar can be attached to this unit. If a Captain model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Command Squad, it can be attached to this unit instead.

war-howl.raw_text: While this model is leading a BLOOD CLAWS unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re‑roll the Wound roll. While this model is leading a WOLF GUARD HEADTAKERS unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

battle-lust.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Frostfang weapon.

thunderous-charge.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack with its Wolf Guard weapon, if it made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

cunning-hunters.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

predatory-instinct.raw_text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

hunting-hounds.raw_text: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT CHARACTER models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

healing-balms.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) to that unit.

let-loose-the-wolves.raw_text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, split this unit into two units, one containing all of its HEADTAKERS models and one containing all of its HUNTING WOLVES models, with new Starting Strengths accordingly.

headhunters.raw_text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be this unit’s quarry. Weapons equipped by HEADTAKERS models in this unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [PRECISION] abilities while targeting its quarry. Each time this unit’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this unit’s quarry. This ability can be used even if this unit is embarked within a TRANSPORT.

iron-priest.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

gift-of-the-iron-wolf.raw_text: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by that model to have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability or the Blessing of the Omnissiah ability once per turn.

judgement-of-the-omnissiah.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE units, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

wind-walker-psychic.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability and each time that unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

tempest-s-wrath-psychic.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks made with this model’s Living Lightning weapon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stormwracked. While a unit is stormwracked, subtract 6" from the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit (to a minimum of 12").

berserk-charge.raw_text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

slayer-s-oath.raw_text: At the start of the battle, select one of the following keywords to be this model’s Slayer’s Oath: CHARACTER; MONSTER; VEHICLE. The first time this model’s unit destroys a unit with this model’s Slayer’s Oath keyword, if your Detachment rule has a Saga, until the end of the battle, this model’s unit receives the benefits of that Detachment rule as if that Saga had been completed.

oathbound.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that has this model’s Slayer’s Oath keyword (see Slayer’s Oath), add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

high-king-of-fenris.raw_text: Once per battle round, in your Movement phase, you can select one friendly SPACE WOLVES unit that is in Reserves. If you do, until the end of the phase, for the purpose of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

guile-of-the-wolf-aura.raw_text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

embarking-within-transports.raw_text: This model can embark within friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT models that can transport TERMINATOR models. When doing so, it takes up the space of 4 Infantry models.

rugged-resilience.raw_text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

bestial-rage.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if this model lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this model can make a Bestial Rage move. To do so, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result: this model can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, this model can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Each model can only make one Bestial Rage move per phase.

violent-fury.raw_text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons, those weapon profiles have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

hammer-blow.raw_text: In the Fight phase, after this unit has fought, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

death-totem.raw_text: Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

legendary-tenacity.raw_text: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than this model’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

ancient-tactician.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

anvil-of-endurance.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

champion-of-the-kingsguard.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

tempered-ferocity.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability and, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 6", re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

heroic-last-stand.raw_text: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

deadly-stalkers.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

savage-frenzy.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of this unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

murder-maker.raw_text: In the Fight phase, each time an attack targets a friendly WULFEN unit within 6" of this model, if a model in that unit is destroyed as a result of that attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

bestial-fury.raw_text: You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

force-of-untamed-destruction.raw_text: This model cannot be your WARLORD.

primarch-of-the-first-legion.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, select two Primarch of the First Legion abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.

the-emperors-shield.raw_text: Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

dark-angels-bodyguard.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

execute-and-redeploy-vanguard-spearhead.raw_text: PHOBOS model only. the-flesh-is-weak-ironstorm-spearhead.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

adept-of-the-omnissiah-ironstorm-spearhe.raw_text: TECHMARINE model only. Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

the-imperiums-sword-1st-company-task-for.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

fear-made-manifest-aura-1st-company-task.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of the bearer, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, one model in that unit is destroyed (chosen by its controlling player). Once per battle, when such an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, you can choose for D3 models in that unit to be destroyed in this way instead.

rites-of-war-1st-company-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Improve the Objective Control characteristic of the bearer by 1. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of all other models in the bearer’s unit as well.

iron-resolve-1st-company-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Once per battle, after the bearer’s unit is selected as the target of one or more attacks, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

celerity-librarius-conclave.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced, and if the Biomancy Discipline is active for your army, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

prescience-librarius-conclave.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer’s unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if the Divination Discipline is active for your army.

obfuscation-librarius-conclave.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit, and if the Telepathy Discipline is active for your army, the bearer’s unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

fusillade-librarius-conclave.raw_text:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [ANTI‑MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI‑VEHICLE 5+] abilities, and:

■ The [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if the Pyromancy Discipline is active for your army.
■ Add 6" to the Range characteristic of those weapons if the Telekinesis Discipline is active for your army.

laurels-of-thunder-orbital-assault-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. You can re‑roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit in a turn in which it was set up on the battlefield.

veteran-of-the-vanguard-orbital-assault-.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

orbital-uplink-reliquary-orbital-assault.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

liberator-armoured-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any HEAVY TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

tip-of-the-spear-armoured-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. If the bearer starts the battle embarked within a TRANSPORT, that TRANSPORT has the Scouts 6" ability.

shock-deployment-armoured-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR or GRAVIS model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

armoured-commander-armoured-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Once per turn, in your Movement phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT that is in Strategic Reserves. Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up that TRANSPORT on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

eye-of-the-primarch-bastion-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

hero-of-the-chapter-bastion-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

blades-of-valour-bastion-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer and BATTLELINE models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

bombast-omnivox-bastion-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer’s unit has the BATTLELINE keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

honour-indefatigable-ceramite-sentinels.raw_text: GRAVIS model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

castellum-omnivox-ceramite-sentinels.raw_text:
ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Fall Back move, select one of the following to apply to that unit until the end of the turn:

■ That unit is eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Fell Back.
■ That unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

defensive-mastery-ceramite-sentinels.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

redoubtable-machine-spirit-headhunter-ta.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. The bearer has a 5+ invulnerable save and, at the end of your Command phase, the bearer regains 1 lost wound.

gunnery-honours-headhunter-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. Once per phase, you can re‑roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll for the bearer.

firestorm-coordinators-headhunter-task-f.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

astartes-tank-ace-aura-headhunter-task-f.raw_text: &x20;ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model only. In your Shooting phase, while a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability

armour-of-contempt-1st-company-task-forc.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-1st-company-task-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-1st-company-task-forc.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

heroes-of-the-chapter-1st-company-task-f.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
heroes-of-the-chapter-1st-company-task-f.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
heroes-of-the-chapter-1st-company-task-f.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

legendary-fortitude-1st-company-task-for.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
legendary-fortitude-1st-company-task-for.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
legendary-fortitude-1st-company-task-for.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

honour-the-chapter-gladius-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
honour-the-chapter-gladius-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

storm-of-fire-gladius-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
storm-of-fire-gladius-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

blitzing-fusillade-stormlance-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
blitzing-fusillade-stormlance-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability as well.

shock-assault-stormlance-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
shock-assault-stormlance-task-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit and melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

ride-hard-ride-fast-stormlance-task-forc.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
ride-hard-ride-fast-stormlance-task-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
ride-hard-ride-fast-stormlance-task-forc.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

strike-from-the-shadows-vanguard-spearhe.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
strike-from-the-shadows-vanguard-spearhe.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

battle-drill-recall-anvil-siege-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
battle-drill-recall-anvil-siege-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If your unit Remained Stationary this turn, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

crucible-of-battle-firestorm-assault-for.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
crucible-of-battle-firestorm-assault-for.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
crucible-of-battle-firestorm-assault-for.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

onslaught-of-fire-firestorm-assault-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
onslaught-of-fire-firestorm-assault-forc.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 12", add 1 to the Hit roll. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

burning-vengeance-firestorm-assault-forc.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
burning-vengeance-firestorm-assault-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
burning-vengeance-firestorm-assault-forc.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

unbowed-conviction-ironstorm-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength.
unbowed-conviction-ironstorm-spearhead.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its characteristics and/or to any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

surgical-strikes-vanguard-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
surgical-strikes-vanguard-spearhead.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

no-threat-too-great-anvil-siege-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
no-threat-too-great-anvil-siege-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

immolation-protocols-firestorm-assault-f.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
immolation-protocols-firestorm-assault-f.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

mercy-is-weakness-ironstorm-spearhead.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
mercy-is-weakness-ironstorm-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
mercy-is-weakness-ironstorm-spearhead.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability, and when making such an attack, if the attacking model is a VEHICLE, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

vengeful-animus-ironstorm-spearhead.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
vengeful-animus-ironstorm-spearhead.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
vengeful-animus-ironstorm-spearhead.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

ancient-fury-ironstorm-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES WALKER model from your army.
ancient-fury-ironstorm-spearhead.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your model’s Move, Toughness, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1 and each time your model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

power-of-the-machine-spirit-ironstorm-sp.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
power-of-the-machine-spirit-ironstorm-sp.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was reduced to Below Half-strength as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
power-of-the-machine-spirit-ironstorm-sp.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

only-in-death-does-duty-end-gladius-task.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
only-in-death-does-duty-end-gladius-task.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
only-in-death-does-duty-end-gladius-task.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

terrifying-proficiency-1st-company-task-.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn and destroyed one or more enemy units this phase.
terrifying-proficiency-1st-company-task-.effect: In your opponent’s next Command phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the unit taking that test is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

duty-and-honour-1st-company-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR, BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD, STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD or VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
duty-and-honour-1st-company-task-force.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

orbital-teleportarium-1st-company-task-f.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
orbital-teleportarium-1st-company-task-f.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit from your army.
orbital-teleportarium-1st-company-task-f.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. It will arrive back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability.
orbital-teleportarium-1st-company-task-f.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

adaptive-strategy-gladius-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
adaptive-strategy-gladius-task-force.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for that unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

squad-tactics-gladius-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
squad-tactics-gladius-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
squad-tactics-gladius-task-force.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.
squad-tactics-gladius-task-force.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

wind-swift-evasion-stormlance-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
wind-swift-evasion-stormlance-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
wind-swift-evasion-stormlance-task-force.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
wind-swift-evasion-stormlance-task-force.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

calculated-feint-vanguard-spearhead.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
calculated-feint-vanguard-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
calculated-feint-vanguard-spearhead.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.
calculated-feint-vanguard-spearhead.restrictions: You cannot select a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

rigid-discipline-anvil-siege-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
rigid-discipline-anvil-siege-force.effect: Your unit can immediately make a Fall Back move of up to 6".
rigid-discipline-anvil-siege-force.restrictions: When making that move, your unit must end that move either wholly within your deployment zone or within range of an objective marker.

not-one-backwards-step-anvil-siege-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army within range of an objective marker.
not-one-backwards-step-anvil-siege-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, double the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.

rapid-embarkation-firestorm-assault-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has no models embarked within it, and one ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT.
rapid-embarkation-firestorm-assault-forc.effect: Your Infantry unit can embark within that TRANSPORT.
rapid-embarkation-firestorm-assault-forc.restrictions: You cannot target an INFANTRY unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, that cannot normally embark within that TRANSPORT, or that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.

hail-of-vengeance-anvil-siege-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
hail-of-vengeance-anvil-siege-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
hail-of-vengeance-anvil-siege-force.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

a-deadly-prize-vanguard-spearhead.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
a-deadly-prize-vanguard-spearhead.effect: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

full-throttle-stormlance-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit (excluding WALKERS) from your army.
full-throttle-stormlance-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, or 9" instead if your unit is Mounted.

suppression-strafing-orbital-assault-for.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
suppression-strafing-orbital-assault-for.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to and within 18" of your unit. That enemy unit takes a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
suppression-strafing-orbital-assault-for.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

dedicated-gunship-orbital-assault-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

blind-screen-orbital-assault-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
blind-screen-orbital-assault-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding TITANIC units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES SMOKE VEHICLE or DROP POD unit within 9" of it.
blind-screen-orbital-assault-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your units have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets one of your units, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

tactical-decapitation-orbital-assault-fo.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
tactical-decapitation-orbital-assault-fo.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
tactical-decapitation-orbital-assault-fo.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

shock-onslaught-orbital-assault-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
shock-onslaught-orbital-assault-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

onward-for-the-emperor-orbital-assault-f.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
onward-for-the-emperor-orbital-assault-f.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was not set up on the battlefield this turn and one friendly TRANSPORT it is able to embark within.
onward-for-the-emperor-orbital-assault-f.effect: If your ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

machine-wrath-armoured-speartip.when: Any phase, just after a HEAVY TRANSPORT unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
machine-wrath-armoured-speartip.target: That HEAVY TRANSPORT unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
machine-wrath-armoured-speartip.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

ceramite-sledgehammer-armoured-speartip.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
ceramite-sledgehammer-armoured-speartip.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features. In addition, if your unit is a HEAVY TRANSPORT, when making this move, your unit can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) and can move within Engagement Range of such models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

advanced-deployment-armoured-speartip.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
advanced-deployment-armoured-speartip.effect: Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move this phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn (unless your TRANSPORT has the Assault Ramp ability), but can otherwise act normally.

purgation-doctrine-armoured-speartip.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.&x20;
purgation-doctrine-armoured-speartip.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll (if your unit disembarked from a HEAVY TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll as well).

codex-discipline-bastion-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
codex-discipline-bastion-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
codex-discipline-bastion-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

shock-bombardment-bastion-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army finished making its attacks.
shock-bombardment-bastion-task-force.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

guided-disruption-bastion-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army has finished making its attacks.
guided-disruption-bastion-task-force.effect: When an enemy unit is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that enemy unit does not have the MONSTER or VEHICLE keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

angels-defiant-bastion-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
angels-defiant-bastion-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
angels-defiant-bastion-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

light-of-vengeance-bastion-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
light-of-vengeance-bastion-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
light-of-vengeance-bastion-task-force.effect: Select the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if the bearer has the BATTLELINE keyword.

heresy-undone-bastion-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
heresy-undone-bastion-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit (excluding BATTLELINE units) from your army.
heresy-undone-bastion-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.

unyielding-might-ceramite-sentinels.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
unyielding-might-ceramite-sentinels.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristics of models in your unit.

stand-to-the-end-ceramite-sentinels.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.&x20;
stand-to-the-end-ceramite-sentinels.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks
stand-to-the-end-ceramite-sentinels.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is an ENTRENCHED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

priority-strike-ceramite-sentinels.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.&x20;
priority-strike-ceramite-sentinels.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
priority-strike-ceramite-sentinels.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

augmented-targeting-ceramite-sentinels.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase
augmented-targeting-ceramite-sentinels.effect: Select either the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If your unit is Entrenched, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities instead.

evasive-repositioning-ceramite-sentinels.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.&x20;
evasive-repositioning-ceramite-sentinels.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
evasive-repositioning-ceramite-sentinels.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit is ENTRENCHED, you can re‑roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

rapid-gunnery-headhunter-task-force.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
rapid-gunnery-headhunter-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

reactive-repositioning-headhunter-task-f.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
reactive-repositioning-headhunter-task-f.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
reactive-repositioning-headhunter-task-f.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6.

target-weak-point-headhunter-task-force.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
target-weak-point-headhunter-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.&x20;
target-weak-point-headhunter-task-force.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Kill Shot Stratagem in the same phase.

kill-shot-headhunter-task-force.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
kill-shot-headhunter-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target unit is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.
kill-shot-headhunter-task-force.restrictions: &x20;A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Target Weak Point Stratagem in the same phase.

machine-vengeance-headhunter-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
machine-vengeance-headhunter-task-force.target: One TANK ACE unit from your army (excluding units containing one or more models with a Wounds characteristic of 16+) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
machine-vengeance-headhunter-task-force.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is visible and an eligible target.

data-link-augury-fulguris-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly SPEEDER unit is selected to shoot.
data-link-augury-fulguris-task-force.effect: Select one enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until your unit has shot.

reactive-evasion-fulguris-task-force.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged SPEEDER unit.
reactive-evasion-fulguris-task-force.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

anti-grav-surge-fulguris-task-force.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
anti-grav-surge-fulguris-task-force.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves.

adaptive-operations-subversion-assets.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit starts an action.
adaptive-operations-subversion-assets.effect: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

cloaked-position-subversion-assets.when: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
cloaked-position-subversion-assets.target: One friendly unengaged PHOBOS/SCOUT SQUAD unit.
cloaked-position-subversion-assets.effect: Your unit has -3" detection range until the end of the turn.

bellicose-weapon-spirits-fulguris-task-f.raw_text: SPEEDER unit only. This unit can re-roll: Damage rolls. Rolls to determine the A of a weapon.

raptorial-cogitator-core-fulguris-task-f.raw_text: SPEEDER unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

temporal-corridor-librarius-conclave.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. A t the end of your opponent's Fight phase, you can place this unit into strategic reserves. If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike.

shroud-field-subversion-assets.raw_text: PHOBOS model only. This model has: Lone Operative. S tealth.

death-in-the-dark-subversion-assets.raw_text: INFANTRY PHOBOS unit only. This unit's attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 to hit rolls.

extremis-level-threat.raw_text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, each time a model from your army with the Oath of Moment ability makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

combat-doctrines.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, you can select one of the Combat Doctrines listed below. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle. DEVASTATOR DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. TACTICAL DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. ASSAULT DOCTRINE This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lightning-assault.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

psychic-disciplines.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, select one of the following Psychic Disciplines. Until the end of the battle round, that Psychic Discipline is active and its effects apply to all ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER units from your army. Biomancy Discipline Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit. Divination Discipline Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Pyromancy Discipline Each time a ranged attack made by a model in this unit targets an enemy unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. Telekinesis Discipline Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Strength characteristic of that attack. Telepathy Discipline Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

shadow-masters.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the Hit roll and the target has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

rapid-drop-deployment.raw_text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select a number of ADEPTUS ASTARTES units (excluding TITANIC units) from your army based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the Deep Strike ability. - Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if it was set up on the battlefield this turn, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If it disembarked from a DROP POD this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 as well.

shield-of-the-imperium.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [HEAVY] ability. If such a weapon already has this ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, if the attacking model’s unit Remained Stationary this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

close-range-eradication.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by ADEPTUS ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

armoured-wrath.raw_text: Once per phase for each ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit in your army, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll made for a model in that unit.

rapid-deployment.raw_text: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

interlocking-tactics.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE units from your army: Are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back. Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES BATTLELINE unit from your army is selected to attack, after resolving those attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit is auspex scanned. Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

adaptive-defence.raw_text: Each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within a terrain feature, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army gain the ENTRENCHED keyword while all of the following are true: That unit is within a terrain feature. That unit was not set up on the battlefield this turn. No model in that unit has moved more than 3” this turn.

target-sighted.raw_text: Each time a TANK ACE unit from your army (see Keywords) Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit. Each time a TANK ACE unit from your army shoots in your Shooting phase, if that unit did not Advance this turn, you can re-roll the Damage roll

skystrike.raw_text: Friendly LAND SPEEDER/STORM SPEEDER HAILSTRIKE/STORM SPEEDER HAMMERSTRIKE/STORM SPEEDER THUNDERSTRIKE units have SPEEDER. In your first Movement phase, friendly SPEEDER units can make an ingress move.

march-of-the-honoured-dead.raw_text: Friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER units: Have +2" M. Have +1 to advance rolls and charge rolls. This detachment has the ARMOURY tag and cannot be taken with another ARMOURY detachment.

interred-expertise-upgrade.raw_text: ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER unit only. This unit's attacks can: Reroll hit rolls of 1. Reroll wound rolls of 1.

auramite-sarcophagus-upgrade.raw_text: ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER unit only. When you target this unit with the Crushing Impact stratagem, that use is -1 CP.

flawless-construction-might-of-the-morit.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER unit.
flawless-construction-might-of-the-morit.effect: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit's T have -1 to wound rolls.

unstoppable-advance-might-of-the-moritoi.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES WALKER unit is selected to move.

skin-crawling-disorientation.raw_text: When a friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit is selected to make an advance move, that advance move does not prevent that unit from being eligible to start an action. Friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA units have the following ability: Ceaseless Vigilance: In your Shooting phase, this unit can select one visible enemy unit within 12". That enemy unit is nulled: While a unit is nulled, that unit has +3" detection range.

encircling-hunter-silent-hunters.raw_text: ANATHEMA PSYKANA model only. When both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy up to three friendly ANATHEMA PSYKANA INFANTRY units. When doing so, you can set those units up in strategic reserves, regardless of how many units are already in strategic reserves.

psyk-out-grenades-upgrade.raw_text: ANATHEMA PSYKANA unit only. This unit has EXPLOSIVES. When you target this unit with the Explosives stratagem, if you select an enemy PSYKER unit, you can re-roll rolls to determine whether that enemy unit suffers a mortal wound.

deathsong-scythes-silent-hunters.when: Fight phase, when a friendly VIGILATORS unit is selected to fight.
deathsong-scythes-silent-hunters.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have [LANCE]. Your unit's melee attacks that target a PSYKER unit have +1 A.

umbral-prosecution-silent-hunters.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly PROSECUTORS unit is selected to shoot.
umbral-prosecution-silent-hunters.effect: Your unit's Boltgun weapons have: [RAPID FIRE 2]. +1 AP.

synchronised-inferno-silent-hunters.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly WITCHSEEKERS unit is selected to shoot.

the-hammer-falls.raw_text: If a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR unit made an ingress move this turn, that unit can reroll charge rolls. This detachment has the LIONS tag and cannot be taken with another LIONS detachment.

mnemo-locked-shrine-cipher-tharanatoi-ha.raw_text: ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR model only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.

efficient-aggression-tharanatoi-hammerbl.raw_text: ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR model only. (Once per turn, per army) In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if this unit lost a wound as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".

hardened-resolve-tharanatoi-hammerblow.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR unit.

unleash-the-lions-hammerblow.target: One friendly ALLARUS CUSTODIANS/AQUILON CUSTODIANS unit that is on the battlefield.
unleash-the-lions-hammerblow.effect: Your unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a starting strength of 1.

electroexorcist-saturation-tharanatoi-ha.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS CUSTODES TERMINATOR unit is selected to shoot.
electroexorcist-saturation-tharanatoi-ha.effect: Your unit's Ballistus Grenade Launcher weapons have D3+3 A.

unleash-the-lions-lions-of-the-emperor.target: One Allarus Custodians or Aquilon Custodians unit from your army that is on the battlefield.
unleash-the-lions-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: That unit is split into separate units, each containing one model. These new units each have a Starting Strength of 1.

against-all-odds.raw_text: Each time a model in an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding Vehicles) makes an attack, if there are no other friendly units within 6" of that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

superior-creation-lions-of-the-emperor.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes Infantry model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

praesidius-lions-of-the-emperor.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has the Lone Operative and Stealth abilities.

fierce-conqueror-lions-of-the-emperor.raw_text: Shield-Captain model only. At the start of the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer for every 5 enemy models within 6" of the bearer (rounding down).

admonimortis-lions-of-the-emperor.raw_text: Shield-Captain model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 3, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

gilded-champion-lions-of-the-emperor.when: Any phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes Character model from your army has used an ability on its datasheet that states it can only be used 'once per battle'.
gilded-champion-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: Your model can use that 'once per battle' ability one additional time during the battle (but not in the same phase).
gilded-champion-lions-of-the-emperor.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem on the same Adeptus Custodes Character model more than once per battle.

defiant-to-the-last-lions-of-the-emperor.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
defiant-to-the-last-lions-of-the-emperor.target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
defiant-to-the-last-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that model has the Character keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; the destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is treated as having 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

peerless-warrior-lions-of-the-emperor.target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
peerless-warrior-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

manoeuvre-and-fire-lions-of-the-emperor.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army Falls Back.
manoeuvre-and-fire-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

swift-as-the-eagle-lions-of-the-emperor.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
swift-as-the-eagle-lions-of-the-emperor.target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army (excluding VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
swift-as-the-eagle-lions-of-the-emperor.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

auric-armour.raw_text: While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is at Starting Strength, unless that unit is an Aircraft or it is Battleshocked, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit. While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is below Starting Strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, reroll a Hit roll of 1. While an Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army is Below Half-strength, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, reroll a Hit roll of 1 and reroll a Wound roll of 1.

moritoi-ancients.raw_text: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in Adeptus Custodes Walker units from your army and add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for such units. KEYWORDS: In the Muster Armies step, you can select up to 2 Adeptus Custodes Walker models from your army. The selected units gain the Character keyword.

adamantine-talisman-solar-spearhead.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes model only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

augury-uplink-solar-spearhead.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

honoured-fallen.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes Vehicle model only (Aura). While a friendly Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, reroll a Hit roll of 1.

veteran-of-the-kataphraktoi-solar-spearh.raw_text: Adeptus Custodes Infantry or Adeptus Custodes Mounted model only. In your Command phase, select one Adeptus Custodes Vehicle or Adeptus Custodes Mounted unit within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

flawless-construction-solar-spearhead.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
flawless-construction-solar-spearhead.target: One Adeptus Custodes Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
flawless-construction-solar-spearhead.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

emperors-vengeance-solar-spearhead.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
emperors-vengeance-solar-spearhead.target: One Adeptus Custodes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
emperors-vengeance-solar-spearhead.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit has the Walker keyword. On a 4+, do not remove it from play; The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks (when doing so, it is assumed to have 1 wound remaining), and is then removed from play.

wrathful-advance-solar-spearhead.when: Fight phase, just before an Adeptus Custodes unit from your army Piles In.
