furious-barrage.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that contains five or more models, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

reinforced-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

flak-battery.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can Fly, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

earthshaker-rounds.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its earthshaker cannon scored a hit against an enemy Infantry unit, until the end of your opponent's next turn, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

desert-riders.raw_text: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it. In addition, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

outflank.raw_text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

mobile-hunter-killer.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

auspex-surveyor.raw_text: Each time this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

tracking-target.raw_text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, its Colossus siege mortar has the [ANTI-MONSTER 5+] and [ANTI-VEHICLE 5+] abilities while resolving those attacks.

battlefield-control.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if it is within range of an objective marker you control, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

armoured-aggressor.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

rugged-reliability.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

battlefield-dominance.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

armoured-defender.raw_text: Each time you target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ while resolving that Stratagem.

explosive-death.raw_text: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play — it can, after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, shoot with its inferno gun as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

bomb-drop.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

siege-bombardment.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

targeting-coordinates.raw_text: While this model is being affected by an Order, each time it makes an attack with its Praetor launcher, it does not suffer the penalty to the Hit roll for attacking a unit that is not visible to it.

close-range-devastation.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its Stormblade plasma blastgun that targets a unit within half range, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

support-vehicle.raw_text: In your Command phase, select one friendly Astra Militarum Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that Vehicle model makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. The same Vehicle model cannot be selected for both this ability and the Regimental Enginseer's Omnissiah's Blessing ability in the same turn, and each model can only be selected for this ability once per Command phase.

power-overload.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Damage roll.

agile-dogfighter.raw_text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

gunship-barrage.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

ancient-conquest.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within your opponent's deployment zone, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

a-hearty-pick-me-up.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed models to that unit.

well-stocked-supplies.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in that unit by 1.

powerlifter-charge.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

armoured-frontis.raw_text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

summary-execution.raw_text: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Infantry or Astra Militarum Mounted unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. If you do, one model in that unit is destroyed, and that unit is then no longer Battle-shocked.

political-overwatch.raw_text: While another Officer model is in the same unit as this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

anti-armour-gunship.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack made by this model is allocated to a Monster or Vehicle model, re-roll a Damage roll of 1.

subterranean-assault.raw_text: Each time you set up this model on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, you can select one friendly Astra Militarum Infantry unit in Strategic Reserves. If you do, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 9" of this model and more than 8" away from all enemy units.

heavy-bombs.raw_text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is a Monster or Vehicle: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

inferno-bombs.raw_text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll nine D6, adding 1 to each result if that unit is not a Monster or Vehicle: for each 5+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

daring-recon.raw_text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ASTRA MILITARUM model makes an attack that targets that unit, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1.

senior-officer.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

get-back-in-the-fight.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

orders.raw_text: This OFFICER can issue up to 2 Orders to REGIMENT units.

ogryn-bodyguard.raw_text: While one or more OFFICER models are in the same unit as this model, those OFFICER models have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

thunderous-head-butt.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

loyal-protector.raw_text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this model must join one COMMAND SQUAD unit from your army (a COMMAND SQUAD cannot have more than one LOYAL PROTECTOR model joined to it). This model then counts as part of that COMMAND SQUAD for the rest of the battle, and its Starting Strength is increased accordingly. If it is not possible to join this model to a COMMAND SQUAD, it does not take part in the battle and counts as having been destroyed.

While this model is joined to a unit, it can embark within any TRANSPORT that unit can embark within, and takes up the space of 3 models.

This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD.

shock-troops.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

vox-caster.raw_text: Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if there are one or more friendly OFFICER models within 6": on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

tempestor-prime.raw_text: While this unit contains a Tempestor Prime, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

command-rod.raw_text: While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

regimental-standard.raw_text: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

master-vox.raw_text: Each time the OFFICER in the bearer’s unit issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 24" away.

medi-pack.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Tempestus Scions models to this unit.

the-lord-solar.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

the-collegiate-astrolex.raw_text: After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ASTRA MILITARUM units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

final-duty.raw_text: While the Fire Coordinator model is on the battlefield, each time a Heavy Weapons Gunner model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can shoot after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

embarking.raw_text: While embarked within a TRANSPORT, each Heavy Weapons Gunner model takes up the space of 2 models, and each weapon equipped by these models is considered to be 2 models’ weapons for the purposes of the Firing Deck ability.

demolition-gear.raw_text: The bearer’s unit has the GRENADES keyword.

ratling-battlemutt.raw_text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

concussive-wave.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s Stormsword siege cannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave suffers D3 mortal wounds.

transport-support.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re‐roll the Hit roll.

compact.raw_text: This model can embark within an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT model as if it were an INFANTRY model. If it does, it takes up the space of 7 models.

vox-net.raw_text: Each time this model issues an Order, it can issue it to an eligible unit up to 12" away.

called-shots.raw_text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, you can re-roll one Wound roll and you can re-roll one Damage roll when resolving its attacks.

withering-hail.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its exterminator autocannon. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ASTRA MILITARUM unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

wall-of-muscle.raw_text: Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

slabshield.raw_text: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.

brute-shield.raw_text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

malign-wardings-psychic.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

psychic-barrier-psychic.raw_text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, models in this Psyker’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

covering-fire.raw_text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

bring-it-down.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1 and re‐roll a Wound roll of 1.

close-quarters-warfare.raw_text: This model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while enemy units are within Engagement Range of it.

emplacement-platform.raw_text: Friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the platform section of this FORTIFICATION.

defence-line.raw_text: While an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model has the Benefit of Cover as a result of this terrain feature (see above), that model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

deployment.raw_text: When this unit is first set up on the battlefield, its models do not have to be set up in Unit Coherency. Instead, each model must be set up wholly within 12" of one other model from its unit. From that point on, each model in this unit is treated as a separate unit.

mobile-hunter-killers.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

deathstrike-missile.raw_text:
In your Shooting phase, each time this model is selected to shoot, if it has not shot with its Deathstrike missile this battle, you can do one of the following in addition to resolving this model’s ranged attacks:

■ Designate Target: If this model does not have a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, place a unique Deathstrike Target marker for this model anywhere on the battlefield.

■ Adjust Target: If this model has a Deathstrike Target marker on the battlefield, move that marker to anywhere else on the battlefield.

screening-line.raw_text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

remorseless-barrage.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with an Indirect Fire weapon scored a hit against an enemy unit, that unit must take a Battle‐shock test (if an INFANTRY unit is hit by one or more attacks made by a multiple rocket launcher, they must subtract 1 from their Battle‐shock test when doing so).

gung-ho-executioners.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack with its executioner plasma cannon that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll.

storm-troopers.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Wound roll instead.

warrior-elite.raw_text: Once per battle round, at the start of any phase, you can select one Order to affect this unit until the start of your next Command phase, in addition to any other Orders issued to this unit by an OFFICER model this battle round.

melta-mine.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one enemy unit within 3" of the bearer and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a VEHICLE unit.

cadia-stands.raw_text: While this unit contains an OFFICER, each time a ranged attack targets this unit, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

gung-ho-command.raw_text: While this unit contains an OFFICER, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

close-range-titan-killer.raw_text: Each time this model’s magma cannon targets an enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that target is always considered to be within half range of that weapon.

ablative-plating-hammer-of-the-emperor.raw_text: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

war-hymns.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

holy-piety.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, unless this model’s unit is Battle-shocked, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

grim-demeanour.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

death-korps-medi-pack.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Death Korps Troopers to this unit (if this unit contains two models equipped with a Death Korps medi‐pack, return up to D3+1 destroyed Death Korps Troopers to this unit instead).

armour-obliteration.raw_text: Each time an attack made with this model’s quake cannon destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

horsemasters.raw_text: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

flush-them-out.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

mow-down-the-enemy.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack with its punisher gatling cannon that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

grim-determination.raw_text: While this unit contains an OFFICER, you can target this unit with Stratagems even while it is Battle-shocked and Orders issued to this unit do not cease to affect this unit if it becomes Battle-shocked.

alchemyk-counteragents.raw_text: The bearer’s unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

servo-scribes.raw_text: Once per battle, when issuing an Order, the Lord Commissar can issue one additional Order.

one-man-army.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly REGIMENT unit within 3" of this model, after that enemy unit has shot, this model can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

like-fighting-a-shadow.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move. If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

loner.raw_text: This model cannot be selected as your WARLORD.

point-blank-barrage.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

tough-to-kill.raw_text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D3 wounds remaining.

leading-the-charge.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

tremor-quake.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s tremor cannon, the target unit and every other enemy INFANTRY unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

jungle-fighters.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move or was charged this turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

death-befitting-an-officer.raw_text: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play – it can, after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, shoot as if it were your Shooting phase and as if it had its full wounds remaining. This model is then removed from play.

airborne-insertion.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it.

lord-castellan.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can be affected by up to two different Orders at the same time.

tactical-genius.raw_text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly REGIMENT unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

tank-killer.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its vanquisher battle cannon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

remote-mine.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 9" of and visible to the bearer and roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds, or 2D3 mortal wounds instead if it is a VEHICLE or FORTIFICATIONS unit.

urban-warfare.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, if this model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

artillery-team.raw_text: Designer’s Note: Place three Crew tokens next to this model when it is first set up, removing one each time this model loses a wound (the Heavy Quad Launcher Team model itself is considered to represent its final wound).

primed-and-ready.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability as the target of the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, provided that model has not already been the target of that Stratagem this phase.

tanith-camo-cloaks.raw_text: Models in this unit have the Benefit of Cover.

covert-stealth-team.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

titan-killer-steel-hammer.raw_text: Astra Militarum Titanic Character model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can reroll the Damage roll.

grand-strategist-armoured-infantry.raw_text: OFFICER model only. In your Command phase, the bearer can issue one additional Order.

death-mask-of-ollanius-combined-arms.raw_text: OFFICER model only. While the bearer’s unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit, instead of changing it to 0.

drill-commander-combined-arms.raw_text: OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, if that unit Remained Stationary this turn, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

reactive-command-combined-arms.raw_text: OFFICER model only. Each time an enemy unit is set up within 9" of the bearer’s unit, the bearer can issue one Order. This is not counted towards the number of Orders the bearer can issue in a battle round.

eager-advance-siege-regiment.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a REGIMENT unit, that unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

flash-grenades-siege-regiment.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

legacy-sidearm-siege-regiment.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. Add 2 to the Attacks characteristics of the bearer’s Pistols.

stalwarts-honours-siege-regiment.raw_text: OFFICER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, when that unit is issued an Order, it is also affected by the Take Cover! Order.

bold-leadership-mechanised-assault.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase, and the bearer’s unit (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

sacred-unguents-mechanised-assault.raw_text: ASTRA MILITARUM TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one TRANSPORT from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT and TITANIC units) within 3" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that TRANSPORT makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

smoke-grenades-mechanised-assault.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. The bearer’s unit has the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability while the bearer’s unit is wholly within 3" of one or more friendly TRANSPORT models.

vanguard-honours-mechanised-assault.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. The bearer’s unit can disembark from a TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. If it does, it counts as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

calm-under-fire-hammer-of-the-emperor.raw_text: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Once per turn, after the bearer issues an Order to a SQUADRON unit from your army, it can issue the same Order to another SQUADRON unit from your army.

indomitable-steed-hammer-of-the-emperor.raw_text: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

regimental-banner-hammer-of-the-emperor.raw_text: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Add 3 to the bearer’s Objective Control characteristic.

veteran-crew-hammer-of-the-emperor.raw_text: VEHICLE OFFICER model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

guerrilla-honours-recon-element.raw_text: INFANTRY OFFICER model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer is on the battlefield, select up to three other ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

scare-gas-grenades-recon-element.raw_text: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one enemy unit within 8" of the bearer’s unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units); that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

survival-gear-recon-element.raw_text: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability.

tripwires-recon-element.raw_text: ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY model only. Each time an enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit ends a Normal, Advance, Charge or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

crack-shots-recon-element.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
crack-shots-recon-element.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

scouting-outriders-recon-element.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED or ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER unit from your army that is wholly within 10" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
scouting-outriders-recon-element.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

blazing-advance-hammer-of-the-emperor.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances.
blazing-advance-hammer-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced.

furious-cannonade-hammer-of-the-emperor.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
furious-cannonade-hammer-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within 12", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

coordinated-action-combined-arms.target: One REGIMENT unit from your army and one SQUADRON unit from your army within 6" of and visible to that REGIMENT unit.
coordinated-action-combined-arms.effect: Until the end of the phase, Orders affecting one of your units affect the other, and vice versa.

fields-of-fire-combined-arms.target: One REGIMENT unit and one SQUADRON unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
fields-of-fire-combined-arms.effect: Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the phase, each time your selected REGIMENT and SQUADRON units make an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stalwart-protector-combined-arms.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stalwart-protector-combined-arms.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
stalwart-protector-combined-arms.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is allocated to an INFANTRY model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of your VEHICLE, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

clear-and-secure-mechanised-assault.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
clear-and-secure-mechanised-assault.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

swift-interception-mechanised-assault.when: Your opponent’s movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
swift-interception-mechanised-assault.target: One TRANSPORT unit from your army (excluding AIRCRAFT and TITANIC units) that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.
swift-interception-mechanised-assault.effect: Your TRANSPORT can make a Normal move of up to 6".

hasty-extraction-mechanised-assault.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, after an enemy unit has selected targets for its charge but before it makes a Charge move.&x20;
hasty-extraction-mechanised-assault.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
hasty-extraction-mechanised-assault.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT.

callous-sacrifice-siege-regiment.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
callous-sacrifice-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, one model from your unit is destroyed after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

trench-fighters-siege-regiment.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
trench-fighters-siege-regiment.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
trench-fighters-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if it is a REGIMENT model. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

final-hour-hammer-of-the-emperor.target: One SQUADRON unit from your army that is Below Half-strength (excluding OFFICER units).
final-hour-hammer-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the battle round, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit (excluding [ONE SHOT] weapons) have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and to the Hit roll.

inspired-command-combined-arms.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER unit from your army.
inspired-command-combined-arms.effect: Your OFFICER can issue one Order as if it were your Command phase.

draw-them-out-recon-element.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
draw-them-out-recon-element.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit, and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
draw-them-out-recon-element.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

courageous-diversion-recon-element.when: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
courageous-diversion-recon-element.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit from your army.
courageous-diversion-recon-element.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and each time an enemy model makes an attack, if your unit is the closest eligible target, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

tactical-withdrawal-hammer-of-the-empero.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SQUADRON unit from your army Falls Back.
tactical-withdrawal-hammer-of-the-empero.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

crash-through-hammer-of-the-emperor.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
crash-through-hammer-of-the-emperor.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
crash-through-hammer-of-the-emperor.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

rapid-dispersal-mechanised-assault.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this phase.
rapid-dispersal-mechanised-assault.effect: Your INFANTRY unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

move-out-mechanised-assault.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
move-out-mechanised-assault.effect: Provided your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and every model in your unit is within 3" of an ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT from your army, it can embark within that TRANSPORT.

furious-fusillade-siege-regiment.target: One PLATOON unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
furious-fusillade-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit while targeting an enemy unit within half range.

reinforcements-combined-arms.target: One INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
reinforcements-combined-arms.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with all of its wounds remaining.
reinforcements-combined-arms.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

flexible-command-combined-arms.target: Any number of ASTRA MILITARUM OFFICER units from your army.
flexible-command-combined-arms.effect: Until the end of the phase, your OFFICERS can issue Orders to REGIMENT units and SQUADRON units.

over-the-top-siege-regiment.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER model from your army.
over-the-top-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, when your model issues the Move! Move! Move! Order, it can issue that Order to any number of eligible friendly INFANTRY REGIMENT units, regardless of range to your model.

scramble-field-recon-element.when: Start of your opponent’s Reinforcements step.
scramble-field-recon-element.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY unit from your army.
scramble-field-recon-element.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of your unit.

tanglefoot-grenades-recon-element.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
tanglefoot-grenades-recon-element.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM GRENADES unit from your army.
tanglefoot-grenades-recon-element.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

vox-relay-mechanised-assault.target: One INFANTRY OFFICER unit from your army embarked within a TRANSPORT. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it is embarked within a TRANSPORT.
vox-relay-mechanised-assault.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can issue Orders even though it is not on the battlefield, and it can issue Orders to ASTRA MILITARUM TRANSPORT units from your army (excluding TITANIC units) regardless of the distance to and from your unit’s TRANSPORT.

minefield-siege-regiment.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
minefield-siege-regiment.target: One PLATOON unit from your army.
minefield-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit ends a Charge move within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6 for each model in that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

flare-burst-siege-regiment.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
flare-burst-siege-regiment.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit within 12", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

masters-of-camouflage.raw_text: ASTRA MILITARUM WALKER and REGIMENT models from your army have the Benefit of Cover. While such a model has the Benefit of Cover for any other reason (e.g. because it is wholly within a RUIN), improve the Save characteristic of that model by 1 (to a maximum of 3+).

iron-tread.raw_text: Each time a SQUADRON unit from your army Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it; until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit, and when making that Advance move, that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of enemy models.

born-soldiers.raw_text: Each time a model in a REGIMENT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Each time a model in a SQUADRON unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets a visible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

armoured-fist.raw_text: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM model from your army makes a ranged attack in a turn in which it disembarked from a TRANSPORT, add 1 to the Wound roll.

artillery-support.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, select one of the following types of artillery support. Creeping Barrage: Roll one D6 for each enemy unit that is more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield: On a 5+, until the end of the battle round, that unit is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2” from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it. The maximum number of units that can be shaken by this rule in each battle round depends on the battle size, as shown below. Incendiary Bombardment: Select a number of enemy units more than 12" from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are scattered. While a unit is scattered, it cannot have the Benefit of Cover. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. Smoke Shells: Select a number of units from your army. Until the end of the battle round, those units have the Stealth ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. -

incendiary-animus-companions-of-vehemenc.raw_text: CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

oathbound-examplar-companions-of-vehemen.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Add 1 to Advance rolls made for the bearer’s unit. If the mission pack you are playing features Actions, the bearer’s unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced.

merciless-denunciation-companions-of-veh.raw_text: CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

zealous-vanguard-companions-of-vehemence.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

imperialis-of-the-eternal-crusade-vindic.raw_text: ANCIENT model only. Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

consecrating-aura-vindication-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

orb-of-the-emperors-aegis-vindication-ta.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

warden-of-honour-vindication-task-force.raw_text: CRUSADE ANCIENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time you roll one D6 for the bearer’s Vengeful Exhortation ability, add 1 to the result.

paragon-of-fury-godhammer-assault-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time a melee attack made by the bearer is allocated to an enemy model, if the bearer disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

battle-psalm-precentor-godhammer-assault.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer’s unit declares a charge, if an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock test as a result of the Shock and Awe Detachment rule, subtract 1 from that Battle-shock test.

augury-servo-host-godhammer-assault-forc.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. Until the end of the phase, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

herald-of-sacred-slaughter-godhammer-ass.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

benediction-of-fury-wrathful-procession.raw_text: CHAPLAIN model only. This model's melee attacks have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

devout-push-companions-of-vehemence.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
devout-push-companions-of-vehemence.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".
devout-push-companions-of-vehemence.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted with this and the Hearts Hardened to Duty Stratagem in the same phase unless it has the CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR keywords.

for-the-emperors-honour-companions-of-ve.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
for-the-emperors-honour-companions-of-ve.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

pious-enmity-companions-of-vehemence.target: One CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
pious-enmity-companions-of-vehemence.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that target is a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

litanies-of-purgation-vindication-task-f.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
litanies-of-purgation-vindication-task-f.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers or the target unit is within range of one or more objective markers, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

spoor-of-the-unholy-vindication-task-for.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
spoor-of-the-unholy-vindication-task-for.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
spoor-of-the-unholy-vindication-task-for.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll.

refusal-to-yield-vindication-task-force.when: Any phase, just after an ANCIENT model from your army is destroyed.
refusal-to-yield-vindication-task-force.target: That ANCIENT model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
refusal-to-yield-vindication-task-force.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.
refusal-to-yield-vindication-task-force.restrictions: You cannot target the same model with this Stratagem more than once per battle.

hearts-hardened-to-duty-companions-of-ve.when: Fight phase, just before an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Consolidates.
hearts-hardened-to-duty-companions-of-ve.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model (or the closest enemy unit if the Suffer Not the Unclean to Live Vow is active for it).

heresy-begets-retribution-companions-of-.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
heresy-begets-retribution-companions-of-.target: One CHAPLAIN or JUDICIAR unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
heresy-begets-retribution-companions-of-.effect: Your unit can make a Retribution move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

dread-crusaders-companions-of-vehemence.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
dread-crusaders-companions-of-vehemence.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as one of the targets of that charge.
dread-crusaders-companions-of-vehemence.effect: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

reclaim-our-honour-vindication-task-forc.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys an ANCIENT model from your army that has not been targeted with the Refusal to Yield Stratagem this phase
reclaim-our-honour-vindication-task-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army visible to that enemy unit
reclaim-our-honour-vindication-task-forc.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an ADEPTUS ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.
reclaim-our-honour-vindication-task-forc.restrictions: You cannot target that ANCIENT model with the Refusal to Yield Stratagem this phase.

recitation-of-the-revered-vindication-ta.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
recitation-of-the-revered-vindication-ta.target: One ANCIENT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
recitation-of-the-revered-vindication-ta.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

perfervid-intervention-vindication-task-.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
perfervid-intervention-vindication-task-.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
perfervid-intervention-vindication-task-.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.
perfervid-intervention-vindication-task-.restrictions: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn

condemnatory-info-screed-godhammer-assau.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
condemnatory-info-screed-godhammer-assau.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. lf that TRANSPORT has the LAND RAIDER keyword, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

blessed-hull-godhammer-assault-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
blessed-hull-godhammer-assault-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
blessed-hull-godhammer-assault-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

a-ceaseless-cause-godhammer-assault-forc.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
a-ceaseless-cause-godhammer-assault-forc.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". It cannot embark within a TRANSPORT at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.

uncompromising-egress-godhammer-assault-.target: One LAND RAIDER model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
uncompromising-egress-godhammer-assault-.effect: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit embarked within your LAND RAIDER can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your LAND RAIDER and can be set up within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

gauntlet-of-the-god-emperor-godhammer-as.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
gauntlet-of-the-god-emperor-godhammer-as.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your model makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

focused-hatred-godhammer-assault-force.when: Your Charge phase, just after you make a Charge roll for an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
focused-hatred-godhammer-assault-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Charge move, models in your unit can move through models (when doing so, its models can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but they can only end that move within Engagement Range of enemy models if those enemy models belong to a unit that your unit declared a charge against this turn).

castigate-the-demagogues-wrathful-proces.when: Fight phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit is selected to fight.

guerrilla-tactics-vanguard-spearhead.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
guerrilla-tactics-vanguard-spearhead.target: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
guerrilla-tactics-vanguard-spearhead.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
guerrilla-tactics-vanguard-spearhead.restrictions: Each unit selected for this Stratagem must be more than 3" away from all enemy models.

slayers-of-abominations-marshals-househo.when: Fight phase, when a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit is selected to fight.
slayers-of-abominations-marshals-househo.effect: Your unit's melee attacks that target a MONSTER/VEHICLE unit have +2 S.

blade-of-detestation-marshals-household.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit ends a charge move.
blade-of-detestation-marshals-household.effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit engaged with that enemy unit: For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

unsparing-execution-marshals-household.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fallback move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit.
unsparing-execution-marshals-household.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fallback move, that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode, with 1 to those hazard rolls if that enemy unit is battleshocked.

fuelled-by-faith-wrathful-procession.when: Any phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit suffers a mortal wound.
fuelled-by-faith-wrathful-procession.effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.

rite-of-perfervid-wrath-wrathful-process.when: Fight phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit is selected to fight.
rite-of-perfervid-wrath-wrathful-process.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have +1 S.

fervent-exemplars-marshals-household.raw_text: Paragons of their crusade's inexorable wrath, these Sword Brethren have earned a reputation for carving a path to victory through their foes, unable to rest while one enemy yet lives. SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit only. This unit has +1 to charge rolls.

inheritors-of-sigismund-marshals-househo.raw_text: SWORD BRETHREN SQUAD unit only. This unit has Fights First.

guiding-omens-the-living-miracle.raw_text: EMPEROR'S CHAMPION model only. At the start of the first battle round, you can select up to three of the following abilities. This model has those abilities until the end of the battle: Instrument of the GodEmperor (Once per battle, per army): In the Fight phase, when this unit is selected to fight, if this unit is engaged with an enemy CHARACTER unit, you can use this ability. If you do, this model's melee attacks have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]. Foreseen Paths of the Unholy: This unit has 3" detection range. Vision of Momentous Brutality: This model's melee attacks have +2 A. Augury of Retribution: Melee attacks that target this unit have [HAZARDOUS]. O men of Sacred Intervention: When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is 1 CP. H arbinger of Judgement: When an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) engaged with this model is selected to make a fallback move, roll one D6: On a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

adaptable-executioner-wrathful-processio.raw_text: EXECRATOR model only. When this unit is selected to fight, this model's melee attacks have: [ CLEAVE 1]. O r: [PRECISION].

sanguinius-grace-the-lost-brethren.raw_text: DEATH COMPANY model only. Once per battle, at the end of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of three or more enemy models, the bearer can fight one additional time.

blood-shard-the-lost-brethren.raw_text: DEATH COMPANY model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

to-slay-the-warmaster-the-lost-brethren.raw_text: DEATH COMPANY model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, if the bearer is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy CHARACTER units, you can select one of those CHARACTER units and roll six D6: for each 4+, one CHARACTER model in that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

vengeful-onslaught-the-lost-brethren.raw_text: DEATH COMPANY model only. If the bearer is destroyed, until the end of your next turn, each time a friendly DEATH COMPANY model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

artisan-of-war-the-angelic-host.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1, and the bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+.

visage-of-death-the-angelic-host.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. In the Battle‐shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, each enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle‐shock test.

archangels-shard-the-angelic-host.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [ANTI-CHAOS 5+] and [LANCE] abilities.

gleaming-pinions-the-angelic-host.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer, if this bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

prescient-flash-angelic-inheritors.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

troubling-visions-angelic-inheritors.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, in your Command phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. When it does, until the start of your next Command phase, all Angelic Legacy abilities (see left) are active for the bearer's unit, instead of only two of them.

blazing-icon-angelic-inheritors.raw_text: Their Appointed Hour: You can reroll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit. Adeptus Astartes Infantry model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

ordained-sacrifice-angelic-inheritors.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. 5

carmine-reliquary-rage-cursed-onslaught.raw_text: Chaplain model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability. Each time you take a Battle-shock test for an Adeptus Astartes unit within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll the result..

master-of-the-red-thirst-rage-cursed-ons.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer's unit have the Fights First ability.

sanguinary-tear-aura-rage-cursed-onslaug.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. While a friendly Death Company unit is within 6" of the bearer, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

angels-fang-rage-cursed-onslaught.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack that targets a Character, Monster or Vehicle unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability. 7

speed-of-the-primarch-liberator-assault-.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

rage-fuelled-warrior-liberator-assault-g.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 3] ability.

icon-of-the-angel-liberator-assault-grou.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests as if their unit was Battle‐shocked. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle‐shocked by other means, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

gift-of-foresight-liberator-assault-grou.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Once per battle round, just after making a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw for the bearer, you can treat the result as an unmodified roll of 6 instead.

armour-of-contempt-the-lost-brethren.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-the-lost-brethren.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
armour-of-contempt-the-lost-brethren.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

furious-onslaught-the-lost-brethren.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army, just before that unit Piles‐in.
furious-onslaught-the-lost-brethren.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‐in move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, or if it is below Starting Strength, it can move up to 6" instead. In either case, it can only do so provided your unit ends that Pile‐in move in Unit Coherency and within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

lost-to-rage-the-lost-brethren.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that is below Starting Strength and has not been selected to fight this phase.
lost-to-rage-the-lost-brethren.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks, Stength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 and, unless your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

angels-sacrifice-the-angelic-host.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army.
angels-sacrifice-the-angelic-host.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects its targets, it must select your unit as the target of all of its attacks.

martial-examplars-the-angelic-host.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
martial-examplars-the-angelic-host.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

glorious-sacrifice-the-lost-brethren.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of an objective marker you controlled. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
glorious-sacrifice-the-lost-brethren.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

final-retribution-the-lost-brethren.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
final-retribution-the-lost-brethren.target: One DEATH COMPANY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
final-retribution-the-lost-brethren.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models; on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

unbridled-ardour-the-angelic-host.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
unbridled-ardour-the-angelic-host.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re‐roll the Hit roll and you can re‐roll the Wound roll.

descent-of-angels-the-angelic-host.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
descent-of-angels-the-angelic-host.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
descent-of-angels-the-angelic-host.restrictions: A unit targeted by this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

death-from-the-skies-the-angelic-host.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army Advances or Falls Back.
death-from-the-skies-the-angelic-host.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit.
death-from-the-skies-the-angelic-host.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

wrathful-rampage-the-lost-brethren.when: Your Movement phase, just after a DEATH COMPANY unit from your army Advances.
wrathful-rampage-the-lost-brethren.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit is within 12" of one or more friendly CHAPLAIN models, or it is below its Starting Strength, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

strike-now-for-glory-angelic-inheritors.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
strike-now-for-glory-angelic-inheritors.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

focused-fury-angelic-inheritors.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
focused-fury-angelic-inheritors.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a Character unit, until the end of the phase, those weapons have the [LANCE] ability as well.

in-the-shadow-of-great-wings-angelic-inh.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
in-the-shadow-of-great-wings-angelic-inh.target: One Adeptus Astartes Character unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
in-the-shadow-of-great-wings-angelic-inh.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

unto-the-burning-skies-angelic-inheritor.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
unto-the-burning-skies-angelic-inheritor.target: One Adeptus Astartes Jump Pack unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, unless it is The Sanguinor.
unto-the-burning-skies-angelic-inheritor.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. 6

instant-of-grace-angelic-inheritors.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
instant-of-grace-angelic-inheritors.effect: Select one nonCharacter model in your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the Character keyword. Designer's Note: While in effect, your model's unit is therefore a Character unit, meaning it can interact with the Legacy of the Angel Detachment rule, in addition to other rules that interact with Character units.

a-grim-warning-rage-cursed-onslaught.target: One Blood Angels unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
a-grim-warning-rage-cursed-onslaught.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

limb-from-limb-rage-cursed-onslaught.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
limb-from-limb-rage-cursed-onslaught.effect: Select either the Strength or Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the selected characteristic. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battleshocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

deathless-duty-rage-cursed-onslaught.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
deathless-duty-rage-cursed-onslaught.target: One Death Company unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
deathless-duty-rage-cursed-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

insensate-rampage-rage-cursed-onslaught.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
insensate-rampage-rage-cursed-onslaught.target: One Death Company unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
insensate-rampage-rage-cursed-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

red-wrath-rage-cursed-onslaught.when: Your Movement phase, just after an Adeptus Astartes unit from your army Advances.
red-wrath-rage-cursed-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle-shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it), and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. 8

savage-echoes-liberator-assault-group.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was just charged by an enemy unit.
savage-echoes-liberator-assault-group.effect: Select either the Strength or Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the selected characteristic. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Strength and Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

red-rampage-liberator-assault-group.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
red-rampage-liberator-assault-group.effect: Select either the [LANCE] or [LETHAL HITS] abilities. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, then it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

angelic-grace-liberator-assault-group.when: Any phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army has a mortal wound allocated to it.
angelic-grace-liberator-assault-group.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

aggressive-onslaught-liberator-assault-g.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army has Advanced.
aggressive-onslaught-liberator-assault-g.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge, even though it Advanced. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to both shoot and declare a charge, even though it Advanced.

relentless-assault-liberator-assault-gro.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
relentless-assault-liberator-assault-gro.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to either shoot or declare a charge even though it Fell Back. You can instead choose for your unit to give in to the Red Thirst; if it does, it becomes Battle‐shocked (but the effects of this Stratagem still apply to it) and until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to both shoot and declare a charge, even though it Fell Back.

martial-paragon-legacy-of-grace.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit is selected to attack.
martial-paragon-legacy-of-grace.effect: Your unit's attacks have: [LETHAL HITS]. OR: [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

aura-of-the-angels-grace-legacy-of-grace.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit.

judgement-of-the-golden-host-encarmine-s.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit from your army ends a charge move.
judgement-of-the-golden-host-encarmine-s.effect: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll one D6 for each model in your unit engaged with that enemy unit: For each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

inexorable-valour-encarmine-speartip.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit ends a fallback move, if that SANGUINARY GUARD unit is unengaged.
inexorable-valour-encarmine-speartip.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

blinding-blurs-of-vengeance-encarmine-sp.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly SANGUINARY GUARD unit.
blinding-blurs-of-vengeance-encarmine-sp.effect: Your unit has Stealth. UNIQUE: DOOMED

death-begets-vengeance-wrath-of-the-doom.when: Any phase, when a friendly DEATH COMPANY unit is destroyed by an enemy unit.
death-begets-vengeance-wrath-of-the-doom.effect: That enemy unit is hated until the end of the battle: W hile a unit is hated, friendly DEATH COMPANY units' attacks that target that unit have +1 to wound rolls.

no-barrier-to-retribution-wrath-of-the-d.when: Your Movement or your Charge phase, when a friendly DEATH COMPANY DREADNOUGHT unit is selected to make a normal/advance/ charge move.

blood-boil-legacy-of-grace.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. This model's [PSYCHIC] attacks: Have [ANTI: nonMONSTER/VEHICLE 5+]. Can reroll damage rolls.

aureole-of-the-angel-legacy-of-grace.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. This unit has 3" detection range.

angelic-executioner-encarmine-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. When this unit is selected to fight, this unit's melee attacks have: [ LETHAL HITS]. Or: [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

shadow-of-abomination-encarmine-speartip.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES JUMP PACK model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this unit is selected to fight you can use this ability. If you do, this model's melee attacks have +1 D.

instinctive-interception-wrath-of-the-do.raw_text: DEATH COMPANY model only. When you target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is 1 CP.

daemonic-allegiance.raw_text:
When you select this model to include in your army, you must select one of the keywords below. Until the end of the battle, this model has that keyword and the characteristic modifier stated for that keyword below.

■ KHORNE: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.
■ TZEENTCH: Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s infernal cannon.
■ NURGLE: Add 1 to this models Toughness characteristic.
■ SLAANESH: Add 2" to this model’s Move characteristic.

malefic-destruction.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

harbinger-of-death.raw_text:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities. Until the end of the phase, this model’s hellforged weapons have that ability:
■ [LETHAL HITS]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

daemonic-lord.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

prince-of-darkness-aura.raw_text: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

unholy-vigour.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save.

greater-daemon-of-nurgle-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6" of this model, that unit is within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

virulent-blessing-psychic.raw_text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" and visible to this model.
