steadfast-determination-fellhammer-siege.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
steadfast-determination-fellhammer-siege.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
steadfast-determination-fellhammer-siege.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

siegecraft-fellhammer-siege-host.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
siegecraft-fellhammer-siege-host.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
siegecraft-fellhammer-siege-host.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

coils-of-deception-deceptors.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
coils-of-deception-deceptors.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

relentless-pursuit-deceptors.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
relentless-pursuit-deceptors.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
relentless-pursuit-deceptors.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

scrambled-coordinates-deceptors.when: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
scrambled-coordinates-deceptors.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
scrambled-coordinates-deceptors.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.

glut-of-souls-soulforged-warpack.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
glut-of-souls-soulforged-warpack.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wounds).

unstoppable-rampage-soulforged-warpack.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
unstoppable-rampage-soulforged-warpack.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
unstoppable-rampage-soulforged-warpack.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

predatory-pursuit-soulforged-warpack.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
predatory-pursuit-soulforged-warpack.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
predatory-pursuit-soulforged-warpack.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

feeding-frenzy-soulforged-warpack.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
feeding-frenzy-soulforged-warpack.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
feeding-frenzy-soulforged-warpack.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of your unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

undying-hatred-renegade-warband.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
undying-hatred-renegade-warband.target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
undying-hatred-renegade-warband.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

renegade-claim-renegade-warband.target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
renegade-claim-renegade-warband.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

reavers-reaction-renegade-warband.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
reavers-reaction-renegade-warband.target: One Heretic Astartes unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
reavers-reaction-renegade-warband.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". 16

relentless-terror-dread-talons.when: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
relentless-terror-dread-talons.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

screaming-descent-dread-talons.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
screaming-descent-dread-talons.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is in Reserves.
screaming-descent-dread-talons.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle‐shock test.

merciless-pursuit-dread-talons.when: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
merciless-pursuit-dread-talons.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
merciless-pursuit-dread-talons.effect: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase. When doing so, you can only select that enemy unit as the target of that charge (and only if it is an eligible target). Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

selfless-demise-chaos-cult.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
selfless-demise-chaos-cult.target: One DAMNED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
selfless-demise-chaos-cult.effect: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

reckless-haste-chaos-cult.target: One DAMNED unit from your army.
reckless-haste-chaos-cult.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

mortal-thralls-chaos-cult.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
mortal-thralls-chaos-cult.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly DAMNED unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
mortal-thralls-chaos-cult.effect: Until the end of the phase, while your DAMNED unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack that targets your HERETIC ASTARTES unit, if your DAMNED unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no roll is made; instead, your DAMNED unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

black-crusade-veterans-of-the-long-war.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
black-crusade-veterans-of-the-long-war.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using that ability.

millennia-of-experience-veterans-of-the-.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
millennia-of-experience-veterans-of-the-.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
millennia-of-experience-veterans-of-the-.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

malicious-surge-nightmare-hunt.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
malicious-surge-nightmare-hunt.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

relentless-terror-nightmare-hunt.when: Your Movement phase, just after a Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army Falls Back.
relentless-terror-nightmare-hunt.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

horrific-incursion-nightmare-hunt.target: One Heretic Astartes unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.
horrific-incursion-nightmare-hunt.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding Monster and Vehicle units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battleshock test, subtracting 1 from the result. 12

eternal-hate-pactbound-zealots.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
eternal-hate-pactbound-zealots.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
eternal-hate-pactbound-zealots.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a KHORNE unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

torpefying-refrain-pactbound-zealots.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
torpefying-refrain-pactbound-zealots.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a SLAANESH unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

festering-miasma-pactbound-zealots.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
festering-miasma-pactbound-zealots.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
festering-miasma-pactbound-zealots.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. In addition, if your unit is a NURGLE unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

monstrous-visages-creations-of-bile.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
monstrous-visages-creations-of-bile.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
monstrous-visages-creations-of-bile.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

masters-are-watching-creations-of-bile.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
masters-are-watching-creations-of-bile.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
masters-are-watching-creations-of-bile.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a Damned unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

diabolic-regeneration-creations-of-bile.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit (excluding Damned units) from your army.
diabolic-regeneration-creations-of-bile.effect: One destroyed model (excluding Character models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a Battleline unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding Character models) are returned to your unit instead.

autostimulants-creations-of-bile.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army.
autostimulants-creations-of-bile.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. 10

specimens-for-the-spider-creations-of-bi.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
specimens-for-the-spider-creations-of-bi.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can reroll the Wound roll. After your unit has fought, if one or more enemy Character models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battleshock test. If the enemy Warlord was destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battleshock test instead.

delayed-mutations-creations-of-bile.target: One Heretic Astartes Infantry unit (excluding Damned units) from your army.
delayed-mutations-creations-of-bile.effect: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations). Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the selected augmentation in addition to any other augmentations they have.

warpcharged-engines-renegade-raiders.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES TRANSPORT or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
warpcharged-engines-renegade-raiders.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

detonator-deceptors.when: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding TITANIC models) is destroyed.
detonator-deceptors.target: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.
detonator-deceptors.effect: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).

infernal-vigour-cabal-of-chaos.target: One friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER/DAEMON unit (excluding KHORNE units).

fleshy-curse-cabal-of-chaos.target: One friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit.
fleshy-curse-cabal-of-chaos.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Roll one D6: On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. On a 24, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. On a 56, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds. These mortal wounds are inflicted by a psychic attack.

wreathed-in-warpflame-cabal-of-chaos.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit is selected to shoot.
wreathed-in-warpflame-cabal-of-chaos.effect: Your unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

ruinations-bounty-devotees-of-destructio.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly HAVOCS/OBLITERATORS unit is selected to shoot.
ruinations-bounty-devotees-of-destructio.effect: When your unit uses the Dark Pacts ability, your unit's ranged attacks have: [LETHAL HITS]. [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

snare-of-fire-devotees-of-destruction.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged HAVOCS unit.
snare-of-fire-devotees-of-destruction.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

plunging-talons-murdertalon-raiders.when: Fight phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY FLY unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
plunging-talons-murdertalon-raiders.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY FLY unit.

raking-pass-murdertalon-raiders.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY FLY unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
raking-pass-murdertalon-raiders.target: That HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY FLY unit.
raking-pass-murdertalon-raiders.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

warp-twisted-terrors-murdertalon-raiders.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly WARP TALONS unit ends a move.
warp-twisted-terrors-murdertalon-raiders.effect: Select one visible enemy unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.

conduit-of-chaos-cabal-of-chaos.raw_text: HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON model only (excluding KHORNE models). This model's melee attacks have [LANCE].

pact-of-destruction-devotees-of-destruct.raw_text: WARPSMITH model only. W hen this unit uses its Dark Pacts ability, this unit can reroll Leadership rolls. In your Shooting phase, when this unit has shot, if this unit used its Dark Pacts ability and if those attacks destroyed an enemy model, this unit heals 3 wounds.

eye-of-oblivion-devotees-of-destruction.raw_text: WARPSMITH model only. When this unit is selected to shoot, select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until this unit has shot.

shadowcowl-talisman-murdertalon-raiders.raw_text: CHAOS LORD WITH JUMP PACK model only. This unit has 5+ InSv.

pact-of-cursed-pinions-murdertalon-raide.raw_text: CHAOS LORD WITH JUMP PACK model only. T his model has DAEMON. This model's melee attacks have +1 A.

tyrannical-motivation.raw_text: In your Command phase, select one of the following abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, each HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army has that ability. At the start of each phase, if such a unit is visible to a friendly HURON BLACKHEART model, until the end of the phase, it has both of the following abilities. Huron’s Elite Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Mobile Marauders This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Designer’s Note*:* *If a unit is gaining eligibility to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back as a result of being visible to Huron Blackheart, but after making a Fall Back move it is no longer visible to Huron Blackheart, that unit will not be eligible to shoot in your Shooting phase or to declare a charge in your Charge phase unless it is visible again at the start of the respective phase.*

raiders-and-reavers.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

iron-fortitude.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

masters-of-misdirection.raw_text: In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select a number of LEGIONARIES and CULTIST MOB units from your army: until the end of the battle, those units, and any CHARACTER units attached to them (excluding EPIC HEROES), have the Infiltrators ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. -

debt-to-the-soul-forge.raw_text: Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army makes a Dark Pact, it can invoke its contract. If it does, subtract 1 from the resulting Leadership test when making that Dark Pact, and until the end of the phase: • Each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. • Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

slaves-to-none.raw_text: HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army lose the Dark Pacts ability. Ranged weapons equipped by HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. When mustering your army, you cannot use the Cults of the Dark Gods rule. Vendetta At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Vendetta target. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army (excluding DAMNED models) makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Twisted Doctrine In your Movement phase, each time you set up or select a HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding Battle-shocked units) from your army to move, it can choose to Default to Doctrine. If it does, it must first take a Battle-shock test. Then, select one of the following: Until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

terror-descends-aura.raw_text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from the result. Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

desperate-devotion.raw_text: Each time a DAMNED unit from your army with the Dark Pacts ability is selected to make a Normal or Advance move or declare a charge (excluding units that arrived from Reserves this turn), it can make a Desperate Pact (see below). If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Charge rolls made for that unit. Desperate Pacts Each time a unit makes a Desperate Pact, it must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds before any effects of that Desperate Pact are resolved.

focus-of-hatred.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army (excluding DAMNED models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

terror-made-manifest.raw_text: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result. Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each time an attack targets a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army, if the attacking model is Battle‐shocked, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets a Battle‐shocked unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

marks-of-chaos.raw_text: When mustering your army, when you select a HERETIC ASTARTES unit to include in your army, if that unit is not an EPIC HERO and does not already have one of the following keywords, you must select one for that unit and note it on your Army Roster: KHORNE, TZEENTCH, NURGLE, SLAANESH, CHAOS UNDIVIDED. Each time a unit with one of these keywords gains a weapon ability as the result of a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, until the end of the phase, that unit gains the associated ability below. Units That Gained [LETHAL HITS] KHORNE: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. TZEENTCH: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. CHAOS UNDIVIDED: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. Units That Gained [SUSTAINED HITS 1] NURGLE: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. SLAANESH: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. CHAOS UNDIVIDED: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

experimental-augmentations.raw_text: At the start of the battle, select which augmentations are active for HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY models (excluding DAMNED models) from your army until the end of the battle. To do so, either select one from the list below, or randomly determine two by rolling two D6. If FABIUS BILE is your WARLORD, when randomly determining your augmentations, you can re-roll one or both of the dice. Duplicated augmentations have no additional effect. 1 - Cholinergic Accelerants: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. 2 - Hyperadrenal Infusion: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model. 3 - Paraneural Reactions: Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1. 4 - Supracutaneous Chitination: Improve the Toughness characteristic of this model by 1. 5 - Macrotensile Sinews: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model. 6 - Ophthalmic Enhancement: Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1.

anti.raw_text: [ANTI-X Y+]. Each time an attack is made with this weapon against a unit that has the keyword X, an unmodified wound roll of Y+ scores a critical wound.

assault.raw_text: A unit that contains one or more models equipped with an [ASSAULT] weapon can shoot with such weapons even in a turn in which it Advanced (using assault shooting).

benefit-of-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets a unit, if every model in that unit meets one or more of the following conditions, that unit has the benefit of cover against that attack: that model has the INFANTRY/BEASTS/SWARM keyword and is within a terrain area; that model is not fully visible to the attacking model due to one or more intervening terrain features and/or one or more intervening obscuring terrain areas. Each time a ranged attack targets a unit that has the benefit of cover against it, worsen the BS characteristic of that attack by 1.

blast.raw_text: [BLAST]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, add one additional attack die for every five models that were in the target unit when you selected targets (rounding down). [BLAST] weapons can never target a unit that is within engagement range of the bearer's unit.

cleave.raw_text: [CLEAVE X]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, if you selected only one target for all of that weapon's attacks, add X additional attack dice for every five models that were in the target unit when you selected targets (rounding down).

close-quarters.raw_text: A unit containing one or more models with a [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapon can shoot with those weapons even while within engagement range (close-quarters shooting). When shooting using another type, each model in the unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE models) must choose to make attacks with either its [CLOSE-QUARTERS] weapons or its other ranged weapons — not both. [PISTOL] is identical to [CLOSE-QUARTERS] for all rules purposes.

command-re-roll.raw_text: WHEN: Any phase, just after you make an Advance, Charge, Hit, Wound, Damage, Save or Hazardous roll, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon, for a friendly unit. TARGET: That unit. EFFECT: Re-roll that roll. If several dice were rolled together, re-roll one of them (a Charge roll must be re-rolled in full).

counter-offensive.raw_text: WHEN: Fight step of your opponent's Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks. TARGET: One friendly unit eligible to fight. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase your unit has the Fights First ability, and it must be the next unit you select to fight.

crushing-impact.raw_text: WHEN: Your Charge phase, just after a friendly MONSTER or VEHICLE unit ends a Charge move. TARGET: That MONSTER/VEHICLE unit. EFFECT: Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit and one of your models engaged with it, then roll a number of D6 equal to that model's Toughness: for each 1 your unit suffers 1 mortal wound, and for each 5+ the enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds per unit).

deadly-demise.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

deadly-demise-3d6.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

deadly-demise-d6-3.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

deadly-demise-d6-3-szarekh-model-only.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

deadly-demise-d6-6.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

deadly-demise-d6-plus-2.raw_text: Deadly Demise X. Each time a model with this ability is destroyed, after any embarked units have made emergency disembark moves, roll one D6: on a 6 each unit within 6" of that model suffers X mortal wounds (roll separately for each unit if X is random).

devastating-wounds.raw_text: Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical wound (an unmodified wound roll of 6), the attack sequence ends and the target suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the weapon's Damage characteristic instead of its normal damage. These mortal wounds can destroy at most one model per critical wound; any excess is lost.

epic-challenge.raw_text: WHEN: Fight phase, just after a friendly CHARACTER unit is selected to fight. TARGET: That CHARACTER unit. EFFECT: Select one CHARACTER model in your unit; until the end of the phase, that model's melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

explosives.raw_text: WHEN: Your Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged EXPLOSIVES/GRENADES unit that is eligible to shoot and did not Advance this turn. EFFECT: Select one EXPLOSIVES/GRENADES model in your unit and one unengaged enemy unit within 8" of and visible to it, then roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

extra-attacks.raw_text: When the bearer fights, it makes attacks with an [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapon in addition to its other melee weapons. In the Select Weapons step you select all of the model's [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapons and one of its other melee weapons; [EXTRA ATTACKS] weapons cannot themselves be selected as that "other" weapon.

feel-no-pain.raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

feel-no-pain-4.raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

feel-no-pain-5.raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

feel-no-pain-5-plus.raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

feel-no-pain-6-plus.raw_text: Feel No Pain X+. Each time a model with this ability would lose a wound, roll one D6: on an X+, that wound is not lost.

fights-first.raw_text: While every model in this unit has this ability, the unit is a Fights First unit: in the Fight phase, Fights First units are selected to fight before units that do not have this ability.

fire-overwatch.raw_text: WHEN: End of your opponent's Movement or Charge phase, just after an enemy unit is set up or finishes a move. TARGET: One friendly unengaged unit (excluding TITANIC units). EFFECT: Your unit shoots the enemy unit using snap shooting — it can only target that one visible enemy unit within 24", each attack hits only on an unmodified 6, and hit rolls cannot be re-rolled. After shooting, the unit is not eligible to start an action this turn.

firing-deck.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-11.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-12.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-20.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-22.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-5.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

firing-deck-6.raw_text: Firing Deck X. In your Shooting phase, when this TRANSPORT is selected to shoot and has units embarked within it, you can select up to X embarked models and one ranged weapon (excluding [ONE SHOT]) from each; until the TRANSPORT resolves its attacks it is also equipped with those weapons. Until the end of the turn, units embarked within it are not eligible to shoot.

hazardous.raw_text: After a unit shoots or fights with one or more [HAZARDOUS] weapons, make one Hazardous test (roll one D6) for each such weapon that was selected: on a 1, the bearer is destroyed — or, if it is a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE, it instead suffers 3 mortal wounds.

heavy.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time an attack is made with this weapon, add 1 to the hit roll if all of the following apply to the attacking unit: it is unengaged; it was not set up on the battlefield this turn; and no model in it has moved more than 3" this turn.

heroic-intervention.raw_text: WHEN: End of your opponent's Charge phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged unit within 12" of one or more enemy units (a VEHICLE only if it is a CHARACTER or WALKER unit). EFFECT: Resolve a charge with your unit, selecting an enemy unit that made a Charge move this phase and is within range.

hover.raw_text: Each time this unit takes to the skies, do not subtract 2" from the maximum distance it can move — letting it hover and skim over the battlefield instead of leaving the table.

ignores-cover.raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, the target cannot have the benefit of cover against that attack.

indirect-fire.raw_text: A unit with one or more [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons can shoot them at a target unit even if no models in the target are visible to the firing models. Each time such a weapon attacks a unit that none of the firing models can see, the target has the benefit of cover and the attack suffers -1 to the hit roll.

infiltrators.raw_text: During deployment, if every model in this unit has this ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 8" horizontally from your opponent's deployment zone and from all enemy units.

insane-bravery.raw_text: WHEN: Battle-shock step of your Command phase, just before you take a Battle-shock test for a friendly unit. TARGET: That unit. EFFECT: That Battle-shock test is automatically passed. RESTRICTIONS: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle.

lance.raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the bearer's unit made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to the wound roll.

lethal-hits.raw_text: Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical hit (an unmodified hit roll of 6), you can choose for that attack to automatically wound the target — no wound roll is made (so that attack cannot then score a critical wound).

lone-operative.raw_text: Unless this unit is part of an Attached unit, enemy models can only target it with a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12" of it, and it cannot be targeted by [INDIRECT FIRE] weapons unless the attacking model is within 12". If the ability is written Lone Operative X", use X" in place of 12".

melta.raw_text: [MELTA X]. Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target unit was within half range of the weapon in the Select Targets step, add X to that weapon's Damage characteristic for that attack.

one-shot.raw_text: A weapon with this ability can be selected to make attacks with only once per battle.

pistol.raw_text: [PISTOL] and [CLOSE-QUARTERS] are identical for all rules purposes: a model can make attacks with its pistols while its unit is within engagement range of enemy units, but if it does it can target only an enemy unit it is engaged with, and can make attacks only with its pistols.

precision.raw_text: While resolving attacks made with this weapon against a unit that contains an attached CHARACTER, if a CHARACTER model in the target unit is visible to the attacker, the attacking player can choose to allocate the attack to that CHARACTER model.

psychic.raw_text: Attacks made with a [PSYCHIC] weapon are psychic attacks. Each time such an attack is made, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the attacking model's Ballistic/Weapon Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the hit roll.

rapid-fire.raw_text: [RAPID FIRE X]. Each time you gather attack dice for this weapon, add X additional attack dice if the target unit was within half range of the weapon in the Select Targets step.

rapid-ingress.raw_text: WHEN: End of your opponent's Movement phase. TARGET: One friendly unit in Reserves (excluding AIRCRAFT). EFFECT: Your unit makes an ingress move (arrives from Reserves) now. RESTRICTIONS: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first battle round.

scouts.raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

scouts-7.raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

scouts-8.raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

scouts-9.raw_text: Scouts X". If every model in this unit has this ability, then in the Resolve Pre-battle Abilities step you can either set the unit up in your deployment zone (if it was in Reserves) or, if it is wholly within your deployment zone, make a Scout move of up to X". After any Scout move, every model in the unit must be more than 8" horizontally from all enemy units. A Dedicated Transport can make this move instead if every model embarked within it also has Scouts.

smokescreen.raw_text: WHEN: Start of your opponent's Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly SMOKE unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your SMOKE unit — or a unit that is not fully visible to the attacker because of your SMOKE unit — the target has the benefit of cover against that attack.

stealth.raw_text: If every model in this unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack targets the unit, that unit has the benefit of cover against the attack.

support.raw_text: This is a support unit. Like a Leader, during the Declare Battle Formations step it can be attached to a Bodyguard unit to form a single Attached unit. See Attached Units.

sustained-hits.raw_text: [SUSTAINED HITS X]. Each time an attack made with this weapon scores a critical hit (an unmodified hit roll of 6), that attack scores X additional hits on the target.

torrent.raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, that attack automatically hits the target (no hit roll is made).

twin-linked.raw_text: Each time an attack is made with this weapon, you can re-roll the wound roll.

armour-of-contempt-liberator-assault-gro.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-liberator-assault-gro.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-liberator-assault-gro.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

shroud-of-heroes-unforgiven-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining (if the bearer was Battle-shocked when it was destroyed, it is instead returned with its full wounds remaining).

stubborn-tenacity-unforgiven-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Battle-shocked and below its Starting Strength.

weapons-of-the-first-legion-unforgiven-t.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

pennant-of-remembrance-unforgiven-task-f.raw_text: ANCIENT model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. While that unit is Battle-shocked, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

champion-of-the-deathwing-inner-circle-t.raw_text: DEATHWING model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [LETHAL HITS] ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if it is within range of your Vowed objective marker, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

eye-of-the-unseen-inner-circle-task-forc.raw_text: DEATHWING model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer is within range of your Vowed objective marker: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

singular-will-inner-circle-task-force.raw_text: DEATHWING model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, models in that unit can move an additional 3".

deathwing-assault-inner-circle-task-forc.raw_text: A veteran inductee of the Inner Circle, this champion has served amongst the Deathwing for centuries and become an unmatched master of teleportarium insertions. Deathwing model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer's unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

calibanite-armaments-lions-blade-task-fo.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer's melee weapons.

lord-of-the-hunt-lions-blade-task-force.raw_text: Ravenwing model only. The bearer's unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back and you can reroll Desperate Escape tests taken for models in the bearer's unit.

stalwart-champion-lions-blade-task-force.raw_text: Captain, Chaplain or Lieutenant model only. While the bearer's unit is not Battleshocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer's unit.

fulgus-magna-lions-blade-task-force.raw_text: Deathwing model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if the bearer's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer's unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. 5

tempered-in-battle-aura-wrath-of-the-roc.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. While a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.

ancient-weapons-wrath-of-the-rock.raw_text: Adeptus Astartes model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

lord-of-the-ravenwing-wrath-of-the-rock.raw_text: Ravenwing model only. You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit. 7

master-crafted-weapon-company-of-hunters.raw_text: RAVENWING model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the [PRECISION] ability.

mounted-strategist-company-of-hunters.raw_text: RAVENWING model only. You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

master-of-manoeuvre-company-of-hunters.raw_text: Ravenwing model only. If the bearer’s unit starts the battle in Strategic Reserves, its points value does not count towards the combined points limit for units from your army that are in Strategic Reserve, and for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

recon-hunter-company-of-hunters.raw_text: RAVENWING model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.

unmatched-fortitude-inner-circle-task-fo.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
unmatched-fortitude-inner-circle-task-fo.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
unmatched-fortitude-inner-circle-task-fo.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than your unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

armour-of-contempt-inner-circle-task-for.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-inner-circle-task-for.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
armour-of-contempt-inner-circle-task-for.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

unforgiven-fury-unforgiven-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
unforgiven-fury-unforgiven-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
unforgiven-fury-unforgiven-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. In addition, if one or more ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army are currently Battle-shocked, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

unbreakable-lines-unforgiven-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
unbreakable-lines-unforgiven-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
unbreakable-lines-unforgiven-task-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

wrath-of-the-lion-inner-circle-task-forc.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that just ended a Charge move.
wrath-of-the-lion-inner-circle-task-forc.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit, adding 1 to the result if that enemy unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 3 mortal wounds).

martial-mastery-inner-circle-task-force.target: One DEATHWING INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
martial-mastery-inner-circle-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

relic-teleportarium-inner-circle-task-fo.target: One DEATHWING unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
relic-teleportarium-inner-circle-task-fo.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
relic-teleportarium-inner-circle-task-fo.restrictions: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

duty-unto-death-inner-circle-task-force.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
duty-unto-death-inner-circle-task-force.target: One DEATHWING unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
duty-unto-death-inner-circle-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

intractable-unforgiven-task-force.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
intractable-unforgiven-task-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

grim-retribution-unforgiven-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
grim-retribution-unforgiven-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that had one or more models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
grim-retribution-unforgiven-task-force.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only the enemy unit that just attacked it, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

overpowering-exaction-lions-blade-task-f.when: Command phase or the start of the Fight phase.
overpowering-exaction-lions-blade-task-f.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
overpowering-exaction-lions-blade-task-f.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battleshock test. When doing so, if your unit has the Deathwing or Ravenwing keyword, subtract 1 from the result.
overpowering-exaction-lions-blade-task-f.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

knights-of-iron-lions-blade-task-force.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
knights-of-iron-lions-blade-task-force.target: One Ravenwing unit from your army.
knights-of-iron-lions-blade-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

illuminating-fire-lions-blade-task-force.when: Your Shooting phase, just after a Ravenwing unit from your army has selected its targets.
illuminating-fire-lions-blade-task-force.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of your unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Deathwing unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

inescapable-wrath-lions-blade-task-force.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
inescapable-wrath-lions-blade-task-force.target: One Deathwing Infantry or Deathwing Walker unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
inescapable-wrath-lions-blade-task-force.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.
inescapable-wrath-lions-blade-task-force.restrictions: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn. 6

strength-in-unity-lions-blade-task-force.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
strength-in-unity-lions-blade-task-force.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
strength-in-unity-lions-blade-task-force.effect: If that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more Ravenwing units from your army, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more Deathwing units from your army, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of the target, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
strength-in-unity-lions-blade-task-force.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Armour of Contempt Stratagem in the same phase.

inescapable-justice-wrath-of-the-rock.when: Any phase, just after your Oath of Moment target is destroyed.
inescapable-justice-wrath-of-the-rock.target: One Adeptus Astartes Character unit that is on the battlefield.
inescapable-justice-wrath-of-the-rock.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until the start of your next Command phase.

tactical-mastery-wrath-of-the-rock.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
tactical-mastery-wrath-of-the-rock.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the Ravenwing keyword, it is also eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

lions-will-wrath-of-the-rock.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
lions-will-wrath-of-the-rock.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. In addition, until the end of the turn, if your unit does not have the Deathwing, Ravenwing or Vehicle keyword, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

relics-of-the-dark-age-wrath-of-the-rock.target: One Adeptus Astartes Infantry or Adeptus Astartes Mounted unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
relics-of-the-dark-age-wrath-of-the-rock.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit.

malicious-calculations.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

curse-of-the-walking-pox.raw_text:
Each time a POXWALKER model in this unit makes an attack that destroys an enemy model (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE models). after this unit has resolved its attacks, you can return one destroyed POXWALKER model to this unit.

While TYPHUS is leading this unit, enemy models destroyed as a result of TYPHUS’ Eater Plague ability count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a POXWALKER model in this unit for the purposes of this ability.

vector-of-disease.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [LANCE] abilities.

On a 2+, set that model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. Each model can only be set up in this way once per battle.

metalophagic-infection.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy MONSTER or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted; on a 5+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

hail-of-corrosive-disease.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly DEATH GUARD unit makes a ranged attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per phase.

explosive-blight.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time this model makes an attack that destroys an enemy unit, before removing the last model in that unit from play, roll a D6, adding 1 to the result if that unit is Afflicted: on a 5+, each enemy unit within 6" of that model is Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

spore-laced-shock-waves.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s Plagueburst mortar, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit, adding 1 to that roll if the unit being rolled for is Afflicted. On a 6+, the unit being rolled for is struck by spores; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by spores suffers D3 mortal wounds.

foul-infusion.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

infused-with-the-blessings-of-nurgle.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

icon-of-despair-aura.raw_text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of the bearer, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

If that unit is Below Half-strength, an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit instead.

warprot-talisman-death-lords-chosen.raw_text: TERMINATOR model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

helm-of-the-fly-king-death-lords-chosen.raw_text: TERMINATOR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit cannot be targeted by ranged attacks unless the attacking model is within 18".

clutching-corruption-tallyband-summoners.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
clutching-corruption-tallyband-summoners.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

blessings-of-filth-champions-of-contagio.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
blessings-of-filth-champions-of-contagio.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
blessings-of-filth-champions-of-contagio.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

grotesque-fortitude-champions-of-contagi.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
grotesque-fortitude-champions-of-contagi.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
grotesque-fortitude-champions-of-contagi.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

drawn-to-despair-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
drawn-to-despair-mortarions-hammer.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a visible enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) within your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

gnawing-hunger-shamblerot-vectorium.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army.
gnawing-hunger-shamblerot-vectorium.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 1 to the Move characteristic of models in your unit, and add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.

grim-reapers-death-lords-chosen.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
grim-reapers-death-lords-chosen.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) you can re-roll the Hit roll.

disgustingly-resilient-virulent-vectoriu.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
disgustingly-resilient-virulent-vectoriu.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
disgustingly-resilient-virulent-vectoriu.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

malignance-magnified-champions-of-contag.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
malignance-magnified-champions-of-contag.target: One DEATH GUARD Attached unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
malignance-magnified-champions-of-contag.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

leechspore-eruption-virulent-vectorium.target: One DEATH GUARD model your army that has lost one or more wounds.
leechspore-eruption-virulent-vectorium.effect: Select one enemy unit within 3" of your model. Roll a number of D6 equal to the number of wounds your model has lost: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers one mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds) and your model regains 1 lost wound (to a maximum of 6 lost wounds).

blooming-pestilence-death-lords-chosen.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army.
blooming-pestilence-death-lords-chosen.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models in your unit.

signal-pox-death-lords-chosen.target: One LORD OF VIRULENCE model from your army.
signal-pox-death-lords-chosen.effect: Select one objective marker within 30" of and visible to your model. Until the start of your next turn, while an enemy unit is within range of that objective marker, that unit is Afflicted.

plaguesurge-virulent-vectorium.target: Your DEATH GUARD WARLORD that is on the battlefield.
plaguesurge-virulent-vectorium.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 3" to the Contagion Range of models from your army.

putrid-detonation-virulent-vectorium.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE or DEATH GUARD MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
putrid-detonation-virulent-vectorium.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted. In addition, any enemy units that suffer mortal wounds as a result of this Stratagem are Afflicted until the start of your next turn.

persistent-pests-tallyband-summoners.target: One NURGLINGS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
persistent-pests-tallyband-summoners.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength and with its full wounds remaining.

all-is-rot-tallyband-summoners.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
all-is-rot-tallyband-summoners.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units are not considered to be within Engagement Range of your unit for the purposes of selecting targets of ranged weapons. Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model loses a wound, while that model’s unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit suffers 1 mortal wound after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks.

fleshy-avalanche-tallyband-summoners.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
fleshy-avalanche-tallyband-summoners.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
fleshy-avalanche-tallyband-summoners.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

avatars-of-decay-tallyband-summoners.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army.
avatars-of-decay-tallyband-summoners.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

mireslick-tallyband-summoners.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
mireslick-tallyband-summoners.target: One PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
mireslick-tallyband-summoners.effect: Until the end of the phase, while an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of your unit, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, it must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

rabid-infusion-champions-of-contagion.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that includes two CHARACTER models.
rabid-infusion-champions-of-contagion.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

mobile-vector-champions-of-contagion.when: Your Movement phase, before the Reinforcements step.
mobile-vector-champions-of-contagion.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army that is not leading a unit.
mobile-vector-champions-of-contagion.effect: Select one other friendly DEATH GUARD unit (excluding Battle-shocked units and Attached units that already have two Leader units or one of your CHARACTER units leading it) within 2" horizontally and 5" vertically of your unit that your unit can lead (as described in the Leader section of its datasheet). Your unit attaches to that unit as a Leader. Change that unit’s Starting Strength accordingly.

font-of-filth-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
font-of-filth-mortarions-hammer.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

eyestinger-storm-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
eyestinger-storm-mortarions-hammer.effect: Select one objective marker visible to one or more models in your unit. Each Afflicted enemy unit within range of that objective marker must take a Battle-shock test. Enemy units affected by this Stratagem do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stinking-mire-mortarions-hammer.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
stinking-mire-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
stinking-mire-mortarions-hammer.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

relentless-grind-mortarions-hammer.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
relentless-grind-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
relentless-grind-mortarions-hammer.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

grip-of-the-walking-pox-shamblerot-vecto.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
grip-of-the-walking-pox-shamblerot-vecto.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
grip-of-the-walking-pox-shamblerot-vecto.effect: After the attacking unit has fought, roll one D6 for each model from your unit that was destroyed as a result of those attacks: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If your unit is not destroyed after the attacking unit has fought, enemy models destroyed as a result of this Stratagem count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a model in your unit for the purposes of the Curse of the Walking Pox ability.

smeared-with-filth-shamblerot-vectorium.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can target that unit with this Stratagem even though it was just destroyed.
smeared-with-filth-shamblerot-vectorium.effect: Select one enemy unit that made one or more attacks that targeted your unit this phase. Until the end of the battle, that enemy unit is Afflicted.

hidden-amongst-the-dead-shamblerot-vecto.when: The Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
hidden-amongst-the-dead-shamblerot-vecto.target: One POXWALKERS unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves and that is not an Attached unit.
hidden-amongst-the-dead-shamblerot-vecto.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

shock-and-horror-shamblerot-vectorium.when: Your Charge phase, just after a DEATH GUARD unit from your army ends a Charge move.
shock-and-horror-shamblerot-vectorium.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

shambling-wall-shamblerot-vectorium.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase.just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
shambling-wall-shamblerot-vectorium.target: One DEATH GUARD unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly POXWALKERS unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
shambling-wall-shamblerot-vectorium.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you would allocate an attack to a model in your DEATH GUARD unit, if your POXWALKERS unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no saving throw is made for that attack; instead a number of POXWALKERS from your POXWALKERS unit equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack are destroyed.

undying-spite-death-lords-chosen.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
undying-spite-death-lords-chosen.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
undying-spite-death-lords-chosen.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

mortarions-teachings-death-lords-chosen.target: One TERMINATOR unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
mortarions-teachings-death-lords-chosen.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] and [HEAVY] abilities.

sickening-impact-death-lords-chosen.when: Your Charge phase, just after a TERMINATOR unit from your army ends a Charge move.
sickening-impact-death-lords-chosen.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

blighted-land-mortarions-hammer.target: One DEATH GUARD VEHICLE unit from your army.
blighted-land-mortarions-hammer.effect: Select one terrain feature within 24" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, enemy units are Afflicted while they are within 3" of that terrain feature.

overwhelming-generosity-virulent-vectori.target: One DEATH GUARD CHARACTER unit from your army.
overwhelming-generosity-virulent-vectori.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a DEATH GUARD unit from your army selects that enemy unit as the target of any ranged attacks, you can re-roll the dice to determine how many attacks a weapon equipped by a model in that unit makes.

creeping-blight-virulent-vectorium.target: One DEATH GUARD INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
creeping-blight-virulent-vectorium.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an Afflicted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

deaths-heads-champions-of-contagion.target: One BIOLOGUS PUTRIFIER unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
deaths-heads-champions-of-contagion.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding VEHICLES) that is within 8" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next turn, that unit has the effect of all Plagues (see Nurgle’s Gift).

worldblight.raw_text: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and a DEATH GUARD unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Nurgle’s Gift ability as if it were a DEATH GUARD model from your army.

reverberant-rancidity.raw_text: While a PLAGUE LEGIONS unit from your army is within 7" of one or more DEATH GUARD units from your army, that PLAGUE LEGIONS unit has the Nurgle’s Gift ability. While a DEATH GUARD unit from your army is within 7" of one or more PLAGUE LEGIONS units from your army, add 3" to that DEATH GUARD unit’s Contagion Range.

manifold-maladies.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Plagues listed in Nurgle’s Gift. Until the end of the battle, that is your chosen Plague instead of any previously chosen Plague.

miasmic-bombardment.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, select a number of enemy units more than 12" away from every model from your army that is on the battlefield. Until the end of the battle round, those enemy units are Afflicted. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below. -

numberless-horde.raw_text: In your Command phase in each of the following battle rounds, depending on your chosen battle size, add a new POXWALKERS unit with a Starting Strength of 10 to your army, in Strategic Reserves. -
