violent-crescendo-carnival-of-excess.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

dark-apparitions-carnival-of-excess.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
dark-apparitions-carnival-of-excess.target: One DAEMONETTES unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
dark-apparitions-carnival-of-excess.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. If it arrives back on the battlefield in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units (instead of more than 9"). provided it is also set up wholly within 9" of one or more friendly EMPEROR’S CHILDREN units.

cut-down-the-weak-peerless-bladesmen.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
cut-down-the-weak-peerless-bladesmen.target: One EMPEROR’S CHILDREN unit from your army (you can only select a VEHICLE if it is a WALKER) that is within 6" of that enemy unit and would be eligible to declare a charge against that enemy unit if it were your Charge phase.
cut-down-the-weak-peerless-bladesmen.effect: Your unit can declare a charge. When doing so, you must select that enemy unit as a target of that charge, and your unit does not receive a Charge bonus this turn.

death-ecstasy-peerless-bladesmen.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
death-ecstasy-peerless-bladesmen.target: One EMPEROR’S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
death-ecstasy-peerless-bladesmen.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

armour-of-abhorrence-coterie-of-the-conc.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-abhorrence-coterie-of-the-conc.target: One EMPEROR’S CHILDREN unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-abhorrence-coterie-of-the-conc.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

delight-in-agony-elegant-brutes.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TERMINATOR unit.
delight-in-agony-elegant-brutes.effect: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit's T have -1 to wound rolls.

psychedelic-soulflame-elegant-brutes.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TERMINATOR unit is selected to attack.

warp-plunge-elegant-brutes.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
warp-plunge-elegant-brutes.target: One friendly unengaged EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TERMINATOR unit.
warp-plunge-elegant-brutes.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves. UNIQUE: HOST

possessive-mania-frenzied-host.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN BATTLELINE unit within range of an objective.
possessive-mania-frenzied-host.effect: Attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.

agonised-cacophony-frenzied-host.target: One friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN BATTLELINE unit.
agonised-cacophony-frenzied-host.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

absolute-sensory-overload-frenzied-host.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN BATTLELINE unit is selected to shoot.
absolute-sensory-overload-frenzied-host.effect: Those ranged attacks do not prevent your unit from being hidden.

honour-is-for-fools-spectacle-of-slaught.when: Fight phase, when a friendly FLAWLESS BLADES unit is selected to fight.

single-minded-strike-spectacle-of-slaugh.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly FLAWLESS BLADES unit starts a charge move.
single-minded-strike-spectacle-of-slaugh.effect: Your unit can move through models (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE models).

intoxicated-by-triumph-spectacle-of-slau.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly FLAWLESS BLADES unit ends a fallback move, if that FLAWLESS BLADES unit is unengaged.
intoxicated-by-triumph-spectacle-of-slau.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

cacophonic-accompaniment-elegant-brutes.raw_text: LORD KAKOPHONIST model only. T his model has Deep Strike. This unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

frenzied-ferocity-elegant-brutes.raw_text: EMPEROR'S CHILDREN TERMINATOR SQUAD unit only. This unit's attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

euphoric-crown-frenzied-host.raw_text: LORD EXULTANT model only. This model's melee attacks have +1 S.

howling-plate-frenzied-host.raw_text: LORD EXULTANT model only. This unit's ranged attacks have +1 AP.

eager-patrons-spectacle-of-slaughter.raw_text: FLAWLESS BLADES unit only. This unit has +2" M.

beguiling-grotesquerie-spectacle-of-slau.raw_text: FLAWLESS BLADES unit only. Enemy units cannot target this unit with snap shooting attacks.

internal-rivalries.raw_text: EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER units from your army can ignore any or all modifiers to their Move characteristic and any or all modifiers to Advance and Charge rolls made for them. At the start of the battle, your WARLORD’s unit is your army’s Favoured Champions. The first time in each player’s turn that an EMPEROR’S CHILDREN CHARACTER unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, after resolving all of its attacks, that CHARACTER unit becomes your army’s new Favoured Champions, replacing the old one. Each time a model in your army’s Favoured Champions unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll

daemonic-empowerment.raw_text: While an EMPEROR’S CHILDREN unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly LEGIONS OF EXCESS units, it is Empowered. While a LEGIONS OF EXCESS unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly EMPEROR’S CHILDREN units, it is Empowered. While a unit from your army is Empowered, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If such a weapon already has that ability, each time an attack is made with that weapon, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

exquisite-swordsmanship.raw_text: Each time an EMPEROR’S CHILDREN unit from your army is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, select one of the abilities below. While resolving those attacks, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability: [LETHAL HITS] [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

mechanised-murder.raw_text: Each time an EMPEROR’S CHILDREN model from your army makes an attack, if it is a TRANSPORT model or disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

quicksilver-grace.raw_text: You can re-roll Advance rolls made for EMPEROR’S CHILDREN units from your army.

sensational-performance.raw_text: EMPEROR’S CHILDREN units from your army have the following ability: Sensational Performance: Each time this unit is selected to fight, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase: This unit cannot target a unit it was within Engagement Range of at the start of the turn. This unit cannot target a unit that was the target of another unit’s attack this phase. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of this unit’s melee weapons by 1.

master-of-the-pageant.raw_text: Once per battle round, when you target a FULGRIM unit from your army with the Sinuous Breach or Prideful Superiority Stratagem, you can reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

pledges-to-the-dark-prince.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, if your WARLORD is on the battlefield, you must pledge a number to Slaanesh representing how many enemy units will be destroyed this battle round. At the end of the battle round, if the number of enemy units destroyed this battle round is greater than or equal to your pledge, you gain a number of Pact points equal to your pledge. Otherwise, you do not gain any Pact points this battle round and your WARLORD model suffers D3 mortal wounds. EMPEROR’S CHILDREN units from your army gain a bonus depending on how many Pact points you have gained during the battle, as shown below (these are all cumulative). -

outrider-gangs.raw_text: Each time you use the Cult Ambush ability to set this unit back up on the battlefield, in addition to the normal rules, all of its models must be set up wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and at least one of its models must be touching one of your Cult Ambush markers (that marker is then removed from the battlefield). If this cannot be done, this unit cannot be set back up.

demolition-run.raw_text: Once per turn, in your Movement phase, when this unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of and visible to this unit and roll one D6 for each ATALAN JACKALS model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

heroic-fusillade.raw_text: Once per turn, after one model from your army with this ability has shot, you can select one INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

hypersensory-abilities.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can shoot at that unit as if it were your Shooting phase and then make a Normal move of up to D6" (it cannot embark within a TRANSPORT as part of this move).

a-plan-generations-in-the-making.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

cult-icon.raw_text: In your Command phase, you can return up to 3 destroyed models to the bearer’s unit. If the bearer’s unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit instead. This ability cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models in Attached units and any [ONE SHOT] weapons equipped by returned models that were shot before they were destroyed are still considered to have been shot.

voice-of-new-truths.raw_text: In your Command phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 18" of it; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

scrambler-array.raw_text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

planted-explosives.raw_text:
Once per battle, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, this model can use its Reductus mine. If it does, roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds. Only one model from your army with this ability can use it in the same battle round.

Designer’s Note: Place a Reductus Mine token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

might-from-beyond.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

cosmic-horror-psychic.raw_text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

psychic-familiar.raw_text:
Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use its psychic familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the range of its Cosmic Horror ability.

Designer’s Note: Place a Psychic Familiar token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

twisted-science.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

biological-warfare.raw_text: Once per battle, when this model’s unit is selected to fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Damage characteristics of its injector goad by 3.

alchemicus-familiar.raw_text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to fight, the bearer can use its alchemicus familiar. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

nexus-of-devotion.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If that unit has the HYBRID METAMORPHS keyword, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

summon-the-cult.raw_text: Once per battle, when you have to remove a Cult Ambush marker because your opponent has moved too close to it, if one or more models from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can use this ability. If you do, instead of removing that marker, you can place it anywhere on the battlefield that is within 12" of a model from your army with this ability and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, this ability is not considered to have been used and that marker is removed as normal).

crossfire.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

flare-launcher.raw_text: The bearer’s unit has the SMOKE keyword and you can target it with the Smokescreen Stratagem for 0CP.

spotter.raw_text: The bearer’s ranged weapons have a Ballistic Skill characteristic of 3+.

survey-augur.raw_text: Each time the bearer’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more attacks made by the bearer this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model makes an attack against that unit, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

cult-demagogue.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Hit roll.

decoys-and-misdirection.raw_text: If your army includes one or more models with this ability, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

the-chosen-one.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

regenerating-gene-mass.raw_text: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

battlefield-analysis.raw_text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

cult-infiltration.raw_text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you can select one of your Cult Ambush markers that is on the battlefield and has not been moved this turn and move it up to 6".

creeping-shadow.raw_text: If this model is equipped with a cult sniper rifle, once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, if this model is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

cloaked-assassin.raw_text: If this model is equipped with a Sanctus bio-dagger, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this model.

psychic-spoor.raw_text: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

priority-target.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

master-outrider.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

hulking-bodyguards.raw_text: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

claimed-for-the-cult.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, roll one D6 for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it. If one or more of the results is a 4+, you gain 1CP.

brood-surge.raw_text:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Brood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: this unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but it must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

If, at the start of the battle, no model in this unit is equipped with a hand flamer, each time this unit makes a Brood Surge move, it can be moved up to 6" instead of up to D6". A unit cannot make a Brood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

industrialised-destruction.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

sudden-assault.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

bodyguard.raw_text: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

grinding-line-breaker.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of this model Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

bio-horror-disruption-psychic.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

psionic-shield-psychic.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

swift-and-deadly.raw_text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

mind-control-psychic.raw_text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one PSYKER model from your army with this ability can use it. If used, select one enemy unit within 18" of that PSYKER model and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

manufactorum-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

underground-egress.raw_text: Each time one of your Cult Ambush markers is removed as the result of an enemy unit ending any kind of move within 9" of it, you can instead move that marker so that it is wholly within 9" of this Fortification and more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, that marker is removed as normal).

tectonic-fragdrill.raw_text: Friendly Genestealer Cult Infantry models can be set up or end any type of move on top of the floor sections of this Fortification.

prowling-agitant-host-of-ascension.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of the bearer’s unit, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

a-chink-in-their-armour-host-of-ascensio.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time the bearer is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

our-time-is-nigh-host-of-ascension.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit declares a charge, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

assassination-edict-host-of-ascension.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

gene-sires-reliquant-xenocreed-congregat.raw_text: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You can re‐roll Battle‐shock tests taken for the bearer’s unit.

denunciator-of-tyrants-xenocreed-congreg.raw_text: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

deeds-that-speak-to-the-masses-xenocreed.raw_text: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. You start the battle with 2 additional Resurgence points.

incendiary-inspiration-xenocreed-congreg.raw_text: MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

predatory-instincts-biosanctic-broodsurg.raw_text: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability and, once per battle round, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

biomorph-adaptation-biosanctic-broodsurg.raw_text: ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH model only. Improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

mutagenic-regeneration-biosanctic-broods.raw_text: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. In each Command phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains 1 lost wound.

alien-majesty-biosanctic-broodsurge.raw_text: ABOMINANT, BIOPHAGUS or PATRIARCH model only. While an enemy unit is within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that enemy unit (to a minimum of 1).

serpentine-tactics-outlander-claw.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

cartographic-data-leech-outlander-claw.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. While the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, each time that TRANSPORT is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by that TRANSPORT as a result of the Firing Deck ability by 1.

starfall-shells-outlander-claw.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a cult sniper rifle. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

assault-commando-outlander-claw.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a ranged attack, if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, you can re‐roll the Hit roll.

martial-espionage-brood-brothers-auxilia.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, when a friendly ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY or ASTRA MILITARUM MOUNTED unit within 9" of the bearer is selected to shoot, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

adaptive-reprisal-brood-brothers-auxilia.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Once per turn, you can target a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit within 9" of the bearer with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP.

the-hero-returned-brood-brothers-auxilia.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Improve the Leadership and Objective Control characteristics of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

fire-point-commander-brood-brothers-auxi.raw_text: GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+.

synaptic-auger-final-day.raw_text: Tyranids model only. Each time the bearer would regain one or more lost wounds from the Psionic Parasitism Detachment rule, it regains up to twice that number of lost wounds instead.

enraptured-damnation-final-day.raw_text: Genestealer Cults model only. Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer's unit.

vanguard-tyrant-final-day.raw_text: Winged Hive Tyrant model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 1.

inhuman-integration-final-day.raw_text: Genestealer Cults model only. Weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 6" of one or more friendly Tyranids units. 5 No Tyranids models from your army can be your Warlord.

symbiotic-destruction-brood-brothers-aux.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM and one GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
symbiotic-destruction-brood-brothers-aux.effect: Select one enemy unit that is visible to both of those selected units and within range of at least one ranged weapon from each of those units. Until the end of the phase, models in those units can only make attacks that target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target). When doing so, each time such a model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

gene-twisted-muscle-biosanctic-broodsurg.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
gene-twisted-muscle-biosanctic-broodsurg.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Wound roll.

hyper-metabolic-vigour-biosanctic-broods.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
hyper-metabolic-vigour-biosanctic-broods.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". In addition, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends it as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

stimulated-bio-surge-biosanctic-broodsur.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
stimulated-bio-surge-biosanctic-broodsur.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll for each selected target of that charge (including the closest eligible enemy unit), to a maximum of +3.

devoted-crew-outlander-claw.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
devoted-crew-outlander-claw.target: One GOLIATH ROCKGRINDER or GOLIATH TRUCK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
devoted-crew-outlander-claw.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

close-range-shoot-out-outlander-claw.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
close-range-shoot-out-outlander-claw.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting an enemy unit within 18".

deft-manoeuvring-outlander-claw.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
deft-manoeuvring-outlander-claw.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
deft-manoeuvring-outlander-claw.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

hyperferocity-final-day.target: One Genestealer Cults unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
hyperferocity-final-day.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, reroll a Wound roll of 1. If one or more friendly Tyranids units are within 6" of that enemy unit, you can reroll the Wound roll instead.

avenge-the-star-children-final-day.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
avenge-the-star-children-final-day.target: One Tyranids Character unit from your army that was destroyed by that enemy unit this phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
avenge-the-star-children-final-day.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a Genestealer Cults model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

divine-imperative-final-day.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Genestealer Cults unit within 12" of a friendly engaged Tyranids unit declares a charge.
divine-imperative-final-day.effect: � Your unit has +1 to charge rolls. � You can use this part of this stratagem. If you do: � Your unit can re-roll charge rolls. � Y our unit must end that charge move engaged with an enemy unit engaged with that friendly Tyranids unit.

frenzied-devotion-xenocreed-congregation.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
frenzied-devotion-xenocreed-congregation.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Attacks and Weapon Skill characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models (excluding CHARACTERS) in your unit by 1 and those weapons have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

coordinated-trap-host-of-ascension.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
coordinated-trap-host-of-ascension.target: Two GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
coordinated-trap-host-of-ascension.effect: Select one enemy unit (if this Stratagem is used in the Fight phase, that enemy unit must be within Engagement Range of both of your units). Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

primed-and-readied-host-of-ascension.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
primed-and-readied-host-of-ascension.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
primed-and-readied-host-of-ascension.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

saintly-paroxysm-biosanctic-broodsurge.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
saintly-paroxysm-biosanctic-broodsurge.target: That destroyed CHARACTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
saintly-paroxysm-biosanctic-broodsurge.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If that CHARACTER model is an ABOMINANT or PATRIARCH, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds instead.

vengeance-for-the-martyr-xenocreed-congr.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
vengeance-for-the-martyr-xenocreed-congr.target: One other GENESTEALER CULTS CHARACTER model from your army.
vengeance-for-the-martyr-xenocreed-congr.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the destroyed model was a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

in-the-shadow-of-iron-brood-brothers-aux.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
in-the-shadow-of-iron-brood-brothers-aux.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM VEHICLE unit from your army.
in-the-shadow-of-iron-brood-brothers-aux.effect: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers. You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units and wholly within 6" of your unit.

regimental-reinforcements-brood-brothers.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM INFANTRY REGIMENT unit from your army (excluding ARTILLERY and CHARACTER units) is destroyed.
regimental-reinforcements-brood-brothers.target: That INFANTRY unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
regimental-reinforcements-brood-brothers.effect: Roll one D6: on a 3+, place one Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units (if this is not possible, no marker is placed) and add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting Strength, with all of its wounds remaining and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot.
regimental-reinforcements-brood-brothers.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

suppress-and-overwhelm-brood-brothers-au.when: Your Shooting phase, just after an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army has shot.
suppress-and-overwhelm-brood-brothers-au.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, that enemy unit cannot be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem and each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army selects that enemy unit as a target of a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

a-dark-network-brood-brothers-auxilia.when: Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves.
a-dark-network-brood-brothers-auxilia.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM or GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) within 12" of that enemy unit.
a-dark-network-brood-brothers-auxilia.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

evasive-vanguard-biosanctic-broodsurge.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers, before removing those markers from the battlefield.
evasive-vanguard-biosanctic-broodsurge.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
evasive-vanguard-biosanctic-broodsurge.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

bio-horror-revelation-biosanctic-broodsu.when: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
bio-horror-revelation-biosanctic-broodsu.target: One ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS or PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit from your army.
bio-horror-revelation-biosanctic-broodsu.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit within 9" of your unit is selected to shoot, it must take a Leadership test, subtracting 1 from the result. If that test is failed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

along-shadowed-trails-outlander-claw.when: Any phase, just after an enemy unit ends a move within 9" of one or more of your Cult Ambush markers.
along-shadowed-trails-outlander-claw.target: Select one of those Cult Ambush markers.
along-shadowed-trails-outlander-claw.effect: You can set up that Cult Ambush marker anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

rapid-feint-outlander-claw.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
rapid-feint-outlander-claw.target: One ACHILLES RIDGERUNNERS or ATALAN JACKALS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
rapid-feint-outlander-claw.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

encircling-the-prey-outlander-claw.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
encircling-the-prey-outlander-claw.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges.
encircling-the-prey-outlander-claw.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

psi-surge-final-day.target: One Tyranids unit from your army.
psi-surge-final-day.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, increase the range of your unit's Catalyst ability by 3".
psi-surge-final-day.restrictions: Each time you use this Stratagem, until the end of your next Command phase, you cannot use this Stratagem again.

darting-attacks-final-day.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
darting-attacks-final-day.target: One Tyranids unit from your army.
darting-attacks-final-day.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

resistance-tunnels-final-day.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
resistance-tunnels-final-day.target: One Genestealer Cults or Tyranids unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
resistance-tunnels-final-day.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. 6

tireless-fervour-xenocreed-congregation.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
tireless-fervour-xenocreed-congregation.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. When doing so, if it targets an enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more friendly CHARACTER units, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

transcendent-celerity-xenocreed-congrega.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
transcendent-celerity-xenocreed-congrega.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

the-path-of-anguish-xenocreed-congregati.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
the-path-of-anguish-xenocreed-congregati.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
the-path-of-anguish-xenocreed-congregati.effect: Your unit can make a move of up to D6", but it unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, models in your unit can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

tunnel-crawlers-host-of-ascension.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
tunnel-crawlers-host-of-ascension.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
tunnel-crawlers-host-of-ascension.restrictions: A unit targeted by this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

lying-in-wait-host-of-ascension.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS BATTLELINE unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
lying-in-wait-host-of-ascension.effect: Until the end of the phase, when setting your unit up using a Cult Ambush marker, set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of that Cult Ambush marker and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

return-to-the-shadows-host-of-ascension.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
return-to-the-shadows-host-of-ascension.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
return-to-the-shadows-host-of-ascension.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

a-deadly-snare-host-of-ascension.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge.
a-deadly-snare-host-of-ascension.target: One GENESTEALER CULTS INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge.
a-deadly-snare-host-of-ascension.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

acceptable-losses-brood-brothers-auxilia.target: One ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army.
acceptable-losses-brood-brothers-auxilia.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more GENESTEALER CULTS units from your army. Until the end of the phase, your unit can make ranged attacks that target that enemy unit. If it does, after it has resolved those attacks, roll one D6 for each of those GENESTEALER CULTS units: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.

the-downtrodden-rise-xenocreed-congregat.when: End of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
the-downtrodden-rise-xenocreed-congregat.target: One ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS or NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army in Cult Ambush.
the-downtrodden-rise-xenocreed-congregat.effect: Until the end of the phase, you can set up your unit on the battlefield without using a Cult Ambush marker. When doing so, set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

living-up-to-legend-heroes-of-the-uprisi.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly KILLER unit has attacked, if those attacks destroyed an enemy unit or an enemy CHARACTER model.
living-up-to-legend-heroes-of-the-uprisi.effect: Each visible friendly battle-shocked GENESTEALER CULTS unit within 12" of your unit is no longer battle-shocked.

surging-broodworship-heroes-of-the-upris.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly KILLER unit is selected to attack.
surging-broodworship-heroes-of-the-upris.effect: Attacks made by KILLER models in your unit have [DEVASTATING WOUNDS].

loyal-to-the-end-heroes-of-the-uprising.when: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly KILLER unit.
loyal-to-the-end-heroes-of-the-uprising.effect: When a KILLER model in your unit is destroyed, if your unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6: On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. On a 2+, do not remove that model from the battlefield. When your unit has fought, or at the end of the phase (whichever comes first), that model is removed from the battlefield. UNIQUE: PURESTRAIN

lurk-and-strike-purestrain-broodswarm.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit is selected to make a fallback move.
lurk-and-strike-purestrain-broodswarm.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

crawling-horror-purestrain-broodswarm.when: Start of your opponent's Movement phase.
crawling-horror-purestrain-broodswarm.effect: Your unit has 6" detection range until the end of the turn.

inhuman-reactions-purestrain-broodswarm.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit.
inhuman-reactions-purestrain-broodswarm.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3". UNIQUE: HOSTS

eyes-of-the-cult-xenocult-masses.target: One friendly NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit within a terrain area.
eyes-of-the-cult-xenocult-masses.effect: Enemy units within that terrain area have +6" detection range.

fanatical-hail-xenocult-masses.effect: Select one enemy unit. Your unit's ranged attacks that target that enemy unit can reroll hit rolls.

slunk-from-the-underbelly-xenocult-masse.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit with every model within a terrain area.
slunk-from-the-underbelly-xenocult-masse.effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 AP until that unit has attacked.

contraband-munitions-heroes-of-the-upris.raw_text: KELERMORPH/REDUCTUS SABOTEUR model only. This unit's ranged attacks have +2 S.

mark-of-the-star-children-purestrain-bro.raw_text: PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit only. This unit has: +1 T. 4 + Sv. This unit's melee attacks have +1 S.

talons-of-the-sire-purestrain-broodswarm.raw_text: PATRIARCH model only. This unit's attacks can reroll wound rolls of 1.

inspired-to-greatness-xenocult-masses.raw_text: MAGUS/PRIMUS model only. This unit's attacks can reroll damage rolls.

devious-disguises-xenocult-masses.raw_text: NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.

integrated-tactics.raw_text: Each time an ASTRA MILITARUM unit from your army (see below) is selected to shoot, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to that unit. If you do, until the end of the phase, models in that ASTRA MILITARUM unit can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and that enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire. While an enemy unit is caught in overlapping fire, each time a GENESTEALER CULTS model from your army targets that enemy unit with a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

brood-brothers.raw_text: You can include ASTRA MILITARUM units in your army, even though they do not have the GENESTEALER CULTS Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is: - A GENESTEALER CULTS model must be your WARLORD, and ASTRA MILITARUM models from your army lose the Voice of Command ability if they have it. You cannot include units with any of the following keywords in your army using this rule: AIRCRAFT; COMMISSAR; EPIC HERO; MILITARUM TEMPESTUS; OGRYN; RATLING; TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER; MINISTORUM PRIEST.

hypermorphic-fury.raw_text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for ABERRANTS, BIOPHAGUS and PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS units from your army. In addition, each time such a unit is selected to fight, if it made a Charge move this turn, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

rapid-takeover.raw_text: While a GENESTEALER CULTS MOUNTED or GENESTEALER CULTS VEHICLE model from your army is not Battle-shocked, add 1 to its Objective Control characteristic. In addition, at the end of your Command phase, if one or more ATALAN JACKALS units from your army are within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

psionic-parasitism.raw_text: At the end of your Movement phase, for each TYRANIDS SYNAPSE unit from your army, you can select one friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit (excluding PURESTRAIN GENESTEALER and PATRIARCH units) and one friendly TYRANIDS unit each within 9" of and visible to that Synapse unit. If you do, that GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army suffers D3+1 mortal wounds and one model in the selected TYRANIDS unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next Movement phase, each time a model in the selected TYRANIDS unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. TYRANIDS units from your army have the following ability: Catalyst (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a friendly GENESTEALER CULTS unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

unquestioning-fanaticism.raw_text: For each ACOLYTE HYBRIDS, HYBRID METAMORPHS and NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit from your army, while one or more CHARACTER models are leading that unit, you can re‐roll Advance and Charge rolls made for it. If that CHARACTER model is a MAGUS, PRIMUS or ACOLYTE ICONWARD, that model has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability while leading that unit.

a-perfect-ambush.raw_text: Each time a GENESTEALER CULTS unit from your army is set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements, until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

surge-of-wrath-psychic.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

warrior-strategist.raw_text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP

might-of-titan-psychic.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of melee weapons equipped by this model

fire-focus.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

sanctity-of-purpose.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. lf the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

indomitable-spirit-psychic.raw_text: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

truesilver-aegis-aura.raw_text: While a friendly GREY KNIGHTS unit is wholly within 6" of this unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability against mortal wounds.

eye-of-judgement-psychic.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

guidance-of-the-ancients-psychic.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a GREY KNIGHTS model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

champion-of-the-order-of-purifiers-psych.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of Purifying Flame weapons equipped by models in that unit.

foesight-psychic.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll

guardians-of-the-machine.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit ends a charge move within Engagement Range of one or more GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE units from your army and within 6" of this model’s unit, you can target this model’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

sanctic-hood.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

haloed-in-soulfire-psychic.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a attack if the attacking model is within 18".

clarion-of-haste-psychic.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

inspiring-exemplar.raw_text: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model in the Fight phase, you gain 1CP and until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its Nemesis force weapon.

righteous-persecution.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks: until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

personal-teleporters.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

zealous-path.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

litanies-of-sanctity.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly GREY KNIGHTS unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
