driven-by-hatred.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

nanoscarab-amulet.raw_text: The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

flesh-hunger.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if the target of that attack is Below Half-strength, a successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

malevolent-arcing.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, each time you select a target for this model’s twin tesla destructor, roll one D6 for the target unit and one D6 for every other enemy unit within 3" of the target unit. On a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by arcing energies; after resolving all of this model’s attacks against the target unit, each unit struck by arcing energies suffers D3 mortal wounds.

illuminor.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly NECRONS units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

mechanical-augmentation-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS BATTLELINE unit is within 3" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and each time an attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

atomic-energy-manipulator.raw_text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this model destroyed one or more models this phase, until the end of the battle, add 3" to the range of its Mechanical Augmentation ability (to a maximum of 12").

protective-disciples.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more other friendly DESTROYER CULT units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

infectious-murder-madness-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding MONSTER and TITANIC units) is within 6” of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if that model has the DESTROYER CULT keyword or that enemy unit is the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

prophet-of-destruction.raw_text: Each time this model destroys an enemy unit, select one other friendly DESTROYER CULT unit within 9” of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

nullstone-field-generator-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

weapon-sentinels.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 12", you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack’s Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll; the Wound roll

canoptek-retinue.raw_text: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a CRYPTEK model (a unit cannot have more than one Tomb Crawlers unit joined to it and cannot have both a TOMB CRAWLERS and a CRYPTOTHRALLS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

tunnelling-horrors.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

harbinger-of-destruction.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, a successful unmodifed Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

living-lightning.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this model) and roll four D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

overwhelming-obliteration.raw_text: In your Movement phase, if this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, its doomsday cannon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

inescapable-death.raw_text: Once per turn, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase. In addition, each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 2+.

multi-threat-eliminator.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit makes a ranged attack that targets a friendly NECRONS unit within 3" of a model with this ability, after that enemy unit has shot, one model with this ability that is within 3" of that target can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

atavistic-instigation.raw_text:
Each time this model targets an enemy unit with its heavy death ray, your opponent must declare if that unit will stand firm or duck for cover:

■ If it stands firm, when resolving ranged attacks against that unit this phase, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

■ If it ducks for cover, until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

tectonic-reverberations.raw_text: In your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

obelisk-node-control.raw_text: While this model is within range of an objective marker you control, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

vanguard-protocols.raw_text: If this model is attached to a CANOPTEK MACROCYTES unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Scouts 8" ability.

triarch-abilities.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, select one Triarch ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this unit has that ability.

the-silent-king.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of this unit’s Szarekh model, improve that unit’s Leadership characteristic by 1.

triarchal-menhirs.raw_text: If this unit’s Szarekh model is destroyed, all of this unit’s remaining Triarchal Menhir models are also destroyed.

timesplinter-mantle.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

chronometron.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 5". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

canoptek-swarm.raw_text: In your Command phase, select one friendly CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit within 6" of this unit. One destroyed model is returned to that CANOPTEK SCARAB SWARM unit for each SPYDER model in this unit.

fabricator-claw-array-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS VEHICLE unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

gloom-prism-aura.raw_text: While a friendly NECRONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

phased-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

ziggurat-dock.raw_text: One friendly MONOLITH, OBELISK, TESSERACT VAULT or SENTRY PYLON model can start the battle on top of this FORTIFICATION’s ziggurat platform. While such a model is on this platform, that model’s ranged weapons have the [HEAVY] ability. Any friendly model can be set up or end any type of move on the ramps or platform sections of this FORTIFICATION.

phase-shifted-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

teleportation-matrix.raw_text: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this FORTIFICATION is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models. If the battle ends and this FORTIFICATION is not on the battlefield, it is destroyed.

death-sphere-bombardment.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

phase-shift-generator-aura.raw_text: While a friendly Necrons unit is within 3" of this Fortification, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

mind-in-the-machine.raw_text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy Vehicle unit within 12" of and visible to this model. That unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is passed, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; if that test is failed, that unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

lord-of-the-pyrrhian-eternals.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

the-vargard-s-duty.raw_text: While this model is in the same unit as Nemesor Zahndrekh, Character models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

ghostwalk-mantle.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

relentless-march.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

the-lord-s-will.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, you can target that unit with Stratagems even when it is Battle-shocked.

counter-tactics.raw_text: Once per battle, after your opponent uses a Stratagem, if this model is on the battlefield, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the battle, the CP cost your opponent must pay to use that Stratagem again is increased by 1CP.

transient-madness.raw_text:
While this model is leading a unit, at the start of your Command phase, roll one D6: until the start of your next Command phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit gain the ability below that corresponds with that roll:
■ 1-2: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]
■ 3-4: [LETHAL HITS]
■ 5-6: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]

drain-life.raw_text: At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enslaved-star-god.raw_text: This model cannot be your WARLORD.

matter-absorption.raw_text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 2+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds and this model regains up to that many lost wounds.

grand-illusion.raw_text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, select up to three NECRONS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

transdimensional-displacement.raw_text: Each time this model is selected to Advance, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

ctan-shard.raw_text: This model cannot be given Enhancements.

veil-of-darkness-awakened-dynasty.raw_text: NECRONS model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove that unit from the battlefield. Then, in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

nether-realm-casket-awakened-dynasty.raw_text: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

phasal-subjugator-aura-awakened-dynasty.raw_text: NECRONS model only. While a friendly NECRONS unit (excluding CHARACTER units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enaegic-dermal-bond-awakened-dynasty.raw_text: NECRONS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability

eternal-madness-annihilation-legion.raw_text: NECRONS model only. In the Fight phase, each time a model in the bearer’s unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

ingrained-superiority-annihilation-legio.raw_text: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

soulless-reaper-annihilation-legion.raw_text: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer’s unit is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 3+, that unit cannot Fall Back this phase and must Remain Stationary.

eldritch-nightmare-annihilation-legion.raw_text: DESTROYER CULT model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

dimensional-sanctum-canoptek-court.raw_text: CRYPTEK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Infiltrators ability.

hyperphasic-fulcrum-canoptek-court.raw_text: CRYPTEK model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, if that unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

autodivinator-canoptek-court.raw_text: CRYPTEK model only. Each time your opponent gains a CP as the result of an ability, roll one D6: on a 2+, you also gain 1CP

metalodermal-tesla-weave-canoptek-court.raw_text: CRYPTEK model only. Once per phase, when an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as a target of a charge, roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

honourable-combatant-obeisance-phalanx.raw_text: OVERLORD model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy CHARACTER unit, your opponent loses 1CP if they have any.

unflinching-will-obeisance-phalanx.raw_text: OVERLORD model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] and [ANTI-INFANTRY 5+] abilities.

warrior-noble-obeisance-phalanx.raw_text: OVERLORD model only. Each time a melee attack targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

eternal-conqueror-obeisance-phalanx.raw_text: OVERLORD model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

dimensional-overseer-hypercrypt-legion.raw_text: NECRONS model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield or in Strategic Reserves, add one to the number of units from your army that you can select for the Hyperphasing rule.

arisen-tyrant-hypercrypt-legion.raw_text: NECRONS model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the bearer’s unit was set up on the battlefield this turn, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

hyperspatial-transfer-node-hypercrypt-le.raw_text: NECRONS model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

osteoclave-fulcrum-hypercrypt-legion.raw_text: NECRONS model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

dread-majesty-aura-starshatter-arsenal.raw_text: Overlord or Catacomb Command Barge model only. While a friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) is within 6" of the bearer, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, reroll a Hit roll of 1 and reroll a Wound roll of 1.

miniaturised-nebuloscope-starshatter-ars.raw_text: Necrons model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

demanding-leader-starshatter-arsenal.raw_text: Necrons model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

chrono-impedance-fields-starshatter-arse.raw_text: NECRONS model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly NECRONS VEHICLE or NECRONS MOUNTED unit (excluding TITANIC units) within 6" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in that unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

destroyer-ankh-cursed-legion.raw_text: Catacomb Command Barge or Overlord model only. The bearer has the Destroyer Cult keyword. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in the bearer's unit and add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

murdermind-cursed-legion.raw_text: Cryptek model only. The bearer has the Destroyer Cult keyword and during the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Destroyer Cult unit (excluding Character units). If you do, the bearer's unit cannot contain any models without the Destroyer Cult keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

mask-of-the-nekrosor-cursed-legion.raw_text: DESTROYER CULT model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

cursed-circlet-cursed-legion.raw_text: Destroyer Cult model only. In your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model in this unit was destroyed by those attacks, this unit can make a surge move of up to D6". 9

quantum-abacus-cryptek-conclave.raw_text: Necrons model only. Each time you select the bearer's unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if it is within range of one or more objectives: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

atomic-disintegrators-cryptek-conclave.raw_text: Cryptek model only. In your Shooting phase, each time the bearer's unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment rule, you can also select from the following abilities: [ANTIMONSTER 5+], [ANTIVEHICLE 5+].

gauntlet-of-compression-cryptek-conclave.raw_text: Necrons model only. Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer's unit.

gravitic-bolas-cryptek-conclave.raw_text: Cryptek model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding Titanic units); until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit's

molecular-targeting-cryptek-conclave.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
molecular-targeting-cryptek-conclave.target: One Necrons unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
molecular-targeting-cryptek-conclave.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristic; the Hit roll. If your unit has the Cryptek keyword, you can also ignore any or all modifiers to the Wound roll.

untapped-power-cryptek-conclave.target: One Cryptek unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
untapped-power-cryptek-conclave.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, when selecting an ability for the Technosorcerous Augmentations Detachment Rule, you can select one additional ability from those available.

methodical-murder-cursed-legion.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
methodical-murder-cursed-legion.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
methodical-murder-cursed-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

image-of-death-cursed-legion.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
image-of-death-cursed-legion.target: One Destroyer Cult unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
image-of-death-cursed-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

spreading-madness-cursed-legion.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
spreading-madness-cursed-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more friendly units, add 2 to the Charge roll.

pitiless-hunters-annihilation-legion.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
pitiless-hunters-annihilation-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

blood-fuelled-cruelty-annihilation-legio.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
blood-fuelled-cruelty-annihilation-legio.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that started the phase within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
blood-fuelled-cruelty-annihilation-legio.effect: Roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

the-spoor-of-frailty-annihilation-legion.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
the-spoor-of-frailty-annihilation-legion.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
the-spoor-of-frailty-annihilation-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model from your unit makes an attack that targets a unit below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well

murderous-reanimation-annihilation-legio.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that has just destroyed an enemy unit, or just caused an enemy unit that was not Below Half-strength to become Below Half-strength.

entrophasic-aura-targeting-pantheon-of-w.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
entrophasic-aura-targeting-pantheon-of-w.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
entrophasic-aura-targeting-pantheon-of-w.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, reroll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is unravelling, reroll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

chronodistortion-pantheon-of-woe.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
chronodistortion-pantheon-of-woe.target: One Necrons unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
chronodistortion-pantheon-of-woe.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if the attacking unit is unravelling: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

enslaved-artifice-obeisance-phalanx.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
enslaved-artifice-obeisance-phalanx.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
enslaved-artifice-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

nanoassembly-protocols-obeisance-phalanx.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
nanoassembly-protocols-obeisance-phalanx.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
nanoassembly-protocols-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

suffer-no-rival-obeisance-phalanx.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
suffer-no-rival-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

curse-of-the-cryptek-canoptek-court.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
curse-of-the-cryptek-canoptek-court.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit’s attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
curse-of-the-cryptek-canoptek-court.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly CANOPTEK model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

protocol-of-the-hungry-void-awakened-dyn.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
protocol-of-the-hungry-void-awakened-dyn.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1 (this is not cumulative with any other modifiers that improve Armour Penetration).

protocol-of-the-conquering-tyrant-awaken.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
protocol-of-the-conquering-tyrant-awaken.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within half range, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll the Hit roll for that attack instead.

merciless-reclamation-starshatter-arsena.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
merciless-reclamation-starshatter-arsena.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
merciless-reclamation-starshatter-arsena.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Wound roll.

unyielding-forms-starshatter-arsenal.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
unyielding-forms-starshatter-arsenal.target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
unyielding-forms-starshatter-arsenal.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets a model in your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

cynosure-of-eradication-canoptek-court.when: The start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.
cynosure-of-eradication-canoptek-court.target: One CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army that is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.
cynosure-of-eradication-canoptek-court.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

disharmonisation-cascade-pantheon-of-woe.when: Any phase, just after a Necrons Monster model from your army is destroyed, before making its Deadly Demise roll.
disharmonisation-cascade-pantheon-of-woe.target: That Necrons Monster model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
disharmonisation-cascade-pantheon-of-woe.effect: Until the end of the phase, your model's Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

mass-transmogrification-pantheon-of-woe.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a Necrons Monster unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
mass-transmogrification-pantheon-of-woe.target: One friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monsters) within 6" of that Monster unit.
mass-transmogrification-pantheon-of-woe.effect: If that enemy unit was unravelling at the start of the phase, your friendly unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.
mass-transmogrification-pantheon-of-woe.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

your-time-is-nigh-obeisance-phalanx.when: Any phase, just after your opponent’s WARLORD is destroyed.
your-time-is-nigh-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time an enemy unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from the result.

sentinels-of-eternity-obeisance-phalanx.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
sentinels-of-eternity-obeisance-phalanx.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH PRAETORIANS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
sentinels-of-eternity-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

protocol-of-the-eternal-revenant-awakene.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
protocol-of-the-eternal-revenant-awakene.effect: At the end of the phase, set your model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with half of its starting number of wounds remaining.
protocol-of-the-eternal-revenant-awakene.restrictions: Each model can only be targeted with this Stratagem once per battle.

synergistic-empowerment-cryptek-conclave.target: One Cryptek unit from your army.
synergistic-empowerment-cryptek-conclave.effect: Select one friendly Necrons model (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 12" of a Cryptek model in your unit. Until the end of the phase, that friendly Necrons model has the Cryptek keyword.

potentiality-syphon-cryptek-conclave.target: One Necrons unit from your army within range of one or more objective markers.
potentiality-syphon-cryptek-conclave.effect: Your unit's Reanimation Protocols activate. If it is a Cryptek unit, it reanimates an additional 1 wound. 8

chronoshift-starshatter-arsenal.target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
chronoshift-starshatter-arsenal.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

dimensional-tunnel-starshatter-arsenal.target: One Necrons Vehicle or Necrons Mounted unit (excluding Titanic units) from your army.
dimensional-tunnel-starshatter-arsenal.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit can move horizontally through models and terrain features.

endless-servitude-starshatter-arsenal.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monster and Titanic units) from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.

reactive-reposition-starshatter-arsenal.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
reactive-reposition-starshatter-arsenal.target: One Necrons unit from your army (excluding Monster and Titanic units) that was the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
reactive-reposition-starshatter-arsenal.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". 6

mortis-protocols-cursed-legion.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after the first time a Destroyer Cult unit from your army destroys an enemy unit this turn.
mortis-protocols-cursed-legion.target: One friendly Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within 9" of that Destroyer Cult unit.
mortis-protocols-cursed-legion.effect: The friendly unit's Reanimation Protocols activate.

driven-to-butchery-cursed-legion.when: Your Shooting phase or your Charge phase.
driven-to-butchery-cursed-legion.target: One Destroyer Cult unit from your army.
driven-to-butchery-cursed-legion.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
driven-to-butchery-cursed-legion.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

insanitys-ire-annihilation-legion.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
insanitys-ire-annihilation-legion.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed by the attacking unit’s attacks.
insanitys-ire-annihilation-legion.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move, but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

masks-of-death-annihilation-legion.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
masks-of-death-annihilation-legion.target: One DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
masks-of-death-annihilation-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

reanimation-crypts-hypercrypt-legion.effect: For each of your NECRONS units in Reserves, that Reserves unit’s Reanimation Protocols activate.

cosmic-precision-hypercrypt-legion.target: One NECRONS unit from your army (excluding MONSTER units) that is arriving using the Deep Strike or Hyperphasing abilities this phase.
cosmic-precision-hypercrypt-legion.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
cosmic-precision-hypercrypt-legion.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

molecular-erosion-pantheon-of-woe.target: One Necrons Monster unit from your army.
molecular-erosion-pantheon-of-woe.effect: Select one unravelling enemy unit visible to your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battleshock test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result. If that test is failed, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds.
molecular-erosion-pantheon-of-woe.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

phase-melding-pantheon-of-woe.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an unravelling enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
phase-melding-pantheon-of-woe.target: One Necrons unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
phase-melding-pantheon-of-woe.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battleshocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests. 12

territorial-obsession-obeisance-phalanx.target: One LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army.
territorial-obsession-obeisance-phalanx.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. If your unit has the VEHICLE keyword, add 3 to the Objective Control characteristic instead.

solar-pulse-canoptek-court.target: One CRYPTEK model from your army.
solar-pulse-canoptek-court.effect: Select one objective marker within 18" of your CRYPTEK model. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models have the [IGNORES COVER] ability while targeting units within range of that objective marker.

reactive-subroutines-canoptek-court.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
reactive-subroutines-canoptek-court.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
reactive-subroutines-canoptek-court.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

countertemporal-shift-canoptek-court.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
countertemporal-shift-canoptek-court.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
countertemporal-shift-canoptek-court.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

suboptimal-facade-canoptek-court.when: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit has declared a charge.
suboptimal-facade-canoptek-court.target: One CANOPTEK unit from your army that was selected as a target of that charge and is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix.

protocol-of-the-undying-legions-awakened.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has resolved its attacks.
protocol-of-the-undying-legions-awakened.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
protocol-of-the-undying-legions-awakened.effect: Your unit activates its Reanimation Protocols and reanimates D3 wounds (or D3+1 wounds if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit).

protocol-of-the-sudden-storm-awakened-dy.target: One NECRONS unit from your army.
protocol-of-the-sudden-storm-awakened-dy.effect: Until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability. In addition, if a NECRONS CHARACTER is leading your unit, until the end of the phase, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for your unit.

unnatural-aggression-cursed-legion.when: End of your opponent's Charge phase.
unnatural-aggression-cursed-legion.target: One Necrons unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
unnatural-aggression-cursed-legion.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn. 10

hyperphasic-recall-hypercrypt-legion.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
hyperphasic-recall-hypercrypt-legion.target: One NECRONS INFANTRY unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks and one friendly MONOLITH model.
hyperphasic-recall-hypercrypt-legion.effect: Remove your INFANTRY unit from the battlefield and then set it back up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 6" of your MONOLITH model and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

dimensional-corridor-hypercrypt-legion.target: One NECRONS unit from your army that was set up on the battlefield this turn using the Eternity Gate ability of a MONOLITH model that started the turn on the battlefield.
dimensional-corridor-hypercrypt-legion.effect: Your unit is eligible to charge this phase.

protocol-of-the-vengeful-stars-awakened-.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit destroys a NECRONS unit from your army.
protocol-of-the-vengeful-stars-awakened-.target: One NECRONS CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 6" of that NECRONS unit when it was destroyed.
protocol-of-the-vengeful-stars-awakened-.effect: After the attacking unit has resolved its attacks, your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

microscarab-swarm-cryptek-conclave.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
microscarab-swarm-cryptek-conclave.target: One Cryptek Infantry unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
microscarab-swarm-cryptek-conclave.effect: If your unit has the Necron Warriors keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit has the Immortals keyword, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

animus-curse-cryptek-conclave.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has shot or fought.
animus-curse-cryptek-conclave.target: One Cryptek model from your army that was destroyed by one of the attacking unit's attacks. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
animus-curse-cryptek-conclave.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly Necrons model makes an attack that targets the attacking unit, you can reroll the Hit roll.

quantum-deflection-hypercrypt-legion.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
quantum-deflection-hypercrypt-legion.target: One NECRONS VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
quantum-deflection-hypercrypt-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

entropic-damping-hypercrypt-legion.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
entropic-damping-hypercrypt-legion.target: One TITANIC model from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks and is within 18" of the attacking unit.
entropic-damping-hypercrypt-legion.effect: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

dominance-protocols-hand-of-the-dynasty.effect: Your unit has +1 OC until the end of the turn.

will-of-the-conqueror-hand-of-the-dynast.effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

nanosaturation-hand-of-the-dynasty.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly IMMORTALS/NECRON WARRIORS unit has shot.
nanosaturation-hand-of-the-dynasty.effect: Your unit shoots using snap shooting, but while doing so your unit can only target that enemy unit.

omnilocked-strafing-skyshroud-spearhead.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly NECRONS MOUNTED unit is selected to make a fallback move.
omnilocked-strafing-skyshroud-spearhead.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

swift-as-death-skyshroud-spearhead.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged NECRONS MOUNTED unit.
swift-as-death-skyshroud-spearhead.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

evasive-protocols-skyshroud-spearhead.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly NECRONS MOUNTED unit.
evasive-protocols-skyshroud-spearhead.effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit's T have -1 to wound rolls. UNIQUE: HYPERCRYPT

subsurface-quantumweave-the-phaerons-arm.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly NECRONS TITANIC FLY unit.
subsurface-quantumweave-the-phaerons-arm.effect: Attacks that target your unit have 1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.

particle-pulse-the-phaerons-armoury.target: One friendly NECRONS TITANIC FLY unit.
particle-pulse-the-phaerons-armoury.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +3" detection range.

cosmic-storm-the-phaerons-armoury.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly OBELISK/TESSERACT VAULT unit is selected to shoot.
cosmic-storm-the-phaerons-armoury.effect: Your unit's Tesla Sphere weapons have +1 AP.

enlivened-sentinels-hand-of-the-dynasty.raw_text: NECRON WARRIORS unit only. This unit has Scouts 5".

tools-of-dominion-hand-of-the-dynasty.raw_text: Nobles are not above expending additional resources to improve the armaments of their more valuable soldiery. IMMORTALS unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have [RAPID FIRE 1].

recursive-reanimation-skyshroud-spearhea.raw_text: TOMB BLADES unit only. When this unit activates its Reanimation Protocols, +1 to the roll.

deepening-madness-skyshroud-spearhead.raw_text: DESTROYER CULT MOUNTED unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have [ASSAULT].

prelocational-optimiser-the-phaerons-arm.raw_text: NECRONS model only. When this unit is selected to shoot, if this unit was set up using a Monolith's Eternity Gate ability this turn, this unit's ranged attacks have: [LETHAL HITS]. Or: [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

mortality-shroud-aura-the-phaerons-armou.raw_text: OBELISK unit only. In your opponent's Battleshock step, if an enemy unit within 8" of this unit is below starting strength, that enemy unit makes a battleshock roll.

technosorcerous-augmentations.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by CRYPTEK models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability. In your Shooting phase, each time a CRYPTEK unit from your army is selected to shoot, select one of the following abilities: [ANTI-INFANTRY 3+], [ANTI-MOUNTED 4+], [ASSAULT], [HEAVY], [IGNORES COVER]. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have that ability.

relentless-onslaught.raw_text: Each time a NECRONS model (excluding MONSTER models) from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more objective markers, add 1 to the Hit roll. In addition, ranged weapons equipped by NECRONS VEHICLE and NECRONS MOUNTED models (excluding TITANIC models) from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability.

cold-fervour.raw_text: Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by DESTROYER CULT models from your army. The first time each turn that a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes attacks that destroy a unit or cause it to become Below Half-strength, after that unit has finished resolving its attacks, until the end of the turn, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of weapons equipped by friendly NECRONS models (excluding DESTROYER CULT, MONSTER and TITANIC models).

annihilation-protocol.raw_text: Each time a DESTROYER CULT or FLAYED ONES unit from your army declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll. If one or more targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Charge roll as well. Each time a DESTROYER CULT unit from your army makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, add 1 to the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack.

hyperphasing.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, you can select a number of NECRONS units from your army (excluding units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units). The maximum number of units you can select depends on the battle size, as follows: Incursion: Up to 1 unit Strike Force: Up to 2 units Onslaught: Up to 3 units Once you have made your selections, remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

cosmic-distortion.raw_text: NECRONS MONSTER units from your army have the following ability: Distortion Fields (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, it is unravelling. While an enemy unit is unravelling, each time an attack targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. At the start of each phase, for each NECRONS MONSTER unit from your army, that unit can suffer 3 mortal wounds. If it does, until the end of the phase, the range of that unit’s Distortion Fields Aura ability is increased to 9". Designer’s Note: *If your army contains more than one* TRANSCENDENT C’TAN *unit, each of those units must take the Reletavistic Tether ability.* Necrodermal Binding Abilities *This eldritch device fetters and directs the Deceiver’s powers within a vortex that devours lesser wits entirely.* C’TAN SHARD OF THE DECEIVER model only. This model has the following ability: Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP. *The energies of this binding latch onto enemy targets and shunt the shard into alignment with them.* C’TAN SHARD OF THE NIGHTBRINGER model only. This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. *This device bleeds off the Void Dragon shard’s energies and earths them violently through nearby machines.* C’TAN SHARD OF THE VOID DRAGON model only. Once per turn, at the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy VEHICLE unit visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Leadership test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that Leadership test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well. *This binding uses atomic resonance magnetism to compel the shard into the midst of the foe.* TRANSCENDENT C’TAN model only. In your turn, each time this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Transdimensional Displacement abilities, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units. When doing so, if this model is set up within 9" of one or more enemy units, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

worthy-foes.raw_text: In your Command phase, select one enemy unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a NOBLE, LYCHGUARD or TRIARCH unit from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

power-matrix.raw_text: Certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Power Matrix, as follows: Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Power Matrix. At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Power Matrix. At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Power Matrix. Each time a model in a CRYPTEK or CANOPTEK unit from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If such a unit is wholly within your army’s Power Matrix, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

command-protocols.raw_text: While a NECRONS CHARACTER model is leading this unit, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

waaagh-energy.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of this model’s ’Eadbanger weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

da-jump-psychic.raw_text: Once per turn, at the end of your Movement phase, one WEIRDBOY from your army can use this ability. If it does, roll one D6: on a 1, that WEIRDBOY’s unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 2+, remove that WEIRDBOY’s unit from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

drill-through.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2‑5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

drive-by-dakka.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

deff-from-above.raw_text: Each time this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rivetin-dakka.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with a rivet kannon. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

dok-s-toolz.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

hold-still-and-say-aargh.raw_text: Each time an attack made by this model with its ’urty syringe scores a Critical Wound against a unit (excluding VEHICLE units), that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

grot-orderly.raw_text: Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer is leading a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can return up to D3 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

shooty-power-trip.raw_text:
Each time this unit is selected to shoot, you can roll one D6:

■ On a 1‑2, this unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
■ On a 3‑4, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.
■ On a 5‑6, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit.

dat-s-our-loot.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

more-dakka.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

shokk-boosta.raw_text: You can re‐roll Advance rolls made for this model’s unit. In addition, each time this model’s unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, they can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

wild-ride.raw_text: You can ignore any or all modifiers to this unit’s Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

bomb-squig.raw_text: Once per battle, for each bomb squig this unit has, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can use one Bomb Squig. If you do, select one enemy unit within 12" and visible to this unit and roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

might-is-right.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

dead-brutal.raw_text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, this model’s ’uge choppa has a Damage characteristic of 3.

blastajet-attack-run.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

blastajet-force-field.raw_text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save, but it loses the GRENADES keyword.

ramshackle-but-rugged.raw_text: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

ard-case.raw_text: Add 2 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic, but it no longer has the Firing Deck ability.

red-skull-kommandos.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover.

kunnin-infiltrator.raw_text: Once per battle, in your Movement phase, instead of making a Normal move with this model’s unit, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

clankin-forward.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

big-an-shooty.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 1 to the Hit roll.

prophet-of-da-great-waaagh.raw_text: While this unit is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll and if the Waaagh! is active for your army, a Critical Hit is scored on a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+.

ghazghkull-s-waaagh-banner-aura.raw_text: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 12" of Makari, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

trophy-hunters.raw_text: Each time this unit declares a charge, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

bomb-squigs.raw_text:
Once per battle, for each bomb squig this unit has, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can use one Bomb Squig. If you do, select one enemy unit within 12" and visible to this unit and roll one D6: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Designer’s Note: Place two Bomb Squig tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this unit uses this ability.

waaagh-effigy-aura.raw_text: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 12" of this model, each time you take a Battle‑shock test for that unit, add 1 to that test.

stompin-forward.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

pulsa-rokkit.raw_text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, the bearer can use its pulsa rokkit. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

sneaky-gitz.raw_text: Enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at this unit.

distraction-grot.raw_text: Once per battle, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, before making a saving throw for a model in this unit, it can deploy the distraction grot. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

patrol-squad.raw_text:
At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step this unit can be split into two units, each containing five models.
(when splitting a unit in this way, make a note of which models form each of the two new units. If you are splitting a unit that is equipped with 1 bomb squig and/or 1 distraction grot, only one of the new units can use that ability during the battle – make a note of which of the new units this will be).

get-da-good-bitz.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

grot-riggers.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

sawbonez.raw_text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one friendly BEAST SNAGGA CHARACTER model within 3" of this model. That model is healed and regains up to 3 lost wounds. Each model can only be healed once per turn.

big-an-stompy.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 1 to the Hit roll.

splat.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), re‑roll a Hit roll of 1.

full-throttle-kult-of-speed.raw_text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

gun-crazy-show-offs.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit targets the closest eligible target with its snazzgun, until the end of the phase, that weapon has an Attacks characteristic of 4.

ammo-runt.raw_text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

boom-bomb.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6: on a 4+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

piston-driven-brutality.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6: on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

unstable-oracle.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s Eyez of Mork weapon for every 5 models in that unit (rounding down), but while that unit contains 10 or more models, that weapon has the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

roar-of-mork-psychic.raw_text: In your opponent’s Command phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this PSYKER and roll one D6: on a 1, this PSYKER’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the start of your opponent’s next Command phase, that enemy unit is confrazzled. While a unit is confrazzled, each time a Battle‑shock or Leadership test is taken for it, subtract 2 from that test.

beastboss.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

ferocious-rage.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons it is equipped with have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

dakkastorm-kult-of-speed.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, every successful Hit roll scores a Critical Hit.

fix-dat-armour-up.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

kustom-force-field.raw_text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

grot-oiler.raw_text: Once per battle, at the end of your Movement phase, one model in the bearer’s unit regains D3 lost wounds.

buzzer-squigs.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks made with squig‑launchas and roll one D6: on a 4+, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is hindered. While a unit is hindered, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

squig-mine.raw_text:
Once per battle, at the start of any phase, select one enemy unit within 3" of this model and roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

Designer’s Note: Place a Squig Mine token next to the model, removing it once this ability has been used.

monster-hunters.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

speedboss.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

fuel-mixa-grot.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

know-wotz.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ORKS VEHICLE units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

mekaniak.raw_text: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one friendly ORKS VEHICLE model within 3" of this model. That VEHICLE model regains up to D3 lost wounds, and, until the start of your next Movement phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

shokk-tunnel.raw_text: Each time this model is selected to Advance, you can remove it from the battlefield and set it up again anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models instead of making an Advance move (this model is still considered to have Advanced this turn).

one-last-kill.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

da-bigger-dey-iz.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a TITANIC unit, add 2 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

super-runts.raw_text:
While this model is leading a unit:

■ Models in that unit have the Scouts 9" ability.
■ Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

special-dose.raw_text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this model’s unit.

runtherd.raw_text: Each time an attack targets this unit, if it contains one or more Gretchin models, until that attack is resolved, Runtherd models in this unit have a Toughness characteristic of 2.

thievin-scavengers.raw_text: At the start of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each objective marker you control that has one or more units from your army with this ability within range of it (excluding Battle-shocked units). If one or more of those rolls is a 4+, you gain 1CP.

deranged-snotling-assault.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks; that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

grot-assistant.raw_text: Once per battle, after rolling to determine how many attacks the bearer’s shokk attack gun makes, you can re-roll that dice.

spirit-of-gork-psychic.raw_text: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one friendly ORKS unit within 12" of this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2‑5, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit; on a 6, until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit and those weapons have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

pyromaniaks.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack with a burna that targets an enemy unit within 6", re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If the target of that attack is also within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

da-boss-ladz.raw_text: While a WARBOSS model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

thundering-stampede.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Charge rolls made for that unit.

single-minded-predator.raw_text: You can target this model’s unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

krumpin-time.raw_text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

billowing-fumes-aura.raw_text: While an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

gargantuan.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

walking-bastion.raw_text: This model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for making ranged attacks while enemy units are within Engagement Range of it.

burna-bomb.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move. Until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover. In addition, roll one D6 for each model in that unit: for each 6, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

on-da-hunt.raw_text: For each model embarked within this TRANSPORT, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s butcha boyz weapon (to a maximum of +6).

da-biggest-and-da-best.raw_text: While the Waaagh! is active for your army, add 4 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s melee weapons.

big-bomms.raw_text: Once per battle, after the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

small-bomms.raw_text: Each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll three D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

big-booms.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s supa-kannon, roll one D6 for the target unit and every other unit within 3" of that unit: on a 5+, the unit being rolled for is struck by a concussive wave. After this model has finished making its attacks against that target unit this phase, each unit struck by a concussive wave this phase suffers D3 mortal wounds.

da-bigger-dey-are-da-better-dey-drop.raw_text: Each time an attack made with this model’s lifta-droppa destroys an enemy model that has the Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 3+ instead of on a 6.

da-biggest-booms.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, just after selecting a target for this model’s krusha kannon, the target unit and every other enemy Infantry unit within 3" of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

has-yoo-been-a-good-little-grot-this-yea.raw_text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, you can target this model’s unit with the Grenade Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

da-revolushun.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

big-gunz.raw_text: Designer’s Note: Place two Grot Crew tokens next to each Mek Gun model when this unit is first set up, removing one each time its Big Gun model loses a wound (a Big Gun model itself is considered to represent its final wound).

speed-freeks.raw_text: If a model from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Warbikers unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

ramshackle-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

shoutin-pole-aura.raw_text: While a friendly ORKS unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1.

long-uncontrolled-bursts-rollin-deff.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
long-uncontrolled-bursts-rollin-deff.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

speshul-shells-rollin-deff.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
speshul-shells-rollin-deff.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

dead-shiny-shootas-rollin-deff.raw_text: ORKS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [RAPID FIRE 1] ability.

da-gobshot-thunderbuss-rollin-deff.raw_text: ORKS model only. Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] and [HAZARDOUS] abilities.

mount-up-ladz-blitz-brigade.target: One Orks Infantry unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and one friendly Transport it is able to embark within.
mount-up-ladz-blitz-brigade.effect: If your Orks Infantry unit is wholly within 6" of that Transport, it can embark within it.

armoured-duellists-blitz-brigade.target: One Orks Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
armoured-duellists-blitz-brigade.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and add 1 to the Wound roll.

impervious-blitz-brigade.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
impervious-blitz-brigade.target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
impervious-blitz-brigade.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

mekanised-brutality-blitz-brigade.target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
mekanised-brutality-blitz-brigade.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time a unit disembarks from your unit after your unit makes a Normal move, that disembarked unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

run-em-down-blitz-brigade.target: One Battlewagon, Kill Rig or Hunta Rig unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
run-em-down-blitz-brigade.effect: Select up to two other friendly Orks Vehicle or Orks Monster units within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, your unit and each unit you selected are eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

yooz-in-trouble-now-blitz-brigade.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
yooz-in-trouble-now-blitz-brigade.target: One Battlewagon, Hunta Rig or Kill Rig model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
yooz-in-trouble-now-blitz-brigade.effect: One Orks Infantry unit embarked within your model makes a disembark move, then makes a surge move of up to D6". 8

runnin-boots-blitz-brigade.raw_text: Orks Infantry Character model only. Each time you make a Charge roll for the bearer's unit, if that unit disembarked from a Transport this turn, add 1 to the result.

blitzkaptin-blitz-brigade.raw_text: Orks Character model only. After both players have deployed their armies, if the bearer's unit (or any Transport it is embarked within) is on the battlefield, select up to three Orks Vehicle units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

supercharged-squig-oil-blitz-brigade.raw_text: Mek model only. Each time the bearer uses its Mekaniak ability, until the end of the turn, you can reroll Charge rolls for the selected Vehicle model's unit.

tuff-git-blitz-brigade.raw_text: Orks Infantry Character model only. At the end of a phase in which the bearer's unit disembarked from 7 a Transport, if that unit is Battleshocked, it is no longer Battleshocked.

follow-me-ladz-war-horde.raw_text: ORKS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

headwoppas-killchoppa-war-horde.raw_text: ORKS model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

kunnin-but-brutal-war-horde.raw_text: ORKS model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

supa-cybork-body-war-horde.raw_text: ORKS model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

skrag-every-stash-da-big-hunt.raw_text: BEAST SNAGGA model only. proper-killy-da-big-hunt.raw_text: BEAST SNAGGA model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer.

surly-as-a-squiggoth-da-big-hunt.raw_text: BEASTBOSS ON SQUIGOSAUR model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

wazblasta-kult-of-speed.raw_text: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. squig-hide-tyres-kult-of-speed.raw_text: DEFFKILLA WARTRIKE model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

brutal-but-kunnin-green-tide.raw_text: ORKS INFANTRY model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield (or is embarked within a TRANSPORT that is on the battlefield), roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if the bearer’s unit contains 10 or more models: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

bloodthirsty-belligerence-green-tide.raw_text: ORKS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for that unit. While that unit contains 10 or more models, you can re‑roll Charge rolls made for that unit as well.

raucous-warcaller-green-tide.raw_text: ORKS INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, that unit always counts as containing 10 or more models for the purposes of your Detachment rule and any Stratagems you use.

tellyporta-bully-boyz.raw_text: WARBOSS IN MEGA ARMOUR model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Deep Strike ability.

gob-boomer-taktikal-brigade.raw_text: WARBOSS or MEK model only. Each time the bearer issues Taktiks, it can do so to a friendly ORKS INFANTRY or ORKS MOUNTED unit within 18", instead of 6".

da-gobshot-thunderbuss-more-dakka.raw_text: ORKS INFANTRY model only. This model's ranged attacks have: [DEVASTATING WOUNDS]. [HAZARDOUS].

unbridled-carnage-war-horde.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

ard-as-nails-war-horde.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
ard-as-nails-war-horde.target: One ORKS unit from your army (excluding GROTS, MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
ard-as-nails-war-horde.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

mob-rule-war-horde.target: One MOB unit from your army that contains 10 or more models and is not Below Half‑strength.
mob-rule-war-horde.effect: Select one friendly Battle‑shocked ORKS INFANTRY unit within 6" of that Mob unit. That ORKS INFANTRY unit is no longer Battle‑shocked.

ere-we-go-war-horde.target: One ORKS INFANTRY unit from your army.
