ere-we-go-war-horde.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for your unit.

armed-to-da-teef-bully-boyz.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
armed-to-da-teef-bully-boyz.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
armed-to-da-teef-bully-boyz.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead.

cut-em-down-bully-boyz.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit is selected to Fall Back.
cut-em-down-bully-boyz.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
cut-em-down-bully-boyz.effect: When that enemy unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if a Waaagh! is active for your unit, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

hulking-brutes-bully-boyz.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
hulking-brutes-bully-boyz.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
hulking-brutes-bully-boyz.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

competitive-streak-green-tide.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
competitive-streak-green-tide.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit contains 10 or more models, re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

bulldozer-brutality-green-tide.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
bulldozer-brutality-green-tide.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in your unit are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

fight-proppa-taktikal-brigade.target: One ORKS INFANTRY or ORKS MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
fight-proppa-taktikal-brigade.effect: Select the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

krunchin-descent-taktikal-brigade.when: Your Charge phase, just after a STORMBOYZ unit from your army ends a Charge move.
krunchin-descent-taktikal-brigade.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds).

orks-is-still-orks-more-dakka.target: One ORKS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
orks-is-still-orks-more-dakka.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re‐roll a Wound roll of 1. If that enemy unit is within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Wound roll instead.

long-uncontrolled-bursts-more-dakka.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ORKS INFANTRY unit is selected to shoot.
long-uncontrolled-bursts-more-dakka.effect: Your unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER].

bash-and-grab-freebooter-krew.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
bash-and-grab-freebooter-krew.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within range of the loot objective, you can reroll the Wound roll.

boardin-rush-freebooter-krew.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
boardin-rush-freebooter-krew.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

careen-war-horde.when: Any phase, just after an ORKS VEHICLE unit from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed.
careen-war-horde.target: That destroyed ORKS VEHICLE unit, if you rolled a 6 for its Deadly Demise ability. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
careen-war-horde.effect: Your unit can make a Normal or Fall Back move before its Deadly Demise ability is resolved, and before any embarked units perform an Emergency Disembarkation. When making this move, your unit can move over enemy units (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) as if they were not there.

crushing-impact-bully-boyz.when: Your Charge phase, just after a NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army ends a Charge move.
crushing-impact-bully-boyz.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit, then roll one D6 for each model in your unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound for each 4+ instead.

tide-of-muscle-green-tide.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that has not declared a charge this phase.
tide-of-muscle-green-tide.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, add 1 to the Charge roll and, if your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

huge-show-offs-more-dakka.target: One ORKS WALKER unit (excluding KILLA KANS) from your army.
huge-show-offs-more-dakka.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, improve your unit’s Move, Leadership and Objective Control characteristics by 1, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

orks-is-never-beaten-war-horde.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
orks-is-never-beaten-war-horde.target: One ORKS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
orks-is-never-beaten-war-horde.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making attacks, and is then removed from play.

get-stuck-in-ladz-more-dakka.target: One ORKS unit (excluding GRETCHIN) from your army.
get-stuck-in-ladz-more-dakka.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle. Designer’s Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

speediest-freeks-kult-of-speed.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
speediest-freeks-kult-of-speed.target: One SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
speediest-freeks-kult-of-speed.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If your unit is a VEHICLE unit with an unmodified Toughness characteristic of 8 or less, until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save instead.

squig-flingin-kult-of-speed.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit from your army ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
squig-flingin-kult-of-speed.target: That SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit.
squig-flingin-kult-of-speed.effect: Select one enemy unit within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, when doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

more-gitz-over-ere-kult-of-speed.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
more-gitz-over-ere-kult-of-speed.target: One SPEED FREEKS unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
more-gitz-over-ere-kult-of-speed.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

where-dya-fink-youre-going-da-big-hunt.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Fall Back move.
where-dya-fink-youre-going-da-big-hunt.target: One BEAST SNAGGA INFANTRY or BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
where-dya-fink-youre-going-da-big-hunt.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

instinctive-hunters-da-big-hunt.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
instinctive-hunters-da-big-hunt.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy unit.
instinctive-hunters-da-big-hunt.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

unstoppable-momentum-da-big-hunt.when: Your Charge phase, just after a BEAST SNAGGA MOUNTED unit from your army ends a Charge move.
unstoppable-momentum-da-big-hunt.effect: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 6 mortal wounds). If that enemy unit is your Prey, roll three additional D6.

dat-ones-even-bigga-da-big-hunt.target: One BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army.
dat-ones-even-bigga-da-big-hunt.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back. In addition, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for your unit, provided one of the targets of that charge is your Prey.

superfuelled-boiler-dread-mob.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ORKS WALKER unit from your army has been selected to Advance.
superfuelled-boiler-dread-mob.effect: Until the end of the turn, you can re‑roll Advance rolls made for your unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

conniving-runts-dread-mob.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
conniving-runts-dread-mob.target: One GRETCHIN unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units.
conniving-runts-dread-mob.effect: Roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3+1 mortal wounds. Your unit can then make a Normal move.

too-arrogant-to-die-bully-boyz.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
too-arrogant-to-die-bully-boyz.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
too-arrogant-to-die-bully-boyz.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not shot or fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if a Waaagh! is active for your unit. On a 5+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can shoot or fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

always-lookin-fer-a-fight-bully-boyz.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed.
always-lookin-fer-a-fight-bully-boyz.target: One NOBZ or MEGANOBZ unit from your army that destroyed that enemy unit.
always-lookin-fer-a-fight-bully-boyz.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Consolidation move, it can move up to D3+3" instead of up to 3". If a Waaagh! is active for your unit, it can move up to 6" instead.

braggin-rights-green-tide.target: Two BOYZ units from your army that are within 6" of each other.
braggin-rights-green-tide.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, while those two units are within 6" of each other, they both count as containing 10 or more models for the purpose of your Detachment rule, any Enhancements models from your army have and any Stratagems you use.

come-on-ladz-green-tide.target: One BOYZ unit from your army.
come-on-ladz-green-tide.effect: Return up to D3+2 destroyed models to your unit (excluding CHARACTER models).

go-get-em-green-tide.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
go-get-em-green-tide.target: One BOYZ unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
go-get-em-green-tide.effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your unit can make a Go Get ’Em! move. To do so, roll one D6: each model in your unit can move a distance in inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. If your unit contains 10 or more models, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit can move.

dats-ours-taktikal-brigade.target: One ORKS unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
dats-ours-taktikal-brigade.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

taktikal-retreat-taktikal-brigade.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly KOMMANDOS/ STORMBOYZ unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
taktikal-retreat-taktikal-brigade.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

on-to-da-next-taktikal-brigade.when: End of your opponent's Movement phase.
on-to-da-next-taktikal-brigade.target: One friendly unengaged BOYZ/KOMMANDOS/STORMBOYZ unit that was engaged at the start of the phase.
on-to-da-next-taktikal-brigade.effect: Your unit can make a normal move of up to 6".

ded-sneaky-taktikal-brigade.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
ded-sneaky-taktikal-brigade.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves. SPEEDWAAAGH! When a Speedwaaagh! is unleashed, entire planets become Ork speedways. The aliens tear across battlefields and weave through no man's land at breakneck pace, blazing away at anything in their path. So fastmoving are these Orkoid formations that they often punch clean through the enemy lines before their foes truly realise they are in battle. The Orks then haul their jostling vehicles and turboboosted Trukks around, charging back for another pass and then another. As they roar, they fill the air with deafening hails of firepower and choking clouds of dust and fume. Halfblinded, deafened by engines and bellowing, the enemy reels as swarms of light vehicles hit them from every direction. Ordered battle descends into highoctane anarchy as the Orks compete in contests of speed and violence in which their enemies are an unwilling audience and participants. Soon enough, the onceproud ranks of the foe are reduced to mangled ruin and the Orks race onward towards the next battle.

call-dat-dakka-more-dakka.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
call-dat-dakka-more-dakka.target: One ORKS unit from your army that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
call-dat-dakka-more-dakka.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

grab-and-bash-freebooter-krew.target: One Orks unit from your army (excluding Gretchin units) that is within range of the loot objective.
grab-and-bash-freebooter-krew.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, the Waaagh! is active for your unit, even if you have already called a Waaagh! this battle. Designer's Note: This means that any abilities that are in effect while the Waaagh! is active for your army will be in effect for your unit.

deck-fraggers-freebooter-krew.target: One Orks unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
deck-fraggers-freebooter-krew.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit targets an Infantry unit with a ranged weapon, that weapon has the [BLAST] ability.

rolling-loot-heap-freebooter-krew.target: One FLASH GITZ unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
rolling-loot-heap-freebooter-krew.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ANTI‑VEHICLE 4+] ability.

krump-and-run-freebooter-krew.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit falls back.
krump-and-run-freebooter-krew.target: One Orks unit from your army that was within engagement range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase and is not within range of one or more enemy units.
krump-and-run-freebooter-krew.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6". 10

speshul-shells-more-dakka.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly ORKS INFANTRY unit is selected to shoot.
speshul-shells-more-dakka.effect: Your unit's ranged attacks that target a unit within 9" have +1 AP. CALL DAT DAKKA?

brutal-broadside-rollin-deff.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly BATTLEWAGON unit is selected to shoot.
brutal-broadside-rollin-deff.effect: Your unit's ranged attacks (excluding attacks made by weapons selected with Firing Deck) have [RAPID FIRE X], where X is that attack's A.

impending-crunch-rollin-deff.when: Your Charge phase, when a friendly WAGON unit ends a charge move.
impending-crunch-rollin-deff.effect: Each enemy unit engaged with your unit makes a battleshock roll, with -1 to that battleshock roll.

devastating-drift-rollin-deff.when: Your Fight phase, when a friendly WAGON unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
devastating-drift-rollin-deff.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have [CLEAVE 1]. MORE DAKKA! A HORDE OF GUNCRAZED ORKS UNLEASH A DEVASTATING STORM OF DAKKA INTO THE ENEMY

boarding-ramps-rollin-deff.raw_text: WAGON unit only. When a unit embarked within this unit is selected to make a disembark move, that unit has +1 to charge rolls until the end of the turn.

targetin-gizmos-rollin-deff.raw_text: WAGON unit only. While a BIG MEK model is embarked within this unit: This unit's ranged attacks have [IGNORES COVER]. If the Waaagh! is active for this unit, this unit's ranged attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

dakka-dakka-dakka-dread-mob.target: One ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
dakka-dakka-dakka-dread-mob.effect: Each time you use this Stratagem, you can choose to push it. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Hit roll of 1. If you chose to push it, you can re‑roll the Hit roll instead and, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well.

dakka-dakka-dakka-more-dakka.raw_text: Friendly ORKS INFANTRY units' ranged attacks have [ASSAULT]. In your Shooting phase, if the Waaagh! is active for your army, friendly ORKS INFANTRY units' ranged attacks have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

adrenaline-junkies.raw_text: SPEED FREEKS units from your army are eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which they Advanced or Fell Back.

da-hunt-is-on.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, select one MONSTER, VEHICLE or CHARACTER unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is your Prey: Each time a BEAST SNAGGA unit from your army declares a charge that includes your Prey as one of the targets, you can re-roll the Charge roll. Each time a BEAST SNAGGA model from your army makes an attack that targets your Prey, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

try-dat-button.raw_text: Each time a MEK, ORKS WALKER or GROTS VEHICLE unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, roll one D6. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the corresponding ability shown in the table below. - Alternatively, when such a unit is selected to shoot or fight, you can select one of the abilities above instead of rolling the D6. If you do, until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability as well. If a weapon equipped by a model from you army has the [HAZARDOUS] ability from multiple sources, each time you take a Hazardous test for that weapon, it is failed on a roll of a 1 or a 2.

get-stuck-in.raw_text: Melee weapons equipped by ORKS models from your army have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

da-boss-is-watchin.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, in a turn in which you have not called a Waaagh!, if you have one or more WARBOSS models on the battlefield (or embarked within a TRANSPORT that is on the battlefield), you can call a Waaagh! for a second time this battle. When doing so, that second Waaagh! only counts as having been called for WARBOSS, NOBZ and MEGANOBZ units from your army.

mob-mentality.raw_text: Each time an attack targets a BOYZ unit from your army, models in that unit have a 6+ invulnerable save against that attack. Each time an attack targets a BOYZ unit from your army that contains 10 or more models, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save against that attack.

lissen-ere.raw_text: Once per battle round, in your Command phase or after being set up on the battlefield in your Movement phase, each BOSS SNIKROT, MEK and WARBOSS model in your army can issue Taktiks abilities. To do so, select one of the Taktiks abilities below and select one friendly ORKS unit within 6" of that model to issue them to. That model must take a Leadership test: if failed, the selected unit suffers 1 mortal wound. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected unit is affected by the selected Taktik. A unit cannot have Taktiks issued to it in this way more than once per battle round. Taktiks abilities cannot be issued to Battle-shocked units, and if a unit affected by Taktiks becomes Battle-shocked, all Taktiks cease to affect that unit while it is Battle-shocked. Get Stuck In: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit. Get On Wiv It: Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in this unit. Sneaky Stalkin’: INFANTRY and MOUNTED models (excluding MEGANOBZ) in this unit have the Stealth ability and each time a ranged attack targets this unit, those models have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. Shoota Drills: Each time an INFANTRY or MOUNTED model in this unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

here-be-loot.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, select one objective marker. Until the start of your next Command phase, that objective marker is your loot objective. Each time a model in an ORKS INFANTRY, ORKS MOUNTED or ORKS WALKER unit from your army makes an attack, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability if either or both of the following are true: That model’s unit is within range of your loot objective. That attack targets a unit within range of your loot objective.

turbo-boostas.raw_text: Each time a SPEED FREEKS or TRUKK unit (excluding AIRCRAFT) from your army Advances, it can use its turbo. If it does, do not make an Advance roll for it; instead, until the end of the phase, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 24" but can only move in one straight line, and until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by those models have the [ASSAULT] ability and that unit cannot declare a charge. Designer’s Note: *When a unit uses its turbo, the models in that unit cannot pivot, and they cannot make a move of two or more straight lines (e.g. to navigate around obstacles). That unit also cannot declare a charge, even if another rule would let it declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.*

blackwing-shroud-shadowmark-talon.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Infiltrators ability.

coronal-susurrant-shadowmark-talon.raw_text:
PHOBOS model only. The bearer has the following ability:

Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

umbral-raptor-shadowmark-talon.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

hunters-instincts-shadowmark-talon.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

armour-of-contempt-company-of-hunters.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-company-of-hunters.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-company-of-hunters.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stunning-fusillade-shadowmark-talon.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stunning-fusillade-shadowmark-talon.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that is more than 12" away, improve the Ballistic Skill and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lay-low-the-tyrants-shadowmark-talon.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
lay-low-the-tyrants-shadowmark-talon.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PRECISION] ability.

raptorial-vigilance-shadowmark-talon.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.&x20;
raptorial-vigilance-shadowmark-talon.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
raptorial-vigilance-shadowmark-talon.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or up to 6" instead if it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit.

feint-and-thrust-shadowmark-talon.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
feint-and-thrust-shadowmark-talon.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If it is a PHOBOS or SCOUT SQUAD unit, it is also eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

into-darkness-shadowmark-talon.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
into-darkness-shadowmark-talon.target: Up to two PHOBOS and/or SCOUT SQUAD units from your army, or one other ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
into-darkness-shadowmark-talon.effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

immolator-forgefathers-seekers.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of Torrent weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

war-tempered-artifice-forgefathers-seeke.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Add 3 to the Strength characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.

forged-in-battle-forgefathers-seekers.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a Hit roll or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

adamantine-mantle-forgefathers-seekers.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack. If that attack was made with a Melta or Torrent weapon, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 1 instead.

armour-of-contempt-forgefathers-seekers.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-forgefathers-seekers.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-forgefathers-seekers.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

crucible-of-battle-forgefathers-seekers.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
crucible-of-battle-forgefathers-seekers.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
crucible-of-battle-forgefathers-seekers.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest eligible target within 6", add 1 to the Wound roll.

burning-vengeance-forgefathers-seekers.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
burning-vengeance-forgefathers-seekers.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES TRANSPORT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
burning-vengeance-forgefathers-seekers.effect: One unit embarked within that TRANSPORT can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that enemy unit when doing so, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

immolation-protocols-forgefathers-seeker.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
immolation-protocols-forgefathers-seeker.effect: Until the end of the phase, Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

wrathful-inferno-forgefathers-seekers.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
wrathful-inferno-forgefathers-seekers.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

blazing-earth-forgefathers-seekers.when: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.
blazing-earth-forgefathers-seekers.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army equipped with one or more Torrent weapons.
blazing-earth-forgefathers-seekers.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES and units with the FLY keyword) within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, each time that enemy unit declares a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

swift-hunter-saga-of-the-hunter.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 7" ability.

fenrisian-grit-saga-of-the-hunter.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

wolf-master-saga-of-the-hunter.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly SPACE WOLVES unit within 9" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, teeth and claws and Tyrnak and Fenrir weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

feral-rage-saga-of-the-hunter.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, add an additional 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons.

braggarts-steel-saga-of-the-bold.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. Add 2 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer’s unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of those weapons as well.

skjald-saga-of-the-bold.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time a SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army achieves a Boast, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

hordeslayer-saga-of-the-bold.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. At the start of the Fight phase, if there are more enemy models than friendly models wholly within 6" of the bearer, until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. If the bearer’s unit has achieved one or more Boasts, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic instead.

thunderwolfs-fortitude-saga-of-the-bold.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The first time the bearer is destroyed, remove it from play, then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set the bearer back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

wolf-touched-saga-of-the-beastslayer.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. Add 2" to the Move characteristic of the bearer. In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WULFEN INFANTRY unit.

hunters-guile-saga-of-the-beastslayer.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY, WULFEN and/or BLOOD CLAWS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

elders-guidance-saga-of-the-beastslayer.raw_text: SPACE WOLVES model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, if the bearer is leading a BLOOD CLAWS unit, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit by 1.

helm-of-the-beastslayer-saga-of-the-beas.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time an attack made by a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE model targets the bearer’s unit, reduce the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

grimnars-mark-saga-of-the-great-wolf.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, Adeptus Astartes Terminator Captain model only. you can select one of the Hunting Packs Once per battle round, you can target this unit with listed below. Until the start of your next

howlmaw-saga-of-the-great-wolf.raw_text: WOLF PRIEST model only. At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 6" of the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock, subtracting 1 from the result.

chariots-of-the-storm-saga-of-the-great-.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

skjalds-foretelling-saga-of-the-great-wo.raw_text: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LANCE] ability.

unbridled-ferocity-saga-of-the-beastslay.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
unbridled-ferocity-saga-of-the-beastslay.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

overwhelming-onslaught-saga-of-the-hunte.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
overwhelming-onslaught-saga-of-the-hunte.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, or one SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
overwhelming-onslaught-saga-of-the-hunte.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

marked-for-destruction-saga-of-the-hunte.target: Two ADEPTUS ASTARTES units from your army (excluding BEASTS) that have not been selected to shoot this phase.
marked-for-destruction-saga-of-the-hunte.effect: Select one enemy unit visible to both of your units. Until the end of the phase, models in your units can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target) and each time a model in one of your units makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1.

inspiring-presence-saga-of-the-bold.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
inspiring-presence-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

champions-guidance-saga-of-the-bold.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
champions-guidance-saga-of-the-bold.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
champions-guidance-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

birth-of-a-saga-saga-of-the-bold.target: One Wolf Guard Headtaker or Wolf Guard Terminator Pack Leader model from your army.
birth-of-a-saga-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your model has the CHARACTER keyword. Designer’s Note: While in effect, your model’s unit is therefore a CHARACTER unit, meaning it can interact with the Heroes All rule (see Detachment Rules section), in addition to other rules that interact with CHARACTER units.

alpha-strike-saga-of-the-bold.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army.
alpha-strike-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

heroic-resolve-saga-of-the-bold.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
heroic-resolve-saga-of-the-bold.target: One SPACE WOLVES CHARACTER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
heroic-resolve-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

countercharge-saga-of-the-bold.when: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.
countercharge-saga-of-the-bold.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.
countercharge-saga-of-the-bold.effect: Your unit now declares a charge that targets only one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase. Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

shock-cavalry-saga-of-the-beastslayer.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
shock-cavalry-saga-of-the-beastslayer.target: One THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
shock-cavalry-saga-of-the-beastslayer.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but unless it is making a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

pinning-fire-saga-of-the-beastslayer.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
pinning-fire-saga-of-the-beastslayer.effect: Until the end of the phase, after your unit has shot, select one enemy CHARACTER, MONSTER, or VEHICLE unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that unit is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

thunderous-pursuit-saga-of-the-beastslay.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
thunderous-pursuit-saga-of-the-beastslay.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
thunderous-pursuit-saga-of-the-beastslay.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If your unit has the SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or THUNDERWOLF CAVALRY keywords, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead.

impetuosity-saga-of-the-beastslayer.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
impetuosity-saga-of-the-beastslayer.target: One WULFEN INFANTRY or BLOOD CLAWS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
impetuosity-saga-of-the-beastslayer.effect: Until the end of the phase, after that enemy unit has shot, if one or more models in your unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, your unit can make an Impetuous move. To do so, roll one D6: your unit can be moved a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

coordinated-strike-saga-of-the-beastslay.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
coordinated-strike-saga-of-the-beastslay.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
coordinated-strike-saga-of-the-beastslay.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

envelop-and-ensnare-saga-of-the-hunter.target: One SPACE WOLVES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
envelop-and-ensnare-saga-of-the-hunter.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile‑in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3". When doing so, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest enemy model, provided it ends that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit.

territorial-advantage-saga-of-the-hunter.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit is destroyed by an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
territorial-advantage-saga-of-the-hunter.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

chosen-prey-saga-of-the-hunter.when: Your Movement phase, just after a SPACE WOLVES unit from your army Falls Back.
chosen-prey-saga-of-the-hunter.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

bounding-advance-saga-of-the-hunter.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
bounding-advance-saga-of-the-hunter.target: One SPACE WOLVES INFANTRY or SPACE WOLVES BEASTS unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declared a charge this phase.
bounding-advance-saga-of-the-hunter.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but unless it is making a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.

runes-of-claiming-champions-of-fenris.target: One friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER unit.
runes-of-claiming-champions-of-fenris.effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

the-foe-foreseen-saga-of-the-great-wolf.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
the-foe-foreseen-saga-of-the-great-wolf.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
the-foe-foreseen-saga-of-the-great-wolf.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

unrelenting-hunters-saga-of-the-great-wo.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
unrelenting-hunters-saga-of-the-great-wo.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a Space Wolves unit, until the end of the turn, it is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

grimnars-command-saga-of-the-great-wolf.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army.
grimnars-command-saga-of-the-great-wolf.effect: Select one Hunting Pack from the Master of Wolves Detachment rule. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hunting Pack is active for your unit instead of any other Hunting Pack that is active, even if you have already selected that Hunting Pack this battle.

eye-of-the-pack-saga-of-the-great-wolf.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
eye-of-the-pack-saga-of-the-great-wolf.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can add 1 to the Wound roll.

battle-instincts-saga-of-the-great-wolf.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
battle-instincts-saga-of-the-great-wolf.target: One Space Wolves unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks.
battle-instincts-saga-of-the-great-wolf.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". 6

fenrisian-ferocity-saga-of-the-great-wol.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
fenrisian-ferocity-saga-of-the-great-wol.target: One Adeptus Astartes Mounted or Adeptus Astartes Walker unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
fenrisian-ferocity-saga-of-the-great-wol.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within Engagement Range of them.

chilling-howl-legends-of-saga-and-song.target: One friendly WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS unit.
chilling-howl-legends-of-saga-and-song.effect: Select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit makes a battleshock roll, with 1 to that battleshock roll if that enemy unit is at or below halfstrength.

wolf-totems-champions-of-fenris.when: Any phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER unit suffers a mortal wound.
wolf-totems-champions-of-fenris.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER unit.
wolf-totems-champions-of-fenris.effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.

stalk-between-worlds-champions-of-fenris.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER unit.
stalk-between-worlds-champions-of-fenris.target: That ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER unit.

fangs-of-the-pack-legends-of-saga-and-so.when: Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit is selected to fight.

wings-of-the-blizzard-legends-of-saga-an.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
wings-of-the-blizzard-legends-of-saga-an.target: One friendly unengaged ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR unit.
wings-of-the-blizzard-legends-of-saga-an.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves.

grizzled-killers-veterans-of-the-fang.when: Fight phase, when a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit is selected to fight.
grizzled-killers-veterans-of-the-fang.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have: [SUSTAINED HITS 1]. OR: [LETHAL HITS].

icy-calm-veterans-of-the-fang.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly GREY HUNTERS unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
icy-calm-veterans-of-the-fang.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.

blade-keen-senses-veterans-of-the-fang.target: One friendly unengaged GREY HUNTERS unit.
blade-keen-senses-veterans-of-the-fang.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 24" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

a-giant-amongst-giants-champions-of-fenr.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. This model has +2 W. This model's melee attacks have +1 S.

preyslayer-champions-of-fenris.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. This unit can reroll advance rolls and countercharge rolls.

thirst-for-glory-legends-of-saga-and-son.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. This unit has +1 OC.

fierce-example-legends-of-saga-and-song.raw_text: WOLF GUARD TERMINATORS unit only. This unit has +1 T.

eye-of-the-hunter-veterans-of-the-fang.raw_text: WOLF GUARD BATTLE LEADER model only. This unit's ranged attacks have: [ASSAULT]. [IGNORES COVER]. +1 AP.

weaver-of-sagas-veterans-of-the-fang.raw_text: WOLF PRIEST model only. (Once per battle-round, per army) In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit's move, you can: Select one friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit within 6" of this unit. That unit is no longer battle-shocked. O r: Select one friendly GREY HUNTERS unit within 18" of this unit. That unit is no longer battle-shocked.

kroot-linebreakers.raw_text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

aggressive-deployment.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

air-caste-colossus.raw_text: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

fireknife.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

weapon-support-systems.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

gun-drone.raw_text: The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

marker-drone.raw_text: The bearer’s unit has the MARKERLIGHT keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

shield-drone.raw_text: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic.

drone-harassment-tactics.raw_text: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

forward-observers.raw_text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

homing-beacon.raw_text: Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and more than 9" away from all enemy units.

pulse-bombs.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

bounty-hunters.raw_text: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

pech-ra.raw_text: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

target-uploaded.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

grav-inhibitor-drone.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer’s unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

pulse-accelerator-drone.raw_text: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of pulse carbines equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

recon-drone.raw_text: The bearer is equipped with 1 drone burst cannon and the bearer’s unit has the Infiltrators ability.

suppression-volley.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

ds8-support-turret.raw_text:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

guardian-drone.raw_text: Each time a model makes a ranged attack that targets the bearer’s unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

exemplars-of-mont-ka.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

neocapacitor-shields.raw_text: At the start of your opponent’s Charge phase, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within 12" of this unit. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test and, until the end of the turn, subtract 1 from Charge rolls made for that unit.

retro-thrusters.raw_text: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit was eligible to fight this phase, this unit can either make a Normal move of up to 6" or a Fall Back move.

mv15-gun-drone.raw_text: The bearer is equipped with 1 twin pulse blaster.

starscythe.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

battlesuit-support-systems.raw_text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

transport-bay.raw_text: The bearer has the TRANSPORT keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 TACTICAL DRONES models.

breach-and-clear.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

heavy-walker.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

support-system.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

tidewall-cover.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

loping-pounce.raw_text: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly KROOT INFANTRY units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

failure-is-not-an-option.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

coordinated-leadership.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

hover-drone.raw_text: The bearer can FLY and has a Move characteristic of 10".

battlesuit-support-system.raw_text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

nova-charge.raw_text: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

weapon-support-system.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

missile-drone.raw_text: The bearer is equipped with the following ranged weapon:

way-of-the-short-blade.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

puretide-s-teachings.raw_text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

independent-power.raw_text: If your army includes COMMANDER FARSIGHT, it cannot include any ETHEREAL units. If your army includes any ETHEREAL units, it cannot include COMMANDER FARSIGHT.

kroot-packmates.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

agile-combatant.raw_text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

hero-of-the-empire-aura.raw_text: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

advanced-guardian-drone.raw_text: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

command-link-drone-aura.raw_text: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

stealth-drones.raw_text:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

velocity-tracker.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

targeting-array.raw_text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

airborne-agility.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

oversight-drone.raw_text: Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

coldstar-commander.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 12" and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

shield-generator.raw_text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

trail-finding.raw_text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model’s unit, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

kroot-ambush.raw_text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

tidewall-defence-platform.raw_text: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

advanced-armour.raw_text: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

enforcer-commander.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

volley-fire.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

crack-shot.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

ground-strike-fighter.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

structural-analyser.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

jammer-array.raw_text: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

armour-hunter.raw_text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

droneport.raw_text: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

sunforge.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

precise-targeting.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fieldcraft.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

war-leader.raw_text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when it is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

root-of-honour.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly KROOT unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

advanced-scouting.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fire-and-fade.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

ritual-butchery.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

rites-of-feasting.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, until the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

jet-pack-insertion.raw_text: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this Transport can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

photon-casters.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy Infantry unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

thunderous-pounce.raw_text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Knarloc beak and talons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

loping-stride.raw_text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

baggage-harness-aura.raw_text: While a friendly Kroot unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

drone-escort.raw_text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'au Empire unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

markerlight.raw_text: The bearer has the Markerlight keyword.

coordinated-strike.raw_text: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

exemplar-of-the-kauyon-kauyon.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Patient Hunter Detachment rule applies to that unit from the second battle round onwards instead of from the third.

precision-of-the-patient-hunter-kauyon.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. From the third battle round onwards, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

solid-image-projection-unit-kauyon.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three T’AU EMPIRE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

through-unity-devastation-kauyon.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

exemplar-of-the-montka-montka.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, the Killing Blow Detachment rule applies to that unit during the fourth battle round as well.

strike-swiftly-montka.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the battle, before any moves are made using the Scouts ability, you can select up to two friendly T’AU EMPIRE units within 6" of the bearer that do not have the Scouts ability. Until the end of the battle, all models in the selected units have the Scouts 6" ability.

strategic-conqueror-montka.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, select one objective marker on the battlefield. While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE model is within range of that objective marker and the bearer is on the battlefield, add 1 to that friendly model’s Objective Control characteristic.

coordinated-exploitation-montka.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT SHAPER models). While the bearer is leading a unit, each time that unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in a Guided unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability while targeting their Spotted unit.

puretide-engram-neurochip-retaliation-ca.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

starflare-ignition-system-retaliation-ca.raw_text: T’au EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

internal-grenade-racks-retaliation-cadre.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. The bearer has the GRENADES keyword, and each time the bearer ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move. If you do, roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

prototype-weapon-system-retaliation-cadr.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model only. Each time the bearer is selected to shoot, select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until those attacks are resolved, ranged weapons equipped by the bearer have the selected ability.

kroothawk-flock-kroot-hunting-pack.raw_text: KROOT model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of the bearer.

nomadic-hunter-kroot-hunting-pack.raw_text: KROOT TRAIL SHAPER model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, add 3" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

root-carved-weapons-kroot-hunting-pack.raw_text: KROOT WAR SHAPER model only. All weapons equipped by the bearer have the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

borthrod-gland-kroot-hunting-pack.raw_text: KROOT FLESH SHAPER only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

student-of-kauyon-auxiliary-cadre.raw_text: KROOT SHAPER model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select up to three friendly KROOT CARNIVORES/FARSTALKERS units. Those units have Deep Strike.

admired-leader-auxiliary-cadre.raw_text: T'AU EMPIRE model only (excluding KROOT models). In your Command phase, you can select one KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit within 12" of this model. If you do, that unit has +1 Ld and OC until the start of your next Command phase.

fanatical-convert-auxiliary-cadre.raw_text: KROOT model only. The bearer’s unit has the For the Greater Good ability (see Codex: T’au Empire).

transponder-lock-module-auxiliary-cadre.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE WALKER model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. During your first Movement phase, when you set up the bearer’s unit, it must be set up within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units and not within 9" horizontally of one or more enemy units.

supernova-launcher-experimental-prototyp.raw_text: BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model's Airbursting Fragmentation Projector weapons. That weapon's attacks have: +3 S +1 AP and D.

thermoneutronic-projector-experimental-p.raw_text: BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model's T'au Flamer weapons. That weapon's attacks have: + 2 S +1 AP and D.

plasma-accelerator-rifle-experimental-pr.raw_text: BATTLESUIT model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, select one of this model's Plasma Rifle weapons. That weapon's attacks have: +2 S + 1 A, AP and D.

fusion-blades-experimental-prototype-cad.raw_text: T’AU EMPIRE model only. Select one fusion blaster equipped by the bearer. Improve the Attacks characteristic of that weapon by 1, improve the Strength characteristic of that weapon by 3, and that weapon has the [MELTA 4] ability

the-arrokon-protocol-retaliation-cadre.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
the-arrokon-protocol-retaliation-cadre.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit that contains 6 or more models, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. If that attack targets an enemy unit that contains 11 or more models, it has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead.

focused-fire-montka.target: Two T’AU EMPIRE units from your army that have not been selected to shoot this phase, and one enemy unit.
focused-fire-montka.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in either of your units makes an attack, it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target for that attack), and when resolving that attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic by 1.
focused-fire-montka.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the fourth or fifth battle rounds.

combat-debarkation-montka.target: One T’AU EMPIRE INFANTRY unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
combat-debarkation-montka.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

pinpoint-counter-offensive-montka.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
pinpoint-counter-offensive-montka.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a T’AU EMPIRE unit (excluding KROOT units) from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

aggressive-mobility-montka.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
aggressive-mobility-montka.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

a-trap-well-laid-kroot-hunting-pack.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
a-trap-well-laid-kroot-hunting-pack.target: One KROOT unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
a-trap-well-laid-kroot-hunting-pack.effect: After your unit has resolved its attacks this phase, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, unless the attacking unit is Battle-shocked, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

reactive-impact-dampeners-experimental-p.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
reactive-impact-dampeners-experimental-p.target: One T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
reactive-impact-dampeners-experimental-p.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

experimental-weaponry-experimental-proto.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
experimental-weaponry-experimental-proto.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time you roll one or more dice to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in your unit, you can re‐roll the result.

a-tempting-trap-kauyon.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase. The first time you use this Stratagem, you must also select one objective marker that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone; until the end of the battle, this becomes your Trap objective marker.
a-tempting-trap-kauyon.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of your Trap objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.
a-tempting-trap-kauyon.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

point-blank-ambush-kauyon.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
point-blank-ambush-kauyon.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
point-blank-ambush-kauyon.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem during the first or second battle rounds.

coordinate-to-engage-kauyon.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has just been selected as an Observer unit (see For the Greater Good).
coordinate-to-engage-kauyon.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and, if your unit has the Markerlight keyword, that attack has the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

wall-of-mirrors-kauyon.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
wall-of-mirrors-kauyon.target: One STEALTH, GHOSTKEEL or COMMANDER SHADOWSUN unit from your army.
wall-of-mirrors-kauyon.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
wall-of-mirrors-kauyon.restrictions: You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

multisensory-scanning-auxiliary-cadre.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
multisensory-scanning-auxiliary-cadre.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
multisensory-scanning-auxiliary-cadre.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If it is a KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll instead.

alien-expertise-auxiliary-cadre.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly KROOT/VESPID STINGWINGS unit is selected to make an advance move.
alien-expertise-auxiliary-cadre.effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.

guided-fire-auxiliary-cadre.target: One T’AU EMPIRE unit from your army (excluding KROOT and VESPID STINGWINGS units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
guided-fire-auxiliary-cadre.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit. If your unit is wholly within 9" of one or more KROOT or VESPID STINGWINGS units from your army, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit instead.

join-the-hunt-kroot-hunting-pack.target: One KROOT INFANTRY or KROOT HOUNDS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
join-the-hunt-kroot-hunting-pack.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
join-the-hunt-kroot-hunting-pack.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fail-safe-detonator-retaliation-cadre.when: Any phase, just after a T’AU EMPIRE BATTLESUIT model from your army is destroyed.
fail-safe-detonator-retaliation-cadre.target: That destroyed model’s unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even if that unit was just destroyed.
fail-safe-detonator-retaliation-cadre.effect: Before removing your model from play, if it has the Deadly Demise ability, do not roll for that ability; instead, you can choose whether the result of that roll is a 1 or a 6.
