synaptic-shield-warrior-bioform-onslaugh.effect: &x20;If that unit is a TYRANID WARRIORS unit, select up to one ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army, that is not Battle‑shocked, within 6" of it. Until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack targets one of those units, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

untrammelled-ferocity-crusher-stampede.target: One TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
untrammelled-ferocity-crusher-stampede.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so: ■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them. ■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

corrosive-viscera-crusher-stampede.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot Fly is destroyed.
corrosive-viscera-crusher-stampede.target: That TYRANIDS MONSTER model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
corrosive-viscera-crusher-stampede.effect: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

synaptic-goading-unending-swarm.when: Any phase, just before an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.
synaptic-goading-unending-swarm.effect: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit). All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.

preservation-imperative-unending-swarm.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
preservation-imperative-unending-swarm.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
preservation-imperative-unending-swarm.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the [BLAST] ability.

seeded-broods-vanguard-onslaught.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that is in Reserves, or up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are in Reserves.
seeded-broods-vanguard-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

unseen-lurkers-vanguard-onslaught.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
unseen-lurkers-vanguard-onslaught.target: One VANGUARD INVADER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
unseen-lurkers-vanguard-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.

invisible-hunter-vanguard-onslaught.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
invisible-hunter-vanguard-onslaught.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army, or one TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army.
invisible-hunter-vanguard-onslaught.effect: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.
invisible-hunter-vanguard-onslaught.restrictions: The targeted units must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

death-frenzy-invasion-fleet.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
death-frenzy-invasion-fleet.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
death-frenzy-invasion-fleet.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

overrun-invasion-fleet.when: Fight phase, just before a TYRANIDS unit from your army Consolidates.
overrun-invasion-fleet.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

predatory-imperative-invasion-fleet.target: Up to two TYRANIDS units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other TYRANIDS unit from your army.
predatory-imperative-invasion-fleet.effect: Select one Hyper-adaptation. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.
predatory-imperative-invasion-fleet.restrictions: You cannot select the same Hyper-adaptation you selected at the start of the first battle round.

endless-swarm-invasion-fleet.target: Up to two ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army.
endless-swarm-invasion-fleet.effect: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each of those selected units.

reclaim-biomass-assimilation-swarm.when: Any phase, when a TYRANIDS unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model in it is removed from play.
reclaim-biomass-assimilation-swarm.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.
reclaim-biomass-assimilation-swarm.effect: Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit within 6" of your HARVESTER unit (See Feed the Swarm).

tyrannoformed-assimilation-swarm.target: One HARVESTER unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.
tyrannoformed-assimilation-swarm.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

secure-biomass-assimilation-swarm.target: One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
secure-biomass-assimilation-swarm.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability. If your unit is a HARVESTER unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.

unending-waves-unending-swarm.target: One ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
unending-waves-unending-swarm.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
unending-waves-unending-swarm.restrictions: Any destroyed CHARACTER units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

hypersensory-scillia-vanguard-onslaught.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
hypersensory-scillia-vanguard-onslaught.target: Up to two VANGUARD INVADER units from your army that are within 9" of that enemy unit, or one other TYRANIDS INFANTRY unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit.
hypersensory-scillia-vanguard-onslaught.effect: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".
hypersensory-scillia-vanguard-onslaught.restrictions: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

adaptive-optimisation-subterranean-assau.target: One Mawloc or Trygon unit from your army.
adaptive-optimisation-subterranean-assau.effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the Synapse keyword.

replenishing-swarms-subterranean-assault.target: One Tyranids unit from your army, wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.
replenishing-swarms-subterranean-assault.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 to your unit, with their full wounds remaining, instead.

spontaneous-hypercorrosion-warrior-biofo.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
spontaneous-hypercorrosion-warrior-biofo.target: &x20;One TYRANIDS unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
spontaneous-hypercorrosion-warrior-biofo.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit and add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by TYRANID WARRIORS and WINGED TYRANID PRIME models in your unit.

counterpredation-ambush-predators.when: Fight phase, when a friendly DEATHLEAPER/LICTOR/ NEUROLICTOR/VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit is selected to fight.
counterpredation-ambush-predators.effect: Your unit's attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 S and AP.

hypersensory-adaptations-ambush-predator.target: One friendly DEATHLEAPER/LICTOR/NEUROLICTOR/VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit.
hypersensory-adaptations-ambush-predator.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.

scanner-gheist-ambush-predators.when: End of your opponent's Fight phase.
scanner-gheist-ambush-predators.target: One friendly unengaged DEATHLEAPER/LICTOR/ NEUROLICTOR unit.
scanner-gheist-ambush-predators.effect: Place your unit in strategic reserves.

catalytic-biofortification-talons-of-the.when: Any phase, when a friendly NORN ASSIMILATOR unit suffers a mortal wound.
catalytic-biofortification-talons-of-the.effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.

lesser-prey-talons-of-the-norn-queen.when: Fight phase, when a friendly NORN ASSIMILATOR/NORN EMISSARY unit is selected to fight.
lesser-prey-talons-of-the-norn-queen.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have +2 S.

tanglestrike-rounds-talons-of-the-norn-q.when: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly NORN ASSIMILATOR unit has shot.
tanglestrike-rounds-talons-of-the-norn-q.effect: Select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit is tethered until the start of your next Command phase: While a unit is tethered, that unit has 2" M.

encircling-horrors-ambush-predators.raw_text: NEUROLICTOR/LICTOR/VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit only. In your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

cryptophotaic-camouflage-ambush-predator.raw_text: VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit only. This unit has 3" detection range.

destabilising-predation-talons-of-the-no.raw_text: NORN EMISSARY unit only. This unit's ranged attacks have [ANTICHARACTER 2+].

synaptoprescience-talons-of-the-norn-que.raw_text: NORN ASSIMILATOR unit only. This unit has 4+ InSv.

synaptic-imperatives.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a TYRANIDS unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle. Synaptic Augmentation: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. Surging Vitality: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit. Goaded to Slaughter: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

surprise-assault.raw_text: Each time a TYRANIDS model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. Each time a BURROWER unit from your army is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, place a 40mm circular Tunnel Marker anywhere on the battlefield within 1" of that unit and more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units. In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, when you set up a unit on the battlefield from Reserves, you can set that unit up wholly within 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy units. If an enemy model (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends any kind of move within 3" of one of your Tunnel Markers, that Tunnel Marker is removed from the battlefield.

leader-beasts.raw_text: TYRANID WARRIORS, TYRANID PRIME WITH LASH WHIP and WINGED TYRANID PRIME units from your army have a 5+ invulnerable save.

enraged-behemoths.raw_text: Each time a TYRANIDS MONSTER model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength. In addition, while a TYRANIDS MONSTER unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is at its Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

insurmountable-odds.raw_text: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has finished making its attacks, if one or more models from one or more ENDLESS MULTITUDE units from your army were destroyed as a result of those attacks, each such unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: that unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but that unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of enemy units. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked.

questing-tendrils.raw_text: TYRANIDS units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. VANGUARD INVADER units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.

vanguard-prime.raw_text: DEATHLEAPER loses the Hunter Organism rule and can be your WARLORD.

hyper-adaptations.raw_text: At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for TYRANIDS units from your army until the end of the battle. Swarming Instincts Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an INFANTRY or SWARM unit, that attack has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Hyper-aggression Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] ability. Hive Predators Each time a TYRANIDS model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, on a Critical Hit, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.

feed-the-swarm.raw_text: In your Command phase, each HARVESTER unit from your army can Regenerate one friendly TYRANIDS unit that is within 6" of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. Each time a unit regenerates, do one of the following: One model in that unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds. One destroyed INFANTRY model (excluding CHARACTERS) is returned to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

armour-of-antoninus-blade-of-ultramar.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+ and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

oath-of-macragge-blade-of-ultramar.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, add 2 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

student-of-the-codex-blade-of-ultramar.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, it can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the start of your next Command phase, the Tactical Doctrine is active for this unit (instead of any other Combat Doctrine you select to be active for your army, and even if there is no Combat Doctrine active for your army).

veteran-of-behemoth-blade-of-ultramar.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, while the bearer’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit.

seals-of-reconquest-reclamation-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

avenging-avatar-aura-reclamation-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. In the Battle‑shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of the bearer, that enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

scroll-of-proclamation-reclamation-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer’s unit declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Charge roll.

liberatum-reclamation-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if the target is within range of an objective marker, you can re‑roll the Hit roll and you can re‑roll the Wound roll.

armour-of-contempt-blade-of-ultramar.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

ultramarian-adaptivity-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
ultramarian-adaptivity-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Select the Devastator Doctrine, Tactical Doctrine or Assault Doctrine. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for your unit instead of any other Combat Doctrine that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine this battle.

exemplary-vigilance-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
exemplary-vigilance-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

tactical-foresight-blade-of-ultramar.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
tactical-foresight-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
tactical-foresight-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than or equal to the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

practical-tactics-blade-of-ultramar.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.&x20;
practical-tactics-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 9" of the enemy unit that just ended that move.&x20;
practical-tactics-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is under the effects of the Tactical Doctrine.

courage-and-honour-blade-of-ultramar.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
courage-and-honour-blade-of-ultramar.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] ability. If your unit is under the effects of the Assault Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1 as well.

crusading-conquerors-reclamation-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
crusading-conquerors-reclamation-force.effect: Until the start of the next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit.

scions-of-guilliman-reclamation-force.when: Your Movement phase, just after an ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army ends a Fall Back move.
scions-of-guilliman-reclamation-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

furious-dedication-reclamation-force.when: Your Charge phase or the Fight phase.
furious-dedication-reclamation-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not declared a charge or been selected to fight this phase.
furious-dedication-reclamation-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, add 2 to Charge rolls made for your unit and add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.
furious-dedication-reclamation-force.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per turn.

ultramarian-destiny-reclamation-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
ultramarian-destiny-reclamation-force.effect: Select one objective marker you control that your unit is within range of. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fight-to-the-end-reclamation-force.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets
fight-to-the-end-reclamation-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
fight-to-the-end-reclamation-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

marching-ever-on-reclamation-force.when: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit Falls Back.
marching-ever-on-reclamation-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was within Engagement Range of that enemy unit at the start of the phase.
marching-ever-on-reclamation-force.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6"+1.

spearpoint-paragon-spearpoint-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. Each time the bearer ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons by 2 instead.

hunters-eye-spearpoint-task-force.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] and [IGNORES COVER] abilities.

chogorian-huntmaster-spearpoint-task-for.raw_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED model only. If the bearer’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

armour-of-contempt-spearpoint-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
armour-of-contempt-spearpoint-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
armour-of-contempt-spearpoint-task-force.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

spear-thrust-and-sabre-swing-spearpoint-.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
spear-thrust-and-sabre-swing-spearpoint-.effect: Select either the [LANCE] or [LETHAL HITS] ability. Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability. If it is a MOUNTED unit, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [LANCE] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities instead.

evasive-manoeuvres-spearpoint-task-force.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
evasive-manoeuvres-spearpoint-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
evasive-manoeuvres-spearpoint-task-force.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

withdraw-and-regroup-spearpoint-task-for.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
withdraw-and-regroup-spearpoint-task-for.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
withdraw-and-regroup-spearpoint-task-for.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

mobile-lethality-spearpoint-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit from your army.
mobile-lethality-spearpoint-task-force.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

hunters-instincts-spearpoint-task-force.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
hunters-instincts-spearpoint-task-force.target: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY unit or ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
hunters-instincts-spearpoint-task-force.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

legendary-killer.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

the-betrayer.raw_text: At the end of your Charge phase, if this model is leading a unit and that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you must take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is failed, one Bodyguard model in that unit is destroyed.

berzerker-frenzy.raw_text: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

icon-of-khorne.raw_text: If the bearer’s unit contains one or more Icons of Khorne, each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain 1 Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

to-slake-its-rage.raw_text: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

objective-ravaged.raw_text: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

rend-and-tear.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, until the end of the phase, improve the Damage characteristic of that attack by 1.

furious-onslaught.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

loping-speed.raw_text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lord-of-murder.raw_text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS INFANTRY units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

devastating-assault.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its hellforged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

idol-of-blessed-blood.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, if this model is on the battlefield, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6.

blood-hungry-annihilator.raw_text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible MONSTER or VEHICLE target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

punishing-suppression.raw_text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

blood-surge.raw_text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

bloody-fury.raw_text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Each time this unit declares a charge that targets the closest eligible enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

bloodied-terror.raw_text: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

swooping-predator.raw_text: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

beacons-of-rage.raw_text: While a friendly WORLD EATERS unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES), add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

frenzy.raw_text: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, and in the Fight phase, each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot or fight, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

super-heavy-war-engine.raw_text: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding TITANIC models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them. It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a roll of 1, this model is Battle-shocked.

the-scent-of-blood.raw_text: Each time this model declares a charge that targets one or more units below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. If one or more of the targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Charge roll instead.

savage-exaltation.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

aggressive-advance.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 10" and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

forwards-for-blood.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

a-worthy-skull.raw_text: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s unit destroys a CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

meet-any-challenge.raw_text: In your opponent’s Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

unleash-wrath.raw_text:
At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:

■ Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
■ Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

fire-riders.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When making a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

crush-all-who-stand-before-us.raw_text: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. When determining which models in this unit are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

direct-the-slaughter.raw_text: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly WORLD EATERS unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

reborn-in-blood.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.

wrathful-presence.raw_text: At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

rage-eternal.raw_text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

possessed-lord.raw_text: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lord-of-the-eightbound.raw_text: If this model is attached to a WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, until the end of the battle, this model has the Deep Strike and Scouts 6" abilities.

berzerker-glaive-berzerker-warband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Damage characteristics of melee weapons (excluding Extra Attacks weapons) equipped by the bearer.

helm-of-brazen-ire-berzerker-warband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. Each time an attack is allocated to the bearer, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

favoured-of-khorne-berzerker-warband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to two of the D6 rolled.

battle-lust-berzerker-warband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. In addition, while the Unbridled Bloodlust Blessing of Khorne is active for your army, add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

chosen-of-the-blood-god-cult-of-blood.raw_text: WORLD EATERS MONSTER model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Aura abilities.

butcher-lord-cult-of-blood.raw_text: WORLD EATERS INFANTRY model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit. If attached to a GOREMONGERS unit, the bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

brazen-form-cult-of-blood.raw_text: WORLD EATERS MONSTER model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

strategic-slaughter-cult-of-blood.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three JAKHALS and/or GOREMONGERS units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

murderous-onslaught-goretrack-onslaught.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. If the bearer’s unit disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn, until the end of the turn, enemy units cannot use the Fire Overwatch Stratagem to shoot at the bearer’s unit.

aggressive-deployment-goretrack-onslaugh.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if the bearer starts the battle embarked within a DEDICATED TRANSPORT, that DEDICATED TRANSPORT has the Scouts 9" ability.

unleash-hell-goretrack-onslaught.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one VEHICLE model within 6" of the bearer or, if the bearer is embarked within a TRANSPORT, you can select that TRANSPORT model. Until the end of the phase, after the selected model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

infernal-infusion-goretrack-onslaught.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s unit has the Fights First ability.

icon-of-war-khorne-daemonkin.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. While a friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, that unit has the Blessings of Khorne ability. If the Might of Khorne ability is active for your army, then while a friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit is within 6" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

blood-forged-armour-khorne-daemonkin.raw_text: BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. If the bearer is destroyed, you gain 1 Blood Tithe point.

disciple-of-khorne-khorne-daemonkin.raw_text: LORD ON JUGGERNAUT model only. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a BLOODCRUSHERS or FLESH HOUNDS unit. While leading one of these units, the bearer has the Deep Strike ability, and it has the BLOOD LEGIONS Faction keyword instead of the WORLD EATERS Faction keyword.

blade-of-endless-bloodshed-khorne-daemon.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit with a melee attack, do not roll to gain a Blood Tithe point, you automatically gain 1 Blood Tithe point instead.

malicious-vigour-possessed-slaughterband.raw_text: SLAUGHTERBOUND model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Brazen Fury move, it is treated as having rolled a 6 for the distance the unit can be moved.

killing-clarity-possessed-slaughterband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. Each time the bearer’s unit destroys an enemy unit, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

frenzied-focus-possessed-slaughterband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only a 6.

violent-demise-possessed-slaughterband.raw_text: WORLD EATERS DAEMON model only. The bearer’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 2+ instead of on a 6. In addition, the bearer has the Deadly Demise D3+1 ability, instead of the Deadly Demise D3 ability.

archslaughterer-vessels-of-wrath.raw_text: WORLD EATERS model only. (Once per battle, per army) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, every Blessing of Khorne is active for this unit until the start of your next turn.

gateways-to-glory-vessels-of-wrath.raw_text: WORLD EATERS DAEMON PRINCE model only. This model has: M OBILE. +1 to charge rolls.

hack-and-slash-berzerker-warband.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and that made a charge move this turn.
hack-and-slash-berzerker-warband.effect: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit by 1.

frenzied-resilience-berzerker-warband.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
frenzied-resilience-berzerker-warband.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
frenzied-resilience-berzerker-warband.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

blood-offering-berzerker-warband.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army that was just destroyed while it was within range of one or more objective markers you controlled at the end of the previous phase. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
blood-offering-berzerker-warband.effect: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

skulls-for-the-skull-throne-berzerker-wa.when: Fight phase, just after a WORLD EATERS unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER or MONSTER model.
skulls-for-the-skull-throne-berzerker-wa.effect: Make a Blessings of Khorne roll and use the results to activate one Blessing of Khorne. Until the end of the battle round, that Blessing of Khorne is active in addition to any other Blessings of Khorne that are currently active.

apoplectic-frenzy-berzerker-warband.when: Your Movement phase, ,just after a KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army is selected to Advance.
apoplectic-frenzy-berzerker-warband.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

berzerkers-wrath-berzerker-warband.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
berzerkers-wrath-berzerker-warband.target: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit from your army that can make a Blood Surge move as a result of those attacks.
berzerkers-wrath-berzerker-warband.effect: Do not roll a D6 to determine how far models in your unit can move when they make their Blood Surge move. Instead, when making their Blood Surge move, these models can move up to 8".

bloodthirsty-horde-cult-of-blood.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase and is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
bloodthirsty-horde-cult-of-blood.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to fight, when determining which models in it are eligible to fight, any models in your unit that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

bloody-vengeance-cult-of-blood.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army that was just destroyed by an enemy unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
bloody-vengeance-cult-of-blood.effect: Until the end of the battle, each time a model in a JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

brazen-idol-cult-of-blood.target: One WORLD EATERS MONSTER or WORLD EATERS TITANIC unit from your army.
brazen-idol-cult-of-blood.effect: Select the Idol of Infinite Rage, Idol of Burning Wrath or Idol of Blessed Blood. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Idols of Khorne ability is active for your unit instead of any other Idols of Khorne ability that is active for your army, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.
brazen-idol-cult-of-blood.restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

in-the-shadow-of-brass-idols-cult-of-blo.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
in-the-shadow-of-brass-idols-cult-of-blo.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
in-the-shadow-of-brass-idols-cult-of-blo.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, your unit has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

fail-not-the-blood-god-cult-of-blood.target: One JAKHALS or GOREMONGERS unit from your army.
fail-not-the-blood-god-cult-of-blood.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that model’s unit is within 6" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS MONSTER units, or within 9" of one or more friendly WORLD EATERS TITANIC units, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

drawn-to-the-slaughter-cult-of-blood.target: One JAKHALS unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.
drawn-to-the-slaughter-cult-of-blood.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.
drawn-to-the-slaughter-cult-of-blood.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER units to Attached units.

endless-pursuit-of-violence-goretrack-on.target: One WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit from your army and one friendly TRANSPORT that it is able to embark within.
endless-pursuit-of-violence-goretrack-on.effect: If your WORLD EATERS INFANTRY unit is wholly within 6" of that TRANSPORT, it can embark within it.

smash-through-goretrack-onslaught.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
smash-through-goretrack-onslaught.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal or Advance move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

aggressive-disembarkation-goretrack-onsl.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
aggressive-disembarkation-goretrack-onsl.effect: One WORLD EATERS unit embarked within your RHINO can disembark. When doing so, models in that unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 6" of your RHINO and can be set up within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

full-throttle-assault-goretrack-onslaugh.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
full-throttle-assault-goretrack-onslaugh.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a WORLD EATERS unit disembarks from that model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

unrelenting-advance-goretrack-onslaught.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
unrelenting-advance-goretrack-onslaught.target: One WORLD EATERS VEHICLE model from your army that was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
unrelenting-advance-goretrack-onslaught.effect: Your model can make a Normal move of up to 6".
unrelenting-advance-goretrack-onslaught.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Fury Unleashed Stratagem in the same phase.

fury-unleashed-goretrack-onslaught.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
fury-unleashed-goretrack-onslaught.target: One WORLD EATERS RHINO model from your army that has one or more wounds remaining and was hit by one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
fury-unleashed-goretrack-onslaught.effect: One KHORNE BERZERKERS unit embarked within your model can disembark and make a Blood Surge move.
fury-unleashed-goretrack-onslaught.restrictions: A unit cannot be targeted by this Stratagem and the Unrelenting Advance Stratagem in the same phase.

daemonic-fury-khorne-daemonkin.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army.
daemonic-fury-khorne-daemonkin.effect: Select one friendly WORLD EATERS unit within 6" of your unit. Until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in your WORLD EATERS unit have the [LANCE] ability. If the Daemonic Rage ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase those melee weapons also have the [TWIN-LINKED] ability.

blessing-of-burning-blood-khorne-daemonk.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
blessing-of-burning-blood-khorne-daemonk.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is within 6" of a friendly WORLD EATERS unit that was selected as the target as one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
blessing-of-burning-blood-khorne-daemonk.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. If the Boon of Blood ability is active for your army, then until the end of the phase, models in your WORLD EATERS unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

a-worthy-skull-khorne-daemonkin.when: Fight phase, just after a BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit from your army has fought, and one or more enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks.
a-worthy-skull-khorne-daemonkin.target: That BLOOD LEGIONS or WORLD EATERS unit.
a-worthy-skull-khorne-daemonkin.effect: You gain D3 BTP and you can then spend one or more BTP you have to activate one of the Blood Tithe abilities.

summoned-by-slaughter-khorne-daemonkin.when: Any phase, when the last model in a unit is destroyed, before removing it from play. (If that unit is a TRANSPORT, any units embarked within that TRANSPORT model must disembark first.)
summoned-by-slaughter-khorne-daemonkin.target: One BLOODLETTERS unit from your army that is in Reserves.
summoned-by-slaughter-khorne-daemonkin.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9" of that destroyed model and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, then remove the destroyed model from play.
summoned-by-slaughter-khorne-daemonkin.restrictions: You cannot use this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

daemontide-khorne-daemonkin.target: One WORLD EATERS unit from your army.
daemontide-khorne-daemonkin.effect: Select one friendly BLOOD LEGIONS unit within 6" of your unit. One destroyed MOUNTED model, up to D3 destroyed BEAST models, or up to D6 destroyed INFANTRY models are returned to that BLOOD LEGIONS unit with their full wounds remaining.
daemontide-khorne-daemonkin.restrictions: This Stratagem cannot be used to return destroyed CHARACTER models to Attached units.

murder-call-khorne-daemonkin.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
murder-call-khorne-daemonkin.target: One BLOOD LEGIONS unit from your army that is on the battlefield and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
murder-call-khorne-daemonkin.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

daemonic-strength-possessed-slaughterban.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
daemonic-strength-possessed-slaughterban.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a model in your unit is allocated to an enemy model, if your unit has the EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack. If your unit has the EXALTED EIGHTBOUND keyword and that enemy model is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack instead.

daemonic-resistance-possessed-slaughterb.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
daemonic-resistance-possessed-slaughterb.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
daemonic-resistance-possessed-slaughterb.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

immortal-fury-possessed-slaughterband.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
immortal-fury-possessed-slaughterband.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
immortal-fury-possessed-slaughterband.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

rapid-manifestation-possessed-slaughterb.target: One EXALTED EIGHTBOUND unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.
rapid-manifestation-possessed-slaughterb.effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.
rapid-manifestation-possessed-slaughterb.restrictions: A unit targeted with this Stratagem is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

warp-stalkers-possessed-slaughterband.when: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.
warp-stalkers-possessed-slaughterband.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army that has not been selected to move or declare a charge this phase.
warp-stalkers-possessed-slaughterband.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through enemy models (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES). When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless that move was a Charge move, it cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

horrifying-violence-possessed-slaughterb.target: One WORLD EATERS POSSESSED unit from your army.
horrifying-violence-possessed-slaughterb.effect: Each enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

aspire-to-infamy-vessels-of-wrath.when: Fight phase, when a friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) is selected to fight.
aspire-to-infamy-vessels-of-wrath.effect: Your unit's CHARACTER models' melee attacks have: +1 A. +2 S.

punish-the-craven-vessels-of-wrath.when: Your opponent's Movement phase, when a unit is selected to make a fall-back move, if that unit is engaged with a friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER unit.
punish-the-craven-vessels-of-wrath.effect: When an enemy unit engaged with your unit is selected to make a fall-back move, that enemy unit must use the desperate escape mode. If that enemy unit is battle-shocked, -1 from those hazard rolls.

apoplectic-clarity-brazen-engines.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly DAEMON VEHICLE unit is selected to attack.
apoplectic-clarity-brazen-engines.effect: Your unit's attacks can ignore modifiers to: BS. WS. Hit rolls and wound rolls.

trail-of-destruction-brazen-engines.when: Your Movement phase, when a friendly DAEMON VEHICLE unit is selected to move.

goaded-to-fury-brazen-engines.when: Your opponent's Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged DAEMON VEHICLE unit (excluding TITANIC units) has shot.
goaded-to-fury-brazen-engines.effect: Your unit can make a surge move of up to D6".

focused-ferocity-butchers-of-khorne.when: Fight phase, when a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD unit is selected to fight.
focused-ferocity-butchers-of-khorne.effect: Your unit's melee attacks have +1 A.

a-trophy-for-the-throne-butchers-of-khor.when: Fight phase, when a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD unit is selected to fight.
a-trophy-for-the-throne-butchers-of-khor.effect: Your unit's attacks that target a MONSTER/VEHICLE unit have +1 to wound rolls.

wrath-beyond-reason-butchers-of-khorne.when: Your opponent's Shooting Phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly TERMINATOR SQUAD unit.
wrath-beyond-reason-butchers-of-khorne.effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit have -1 D until that enemy unit has attacked.

scorn-the-witch-vessels-of-wrath.when: Any phase, when a friendly WORLD EATERS CHARACTER unit (excluding EPIC HERO units) suffers a mortal wound.
scorn-the-witch-vessels-of-wrath.effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.

talons-of-butchery-brazen-engines.raw_text: MAULERFIEND unit only. This unit's Maulerfiend Fists have [CLEAVE 2].

murder-forged-entity-brazen-engines.raw_text: WORLD EATERS VEHICLE unit only. This unit has DAEMON.

sanctified-in-slaughter-butchers-of-khor.raw_text: TERMINATOR SQUAD unit only. This unit has +1 OC.

gore-stained-veterans-butchers-of-khorne.raw_text: TERMINATOR SQUAD unit only. This unit's melee attacks have +1 WS.
